subject: Raquel has been fighting with us

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10]
Hi friend,
Let’s be real. For years, the Arizona State Legislature has been run by right-wing Republicans working to undermine our democracy and attack our personal freedoms.
As a State Representative and then as a Senator, Raquel Terán spoke up, showed up, and sounded the alarm when her MAGA colleagues threatened to take our state backward.
Between preventing a decrease in Arizona's minimum wage, a ban on sanctuary cities, and fighting back against Republican attacks on women’s reproductive freedoms, Raquel has fought for us at every turn.
Now it’s time we help her become that fighter in Congress. Chip in $5, or $10 today to support our grassroots campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10]
Republicans in Washington are now threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare, while trying to impose a federal abortion ban. We need a Representative who knows how to go up against far-right radicals and win. That’s why we need Raquel in Congress.
As an advocate for workers, immigrants, and women, Raquel Terán is the progressive fighter that we deserve.
Before we can make that a reality, however, we need to get through a challenging primary campaign. Can you donate a few dollars today to support our grassroots efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10]
A ganar,
Team Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_050923_Fighter&amount=10]

clean_body: This is our chance to CRUSH Biden. | | Friend, After the embarrassing launch of Biden’s 2024 re-election campaign, this is our chance to seize an early advantage in the race that Crooked Joe will NEVER be able to overcome. His grassroots fundraising has been so abysmal that he REFUSES to report it, we’re leading him by 7 POINTS in poll after poll, and now, even the Fake News Media can’t hide it for him. When even a CNN anchor is telling viewers that these are “not good numbers for President Biden,” then you know it’s worse than anything the radical Democrats could have ever imagined. But now is not the time to let up. Now is the time to capitalize on this momentum and make May our STRONGEST grassroots fundraising month yet! Which is why President Trump is calling on patriots like YOU to contribute even just $1 to help us CRUSH our May goal and officially turn Biden’s 2024 launch into one of the single biggest laughing stocks of political history. Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, May 7, 2023 Subject: Embarrassing for Crooked Joe To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com]> | Friend, Biden’s 2024 campaign truly could not have had a more embarrassing launch... | Biden campaign off to 'slow start,' months behind Obama's 2012 pace: Report [Source: Fox News] From a new poll showing that 64% of Americans don’t even want Biden in the race to him being implicated in a bribery scheme with a foreign national, things are not looking good for Crooked Joe. And on top of it all, every sign points to our campaign of grassroots patriots like YOU having OUTRAISED Biden and Kamala during their announcement month! But we can’t take our foot off the gas now that all the momentum is on our side, Friend. I’m counting on YOUR sustained support – even if that means just $1 – to capitalize on this moment so that we can seize an advantage in this race that Biden will NEVER be able to overcome. | Thank you, | Donald J. A group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including anti-Trump Secretaries of State, secretly gathered at CEIR's Soros-Tied and Zuckerberg Funded Election Summit in Washington DC on May 8-May 9, 2023, which they called "[Summit on American Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/11d5b292-26f8-4183-ac8d-30f1ebd39185?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)".
[](https://substack.com/redirect/20b5684f-eff7-48d0-b182-7fa99b758da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After exclusively breaking the story about this summit last month, I flew to Washington DC to confront and question these election officials in person, on camera during their two day election summit. On the first day of this election fortification summit, I ran into Bill Gates, the County Supervisor in Maricopa County, Arizona. This is the same Bill Gates who Kari Lake, the Republican candidate for Governor of Arizona in, 2022, named in her lawsuit along with several other Arizona election officials, in which she is contesting the results of her stolen election.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/20b5684f-eff7-48d0-b182-7fa99b758da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
According to [a report](https://substack.com/redirect/ba78bac4-95d9-487c-b25b-ecd1d3352718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Lake's election lawsuit:
> _" Listed as defendants in Lake's suit are Maricopa County Recorder Stephen Richer, Maricopa County Director of Elections for Election Services and Early Voting Rey Valenzuela, Maricopa County Director of Elections for Election Day and Emergency Voting Scott Jarrett, members of the **Maricopa County Board of Supervisors Bill Gates** , Clint Hickman, Jack Sellers, Thomas Galvin, and Steve Gallardo."_
Complaints listed in the suit include allegations of misprinted ballots that were not readable by voting machines, the mixing of counted and uncounted ballots, long lines at polling locations that discouraged voters from casting ballots, along with other conditions."
While Gates, who claims that he is a Republican, was walking into the Zuckerberg Funded CEIR Conference in DC at the International Spy Museum, I confronted him on camera about his ongoing litigation with Kari Lake, election irregularities in Maricopa County, Arizona, and if he believes that it is ethical for him to be attending such a partisan, leftist election summit given that there is undeniable evidence that shows this conference is being held by CEIR founder David Becker, who is a radical Leftist political operative with a documented history of being tied to George Soros, and Becker's organization, CEIR, accepted funds to the tune of $69.5 million from Mark Zuckerberg in 2020 for the sake of influencing the 2020 Presidential election, by his own admission in his book.
WATCH the video by [clicking here](https://substack.com/redirect/20b5684f-eff7-48d0-b182-7fa99b758da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to see CEIR summit speaker and attendee Bill Gates, the Maricopa County Supervisor, get confronted by me as he's walking into the closed door conference regarding the 2024 Presidential election.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/20b5684f-eff7-48d0-b182-7fa99b758da9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Don Huffines
subject: ELIMINATE vehicle safety inspections...
body:
Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Safety or Subsidy? The Case for Eliminating Texas' Passenger Vehicle Safety Inspection Program**
## _" Stop the parasitic money grabbers and support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 9, 2023 -- The Texas House passed HB 3297, which would eliminate vehicle inspections! This is an out-of-date program that is just one more property tax Texans are forced to pay. Enough is enough.We must support HB 3297 in the Texas Senate so Texans can finally experience a little liberty with our vehicles.Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" I am quite familiar with the car business and trust me when I tell you: vehicle inspections are a scam. You are being ripped off. Texas is the only Republican state to still have this policy."_Huffines further added:_" Look at the groups that are working to keep this worthless and out-of-date program: Gulf States Toyota (billionaires), Alliance for Automotive Innovation, and all of the state inspection shops making money on Texas car owners (with the government!)."_ [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-j/) [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-h/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-u/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zmpjd-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-zmpjd-17329976-yuddtktydi-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-zmpjd-yuddtktydi-e/)

Our mission is to advance the cause of liberty , prosperity , and virtue in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas: | | | | ---|---|--- (214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible. By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. |

Our best chance of fighting back and stopping these horrific attacks is if we show MASSIVE approval for reproductive choice. **Please, we need 2,000 responses by MIDNIGHT:** [**DO YOU SUPPORT THE RIGHT TO CHOOSE?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7612%2E878179%2E0B_pa7) | [YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/support-choice/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7612%2E878179%2E0B_pa7)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Seeing a Green Future in Philly and Supporting Helen Gym
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Dear friends,

Jane Fonda here! I'm excited to personally invite you to a special virtual fundraiser for Helen Gym on Saturday, May 13, at 12 PM ET. Click here and donate any amount for access to the virtual event with me and Helen. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051323fonda]

Virtual Fundraiser with Jane Fonda
Saturday, May 13, 12 PM ET
Virtual Event: Link shared upon RSVP
All proceeds support Helen Gym for Mayor
RSVP HERE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051323fonda]

I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC last year because we need to elect leaders who share our commitment to safeguarding the environment and fighting against the fossil fuel industry. Helen is committed to doing the hard work it will take to pass key climate policy as Mayor, and we need to show as much support as we can before Election Day.

As a name-your-price ticket event, your donation will help ensure Helen’s message reaches as many voters as possible — on the airwaves, on the phone, and at their front doors in this pivotal last stretch (and if you give $250, you’ll gain access to a meet and greet with myself and Helen).

Your generous contribution will go a long way in helping Helen do the critical work of addressing the climate crisis in Philadelphia, and serve as an example for other cities across the country. Together, we can create a brighter, more sustainable future for all.

Thank you in advance for your support, and I look forward to seeing you at the virtual fundraiser.

Warm regards,
Jane Fonda
Jane Fonda Climate PAC

P.S. Can't make it to the event but still want to support Helen? You can still donate directly to her campaign by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051323fonda]
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=jToio5BDHgYg36skQvh34c21rG%2FUBICtS9IO5UvwJAz0TscVqpQQwXpIxNW1KvWrOlIhK458LdC2%2BrJwCn3%2BADq62DDD9%2FbTMHwgttsp88rwkwV9zCHLC7U9rIL4Yxugnmk2U%2FgsWXi1SO%2B%2BpfJrY0s2kGRKnmIFY4c5I6F5zS369J86I%2BIJfuDagJx0IrPyv6Ed1ceUWxUFdBzTsBG2GUQnHTxSejdFRjkxzkBvn%2FZ48Nvy6he%2FwgO07olaN%2FBTveVLc3anBKmzxil4Yjplihg8sUZCql8AZMlerreYR4KEHhNIoA3xcWATEJeq748CYi5J69%2F7fVVbKyu5%2FfKHvVSS0gdhheguEvzB9oYwxmGPsfX8VmRDCSPeTJaFJtO5X8MDmQNfxy7ON2UquNUbCyeHMKnWGa8XivsYY11oQ3NR3FBbiY5YrdxOWJhtxMOn]

Peter,
_**Lori is fighting to confront the drug crisis and address homelessness in our community. These issues are among her top priorities and she is committed to finding bipartisan solutions to tackle them head-on.
**_
Homelessness is a pressing issue in our community, and __Lori is taking action to help provide the unsheltered population with the care they need to transition off the streets and into safe and stable housing.__ She is working on legislation that would help provide essential resources to those experiencing homelessness and address the root causes of this crisis.

__Lori is actively addressing Oregon's drug crisis.__ She knows that this crisis is affecting too many families in our community, and she is working hard to ensure that those struggling with addiction get the support and care they need to overcome it.

But she needs your help to continue this important work.

By making a donation today, you can help Lori reach her $20,000 May fundraising goal and join her in fighting for the issues that matter most to our community.
[_**Can you pitch in $500, $250, 100, or even $25 right now? >>>
**_](https://u32713810.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=P2XsNzd-2BU60NKIIDkRBMXuvnoTrkCmF6-2Fx8aZdCr3SNXTpOlLQlhNvp5b68pSwdV3SXBnM6XRx6vPl8QKxJ1pkothNmbsz0WiPRiYIl6FR3ek9fz-2FY-2BmKeXYSmtZt-2FbkCuJspWZnT7CcSdObyfal4XUYI8-2Fqco-2BB89kwl7iO56VrnI-2BKfxbdqJ2TgSHOOlzDZq6k-2BJrUpCIidRR55mW-2FCRJPUMzlOAK33zF4uwm5-2BlhM9jPaMGUdD-2BON8UfvYiXOnqIm_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc32p3GYQnPjvK77vjtaqu0sDMZ2UoCX0TCmKEJuf4W1ZaP9Nux1C0n4yhZLR8pEDmDl2dF3hM2mg0V32nkESebm0LwHLQ6dRDWPA3-2BJ9UR3-2B3PWVIgS1R4CFRSCgmf-2BHyKA7uA-2BGRT7gahGJlSc9ZIYU4XfSWGf59bWCUjyL84Gj70UpFkBWOrC1-2BwGtDwt00zpDaoLPH0hauzSyGv2OuIsMphaSO1QzI-2BbHZQ3ua9a1jkStSYvQ3R5cjiJapIEwLBF-2BWVKWtWkE9ws099Pe4NcXBwHg2EdCGKq5ANhrn2cRWJcYwvVd-2FnaRwnyiTpxdkmOQSM0RPQDcjsI9QSjKSou6wiQiWurzmPHlMYH8erIuqin5g-2B4xUVI5-2FvzFIQUb7jvqAG6BRRP1Kzz-2BvmlLnMr6ICyRY5VoeDvhp3pqGWKjAijBvJvUZX5KPNAeexOdQ8LkKFX5q9CatxV5GVAzBKBBpDHuQdeerbpWo1tTmfNi-2FmNbeK9cMbnyhcU306s1yHP1lbhYVunjpIjpeRczINmf1AadKxEThvc9n32moqOBb7xQ7SRGE31N-2FjE7bBH8SlmJn0X51HLaKPasXVQry0M8VgidhdlSI0BEfRgsE3lUYDMolBjY8qLrE5w493Yv6V5WRV3LTSV9A6C-2B2Ua-2FjzjtxJM0s5kn0vlX0EoIoCJzZag5Vif0y0GHWLe3Cdgbo2tV2R8rPAlNWb9OTf-2Ftpp8NgnctBRTER6-2F0WPn-2FLHOC1FAA5ufkDn6o-2F-2FenG1UuPR8wPZvWy4fMCBm5qClkcwf-2BxNwYC2EeWjyzWzIX9DqIzvdoRZhu-2F0kTtzdNzTMGTaJ5HM0JPZPVKGezkRlLdDfVciPaUYIKJUYuCgG6-2BeGX3OuweKraluqM5Mq9ujxyMQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Are you ready to join the fight? Peter, Lori is fighting to confront the drug crisis and address homelessness in our community. These issues are among her top priorities and she is committed to finding bipartisan solutions to tackle them head-on. Homelessness is a pressing issue in our community, and Lori is taking action to help provide the unsheltered population with the care they need to transition off the streets and into safe and stable housing. She is working on legislation that would help provide essential resources to those experiencing homelessness and address the root causes of this crisis. Lori is actively addressing Oregon's drug crisis. She knows that this crisis is affecting too many families in our community, and she is working hard to ensure that those struggling with addiction get the support and care they need to overcome it. But she needs your help to continue this important work. By making a donation today, you can help Lori reach her $20,000 May fundraising goal and join her in fighting for the issues that matter most to our community. | | | | | Your donation can make a real difference in our community. Please make a contribution today to help Lori continue her important work to address the drug crisis and confront homelessness. Thank you, Team Lori Finance Team | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Team Lori 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Finding Joy in Politics… Yes, There Is Some!
body:
Episode #7 of Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl is LIVE!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-r/) Hi Peter, JOY is not a word that typically comes up when speaking about politics, campaigns, or running for office. But I'm here to tell you... YES, there is most definitely joy in politics. And now that the dust is settling after the election, I can see the joy in the journey so clearly. At its core, politics is simply us very flawed humans searching for a way to live together, work together, and raise families together - in pursuit of joy and happiness. The journey, being in the ring, being in the battle to reclaim and defend a life full of joy for folks across Colorado, now that's the pursuit of happiness. That's the ultimate fight.I got a note from a listener last week that they needed some hope and positivity amidst the chaos happening in our state right now... so this week on Unleashed, I decided to pivot to talk about some of my favorite moments from the campaign trail these last two years. And I also interviewed some of my favorite kiddos (my own, of course) on their favorite moments, too!
### **Episode #7 - FINDING JOY IN POLITICS ... YES, THERE IS SOME!**
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-y/) [WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-j/) [WATCH ON RUMBLE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-t/) [LISTEN HERE](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-i/) _Not into podcasts? I post transcripts of my monologues and full episode breakdowns every week on my Substack.[You can subscribe here!](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-d/)_
## **ICYMI: Here's what you missed on social this week!**
### **1\. SB 213-23 IS OFFICIALLY DEAD... Stay tuned for a legislative overview coming this week on Unleashed!**
SB 213-23, the horrible Colorado housing bill, is now DEAD. The House tried to add more amendments last minute, but citizens and Mayors pushed hard against Polis' socialist World Economic Forum agenda. But as I've said before, [THEY WERE WILLING TO GO THIS FAR](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-h/). Controlling our energy output by driving us into high-density, public transportation pods and out of suburbia. No cars for you! No single-family homes for you!I will be doing an overview of the 2023 Legislative Session this week on Unleashed -- stay tuned for this episode, coming out on Thursday! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-k/)
### **2\. The Ganahl kiddos take a trip down memory lane, reminiscing on their favorite parts of the campaign.**
This week on Unleashed, it was so much fun to have [my kiddos share their favorite memories from the campaign trail](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-b/)! I had a rule that one kid got to come with me to at least one campaign event each week, and I'm so grateful I was able to share this wild ride with my kids! I know they'll never forget it.Despite the results, there was so much joy in the journey and in moments along the way. In the celebrations -- like winning the primary or crushing a debate. In every parade -- from throwing candy, to petting every dog along the way. And, of course, every yummy meal along the way! [Listen to the full episode here.](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-n/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-p/)
### **3\. Colorado teachers union passes resolution declaring capitalism 'inherently exploits children, public schools'...**
60% of Colorado students can't read, write, or do math at grade level, and this is what CEA is doing with their time. The resolution says that "capitalism inherently exploits children, public schools, land, labor, and resources."[Read the full article on Fox News here.](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-x/) [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-m/) If you've been liking the podcast so far, [here are the ways you can help us grow](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-c/)!Have a great week,Heidi [](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-q/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-a/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-f/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-z/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-v/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-l-allstk-ttjjilthht-e/) | Heidi GanahlLone Tree, CO [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-allstk-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail20.com/t/i-u-allstk-ttjjilthht-g/)
---

| | And why everything you buy at the store is more expensive... **NOT A WORD.** Instead, he’ll stand in front of a teleprompter and sell you on a repackaged “Build Back Broke” deal, **paid for by your retirement savings.** But wait! Biden says, **“under my plan, nobody earning less than $400,000 a year will pay an additional penny in new taxes.”** Yeah, is that right Joe? No new taxes? **Don’t believe it.** **He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security** benefits in 1983... **He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security** benefits in 1994... **He voted for Estate Taxes** in 2000... **Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. ** Who do you think will pay for that? **Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself ...** Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it’s too late? If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... I think you should protect your retirement savings NOW, **just _like _**_**thousands of other Americans**_** have already done...** That’s why we put together an easy-to-follow blueprint **that could help protect your retirement savings** from Biden’s greedy hands. **_[==> CLICK HERE to get your FREE 2023 Wealth Protection Kit](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666021%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bcHdn1R45h74y0yWOkfp2Q&sysid=1)_**
* There’s **NO Cost** or Obligation
* The Kit is 100% **FREE**
* _Even the FedEx Shipping is 100%**FREE**_

Inside you’re going to discover how simple it is to protect your retirement savings, **and how you can do it 100% TAX FREE & PENALTY FREE.** Look, I’ve done my research... And this is what I recommend to my audience, friends, and family...

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters...

|
New CBS News Poll
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z87r2odnnmfnp3bma6op1365raql11n84oqedb6o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)
The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence.

Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**Ramaswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there.**

I am looking to you to help today. **[Any amount you give will help us achieve this goal- even just $1 or $5.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6orajbc0v3as066kqqcq2aovfeg8q57ro7t4b6o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8at2e6do0g5jujdq52c8qktv03ukqmv1gh04218_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm7aa9kp5pugsrtncl9vgdkaer6gekfjmkhhdumg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc29p2pm1hf0kl92nkaaqkrcor6v08dljqihaqhg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs) | | [Chip in $24 ➔](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmk1pd1gvkm1sotsv3cqel8hnm3gmfh49qdn8720_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)

We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. **[Help however you can, Fellow American.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb5vclv8d10p7ijkqrhj8pp3ibdejlf6aqipik38_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6diqlripjmrd0291oq8da3qkg6euuk3dbvvrs3o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7pfmg5ib3epipmaa7evcplmosqr02vr8tv3qcgg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2ljqajt84k74jbvjfsn8r2uv67mtke7leujtbbo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cti62or2cjh2bs)

---

---|---|---

No new taxes? **Don’t believe it.** **He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security** benefits in 1983... **He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security** benefits in 1994... **He voted for Estate Taxes** in 2000... **Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. ** Who do you think will pay for that? **Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself...** Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it’s too late? name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/J2Y-UET7o8kmWFkW-HIaHg)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/bw_Ja3zekn71errhg_ca4A)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/9kqmyIW36GLTfP41TpN9Uw)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/pDloSE5nD4Iy4EiAJrTJFg)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/qP9uA6lLG3a6gNzbbIXUbg)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/Vee-TocQN1OtMea7wxDweg)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/x-9ybtszvnuThWH0W99IjA) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/shDcOZiQv8nduMfhTk6bDw)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/qeAxKaBXcqCJGfbS6NLbuA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzg3OTkifQ/LU8WemPYCm3hcGXBCGLw9g)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTMwLWFlOTQzNmNhMDdjOTRiNzI5NTM2YzU4Nzk4YmE2OTVhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/7NNS22uIyZ0lYKF0esDZyA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Team Nina
subject: Challenge from Nina for Philly Campaign Co-Chair, Ambassador Osman Siddique
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
Ambassador Osman Siddique's Nina Ahmad Challenge!
> > [BREAKING NEWS!](https://act.myngp.com/el/f69uQdrt57a0w6uJjIuR6605wd7zXGua7i2HMx8p_8E=/RRHrCNYkZ-CRHW2JkrGq-Jviw4DsLJmUQJ1Ki3lPUF4=) Nina Ahmad endorsed by _**The Philadelphia Tribune**_ , the oldest continuously published African American newspaper in the United States. This adds to Nina's endorsement by the Philadelphia Inquirer,
>>
>>
>> as well as validation by the [extensive coalition of labor unions and progressive organizations endorsing her](https://act.myngp.com/el/f69uQdrt57a0w6uJjIuR6605wd7zXGua7i2HMx8p_8E=/RRHrCNYkZ-CRHW2JkrGq-Jviw4DsLJmUQJ1Ki3lPUF4=)!
>> **Ambassador M. Osman Siddique:** "I am very proud to serve as Nina's campaign co-chair and with only 7 days left until the election, I am calling on everyone to [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/f69uQdrt57a0w6uJjIuR6605wd7zXGua7i2HMx8p_8E=/Fpr-ICcrr-3ALhJCsAGpy_2hZ6hUCNzxMqhMF5pzsyQ=) all they can TODAY to Nina's campaign to celebrate this critical endorsement, and help her keep her TV commercial on air to make sure she wins on May 16th! Nina will be the first South Asian, only scientist and immigrant to serve on the upcoming Philadelphia City Council!. Great honor for our community.
>>
>> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/f69uQdrt57a0w6uJjIuR6605wd7zXGua7i2HMx8p_8E=/5Dg5dLNuzIF4N_MZkMcqURLLsAF9_J5OWGPdos20260=?v=ncdlpD9kA88&t=2s)

**__Contribute below to help Ambassador Siddique support Nina!__**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/f69uQdrt57a0w6uJjIuR6605wd7zXGua7i2HMx8p_8E=/Dh_vkww3bm6Z8joAAdvdbMn0qzdu6lIlhJLQun8oj-I=)
Please SHARE this challenge page widely on facebook, twitter, and with your friends and family. Thank you!
Paid for by Nina for PA
---
Nina for PA
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

subject: Jury: Trump Liable for Sexual Battery, Tucker Launches New Show, Wendy's Taking AI Drive-Thru Orders
body:
Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has “absolutely no idea who this woman is.”

Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has “absolutely no idea who this woman is.”

## Trump to Appeal $5 Million Verdict
Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has "absolutely no idea who this woman is." The jury held Trump [liable for battery and defamation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u4yAUBOCnwZ0jfg0ULlaK3CXVSltax3BsswKDME60b7_K1S1vOd9UM38e8wNCDMf2hIRjW_MMroUXzlT1jPZczLzz44rIUXQ4ssEIzcygWLePCoz21GmlmJSUWqetXxdplLUWVqO6MHLKBVWMMkqZUDertEDwwmm_eG4lkRR9aLne_uZwtB3X-C-_sN5cTl0c99bKScQvwifCJygHvs9P9Qm1BReR8KnVK5W-QsHeQa05xr7VALFfcTBcWZCLNcsirNReclgtOiO89gsR09XSfOarOiTivueEBTYkfPh4Qh-uRMT9dy5PfJ_f7CAVCNtBxL3kM7SQj5myro6-vEOM4Rw0kXRLEOLXivbzqf8DAAD__yDDeOE), but not for the rape that Carroll claimed. The case was a civil trial, and no criminal charges were involved. Jurors awarded [total damages of $5 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGuozAQheGnMZ2RPQMYFy5WWtFlm9VqSzTYQ-LI4Mg4iXj7q5v61ucrjv7_l_lCMcX9-oc2dnXNM_kaXzyrXmolAWdogluZgbFhp4cRjR6HXjc3p1ZDA6EdPVhcFQTqDJtB4Wh16NE20YECVL1WWimNfWt7g0wBvQlLANuJTnGINZf2nuNeb7ymM7-4tD5vTXK3Wh-HwF8CJgETLX7n99Fe8_csYPr3V8B0f5ZTBk5x4UI15v2Qzz1wedMp70y79FRKTkkuVCt_7ErbR0pPBwuYjprLKXCKQeBva_WIo1FNceHxjinFYzCiU9eNYvr8qj9n-goAAP__PPxpdA) to Carroll: $2 million for battery and $3 million for defamation.
## Tucker Launching New Show on Twitter
Tucker Carlson is bringing a new version of his show to Twitter, he announced in a 3-minute video posted on Twitter ([WATCH](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFv8yAQgOFfg7dExx0Ye2D49FVs6VSpo0XMkdCSEJlLov77Su3a-R1ePe-H5RBLLdfTa7ywl9yWuEp58AJ2p2GHtOCQfGZGpoG9HidyehqtHs5-Oo4TGE42Tg5zApPJGJujmY_s8oxD8QhIYDVoAE12P1tHHBOtLh0TzkYZ4FSkbfuPVq5y5ly_2oO3_douQ_VnkVtX9E9hUBjkWUR-m8Lwdl8_efsft9rbVWHoEuXeFQY92hHIAaGliWawBIpCV_SCMGw-3Z6l1tJHpwycLrHUn5n8bf8OAAD__-g0V0s)). Before posting his video, Carlson's lawyers sent an aggressive letter to his former employers at Fox News, accusing them of [fraud and breach of contract](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu8yAURp8Gb1iXCxg8MPyLt_xrR4vAJaElJsIkTt--Sucu3_JJ5-h8nNaTzyVvl__-Rq6nuvrQ85NW0FwAR7niEF0iQpIDOTFZaYSdtBiuLtoUlBaTmIU6J2OCp5TAWlCTjUg4ZIeAErQAASCkHmdtJPkog4nniLNiCijmXtv4WfPWr5TKd31SG0O9DcVde7_vTP5juDBcjuMY_SvX_f0yXN5shgvo98wMl_4IX9R48K3sdeOpvvhGx84L9U6Np-YfcWgu3o9cSt4nwxRcbj6XX13_u_4nAAD__-I3WmE). The legal move is designed to free him from his existing Fox contract, which would bar him from launching a competing show--such as the one on Twitter--until 2025.

clean_body: Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has “absolutely no idea who this woman is.” Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has “absolutely no idea who this woman is.” | | | | | | Wednesday, May 10, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering Donald Trump’s reaction to his sexual battery verdict, Tucker Carlson announcing plans for a new show, and Wendy’s taking your drive-thru order with AI. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. Note: Yesterday, we incorrectly labeled Tyson Foods in our market section as going up 16%, instead of down 16%. Sorry! | Trump to Appeal $5 Million Verdict Former President Donald Trump says he will appeal the verdict against him in the E. Jean Carroll defamation and sexual assault case, saying he has "absolutely no idea who this woman is." The jury held Trump , but not for the rape that Carroll claimed. The case was a civil trial, and no criminal charges were involved. Jurors awarded to Carroll: $2 million for battery and $3 million for defamation. Tucker Launching New Show on Twitter Tucker Carlson is bringing a new version of his show to Twitter, he announced in a 3-minute video posted on Twitter (). Before posting his video, Carlson's lawyers sent an aggressive letter to his former employers at Fox News, accusing them of . The legal move is designed to free him from his existing Fox contract, which would bar him from launching a competing show--such as the one on Twitter--until 2025. Highest Paid Athletes Set Records Eight of the global superstars in this year's Forbes list of top-paid athletes in on-and-off-field annual earnings, with the total for all 10 coming in at $1.1 billion, a new record. Soccer star Cristiano Ronaldo is the , with earnings of $136 million. There are five American athletes on the list, led by LeBron James, who earned $119.5 million. To see the full list, . ➤ The Justice Department has charged Rep. George Santos with federal offenses following an investigation into his finances. Santos had just announced for re-election, despite having admitted to lying about much of his background during his campaign. () ➤ Federal border officials have authorized the mass release of migrants onto city streets if non-government organizations can't handle the expected surge. The decision means migrants could be mass released at bus stops, gas stations, supermarkets, and towns across the border, sources say. () ➤ GOP Senate leader Mitch McConnell said Republicans will focus on four key states in an effort to win back the Senate in 2024. He identified Pennsylvania, Ohio, Montana, and West Virginia as the most likely states for the GOP to flip. () ➤ A veteran Chicago prosecutor has quit his job after 20 years, blasting “stupid” city officials for terrible decisions that have led to crime and violence. Prosecutor Jason Poje says he is moving his family out of the city — “I won’t raise my son here.” () ➤ The NFL plans to hold the first Monday tripleheader in league history on Christmas Day this year. In the past, the NFL has scheduled two games when Christmas fell on a Monday, but the league is moving aggressively to own the Yuletide airwaves. () ➤ Aaron Judge, baseball's reigning MVP, returns to the Yankee lineup after an injury sidelined him two weeks ago. In his absence, the Yankees kept losing and slid to last place in their division. () ➤ Tampa Bay Rays pitcher Zach Eflin says he won't remove his wedding ring when he pitches, despite being forced to take it off by umpires in his last outing. The umpires claimed the ring was a "foreign substance." Eflin says he isn't taking it off again. () Market Report 5/9/23 | ▼ | Nasdaq Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 12,179.55 | - 0.63% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | S&P S&P Global Rating | 4,119.17 | - 0.46 ▼ | DOW J Dow Jones Industrial Average | 33,562.14 | - 0.17% ▼ | BTC Bitcoin | 27,679.8 | - 0.16% ▲ | PLTR Palantir Technologies Inc | $9.55 | + 23.39 ➤ Big Stock Move : Data analytics company Palantir Technologies jumped 23 percent on rosy profit forecasts for 2023. It was the firm's biggest one-day stock gain in more than two years. () ➤ Jenny Craig , once a popular weight-loss brand, has filed for bankruptcy and is liquidating its assets. The firm blamed the rise of weight-loss drugs and health-food stores for its demise. () ➤ Mattress giant Tempur Sealy has agreed to buy retailer Mattress Firm for $4 billion. The deal will give Tempur Sealy new growth opportunities through 3,000 retail outlets globally. () ➤ Wendy 's plans to use a Google-supplied AI chatbot to take drive-thru orders at a single Columbus, Ohio store. Diners beware: The experiment will require the chatbot to understand various accents ordering complex meal deals amid a jangle of car noise and conversation. () ➤ Virtual reality simulations may soon get smelly, say researchers who have developed tiny, wearable odor generators. They've already developed 30 odors--including durian--a fruit that smells like raw sewage. () ➤ Tesla broke ground on a massive new lithium refinery in Texas, and it's expected to become the biggest source of lithium in North America. CEO Elon Musk says the refinery should produce enough battery metal to power 1 million electric cars by 2025. () ➤ A TSA agent is under investigation for "rough handling" of a bomb-sniffing dog at Detroit airport, based on a video originally posted on Reddit. The agent appears to be training the dog while yanking roughly on his leash. () ➤ Robert De Niro, at 79, has become a father for the 7th time. This acclaimed actor's oldest child is 51, and his youngest (not counting the new baby) is 11. The baby's name and gender weren't released. () ➤ Satan Clubs for kids are gaining popularity as an after-school activity, and a federal court ruled that schools couldn't bar the clubs. The Satan Club doesn't actually worship the devil, according to its website, but rather exists to "encourage benevolence and empathy." (-) | Daily Quote | “This verdict is a disgrace. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Americans can vote out gun-crazy Republicans and stop these massacres, like voters in every other democracy have done. Getting out the Gen Z vote is our surest path to sane gun laws.
body:
The school-shooting-drill generation has had enough
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6d39f11-4e68-45a2-873c-ae694356a515/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The massacre in Allen, TX this past weekend was horrifying & heartbreaking. Those who lost their lives include a five-year old child, just beginning life.** _I'm not gonna go into statistics. I don't have the heart to. So, just three things:_ **1)** [**_We can stop this any time we elect enough Democrats. Democrats support the measures that have ended these tragedies in every other democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ff75473-8e9b-40e4-aa57-f802c70fab04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **2) _Because of the GOP, we aren't safe anywhere._** **_Houses of worship. Malls. Schools. Dance clubs. It's only getting worse._** **3) _Gen Z is, sadly, the school-shooting-drill generation._** **_They've had enough of this, and the past two elections it's been a top issue turning them out in record numbers, breaking electoral records._** **_Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape. Continuing to swell their presence at the polls is our only way to stop this utter madness._** [**_Will you join a heartbroken Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Voters of Tomorrow?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17172f1c-682c-4e82-a46b-f21b6eac7ef9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This. Must. End.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60348b87-fd3d-441d-84c6-c10be33d9bbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Dear Friend, **I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.**

**I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.**

But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.
**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. **Joining the Sun costs as little as $0.01 per day.** I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Cruise ships dumping wastewater in our oceans
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763892?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A malnourished, endangered Southern Resident orca loses her calf during pregnancy. The salmon she eats have been driven away.** **_A lonely polar bear treads miles over splintering ice, searching for her next meal. Her hunting grounds are melting._** **Dumped wastewater and toxic pollution FESTER in a delicately balanced ocean ecosystem.** This is just a taste of the devastation that corporate cruise companies leave in their wake. It's why we need your help, Friend. [**Act now to fight corporate cruise destruction!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763893?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Titanic cruise vessels charge through oceans and along our coasts, spewing **TOXIC POLLUTION,** dumping **ACIDIC WASTEWATER,** and sending **CLIMATE-WARMING EMISSIONS** into the atmosphere. Local communities are among those hit hardest -- facing air, water, and noise pollution that causes health problems and drives away the fish communities and marine life depend on. **It's past time the EPA reins in reckless cruise companies and their destructive pollution.[Please, Friend, STOP corporate cruise companies from unleashing even more havoc on ocean ecosystems and the Arctic by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763894?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**The cruise conglomerate Carnival Corp had to pay MILLIONS in fines for their criminal behavior and illegal wastewater dumping over the past several years.** These companies show little to no regard for the wildlife or ecosystems that make them so much money. It's past time we fight their greed.
People, polar bears, orcas, and entire ocean ecosystems. It's all at risk if the EPA doesn't act.
**This is YOUR CHANCE to fight back against corporate greed.** [**Tell the EPA to rein in corporate cruise companies and their toxic pollution and help us reach our goal of 17 more signatures from your area by 11:59 pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763896?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1763895?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Coach
subject: Expanding pathways to success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/747538b64f5639ae/e7c7e3f8720d3f23c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

I’ve been in education for 40 years, and here’s one big thing I’ve noticed: Our four-year universities, by and large, have become businesses, instead of institutions of learning where we get our young people prepared for a job.

I am fully committed to helping ensure we train kids for the future workforce – to teach them how to use their hands and their brains to achieve the American Dream.

**Three of my Republican colleagues and I introduced the _Training America’s Workforce Act_ last month to address this critical need, and we’re doing all we can to promote it.**

**[You can read a recent write-up HERE>>>

](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/747538b64f5639ae/ffe542e6d577def3c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**This legislation would require the Department of Labor to restart industry-recognized apprenticeship programs (IRAPs). These programs, designed to expand apprenticeship opportunities for students that align with in-demand job skills, were formalized when President Trump was in the White House but then ended by President Biden.

I’m fully committed to expanding pathways to success for our young people.

And these programs benefit ALL of us – we are facing a real and growing shortage of talent in so many important fields.

I’ll be sure to keep you posted on this bill’s progress as we work to move it forward.

\- Coach
---
[**READ MORE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/747538b64f5639ae/1763e0be2dae2263c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---

Dear Friends,

We have a few spots remaining for tomorrow evening's Meet & Greet in Chesdin Landing. Please RSVP as soon as you can, info below.

Also, we need volunteers to walk with my team and I in the Bon Air Day Parade, this Saturday, May 13. Meet us a little before 9:30am at Bon Air Baptist Church, 2531 Buford Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23235. Please let us know you are coming with a quick [email response to chris@chaseforva.com.](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)

Please sign-up today. We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Tucker Carlson says Josh Hawley isn’t a fraud and a coward…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18936?t=1001&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd ][IMG]

Some folks on cable news tried to claim Josh Hawley didn’t actually show
us he was a fraud and a coward on January 6th. So let’s get this straight,
Peter.

Josh Hawley didn’t just run away from the Capitol. He ran away from the
same people he raised his fist and claimed to be fighting for just hours
earlier.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18951?t=1002&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18951?t=1003&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd ]CHIP IN →

As a U.S. Marine, I took an oath to defend our democracy — just like Josh
Hawley when he was sworn into the U.S. Senate. But unlike him, I didn’t
break mine.

That’s why I’m running to replace him — so Missourians will have a real
warrior for working people standing up and fighting for them in
Washington. And it’s why I need your help today, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18951?t=1004&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd ]We don’t need any more frauds or cowards like Josh Hawley in the U.S.
Senate. Will you split a donation of $25 or anything at all between my
campaign and Charles Booker right now so we can defeat him, flip this
seat, and stand up for our democracy?

Thanks for standing with me,

— Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18952?t=1005&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd ]CHIP IN →

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230510-3222-footer&t=1006&refcode2=3222_346206_lSTXWd&akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3222%2E346206%2ElSTXWd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vslY_47DNm

That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our Kingdom to the Capitol
Tour, a series of live worship...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oslY_47DNm

Fellow
American,

Our
nation needs REVIVAL.

These are
dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we
need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for
victory.

That's
why TPUSA Faith has launched our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour -- a
series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over
the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL
in bible-believing Americans across the country!

We're
traveling from state to state and gathering tens of thousands of
believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and
invite his blessing on our great nation.

And we're
praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue
building momentum for this movement.

In fact,
we can't do it without you!

As a
friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can
I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important
initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or
whatever the Lord leads you to give today?

GIVE NOW
>>

Your
generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful
worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill
local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of
believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power
to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most.

Whether
it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools,
the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a
Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see
the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth
of scripture.

But
followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to
the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to
forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people.

And
that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we
seek His face in worship at these powerful events.

But we
can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and
much-needed gift right now?

Together,
we can make these the first of many thousands to have their
hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events.

Your
generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads
you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our
Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one
in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several
months.

GIVE NOW
>>

Right
now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin,
Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois;
Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more.

These
important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible
by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the
hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America.

These are
desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's
kingdom near.

That's
exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol
Tour.

Will you
please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for
the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of
our world?

Just
imagine the national revival that our great God could begin
through us!

God bless
you,

Charlie
Kirk
TPUSA
Faith

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: SIX DAYS: Pennsylvania’s Democratic state house majority is on the line as we count down to these special elections! MAGA Republicans are eager to reverse their losses last November and hold up Democratic Gov. Josh Shapiro’s agenda.
body:
Crucial swing state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dfa4e09-6315-43d2-acfd-74f5200e9b87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Folks, You Can Make A Huge Difference Today.** _In SIX DAYS there'll be 2 special elections in Pennsylvania to determine if we hold onto our state house majority--to protect democracy, abortion rights & enact gun safety--or lose it to a seditionist Republicans hostile to these essential rights._ [**_We have a 101-100 margin in the state house. Yet, if we lose both races, we'll be down 102-101. WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71515775-d713-434e-adfe-cf0d4aa0f95e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**There are 13 million Pennsylvanians who will suffer if we do. Worse yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics (see Silicon Valley Bank) don't recognize state lines. Tens of millions more Americans live in surrounding states like New York, Ohio and New Jersey. They too, will suffer.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8c927dd-3ae2-4a19-931c-0b7b8baecd6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Please, for the liberty of these tens of millions--and all Americans--support Democrats Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn's, who'll block the permitless carry of guns to protect our children fron the insanity we just saw in the Allen, TX mall._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to fight for our basic rights, instead of letting MAGA Republicans force dictatorial policies on so many of us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T677b3dd0-67fa-4485-a370-736a5c5d7176/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25fdf8a5-c0ec-4bde-9412-6f36274259dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | Peter,

It’s no secret that Marjorie Taylor Greene is rising in power, rapidly rocketing to the upper echelons of the GOP. She sits on some of the most important House committees and she’s even _**a potential VP pick for Donald Trump!**_

That begs the question: What is she doing with her power?
* She’s working to **ban abortion nationwide!**
* She’s spreading atrocious lies about Joe Biden and parroting horrific conspiracy theories.
* She wants unlimited access to deadly guns like AR-15s, **which would make America’s mass shooting epidemic even worse!**
* She supports the GOP’s plan to gut Social Security and Medicare, **all so they can give tax cuts to their ultra-wealthy friends.**
* And maybe worst of all, **she wants to end our democracy by putting MAGA extremists in charge of our elections!**

But here’s some good news: **We have the power to stop Marjorie Taylor Greene!**

If everyone reading this email chips in right now, we can strengthen our organizing capacity ahead of 2024 and keep Georgia, Congress, AND the White House blue. If we do that, then we can kick MTG off her committees, make sure she gets nowhere near the White House, **and defeat MAGA extremism once and for all.**

But we can _**only**_ do this with your help.

[**_So, we’re asking you as a top member of our grassroots team to please pitch in right now to help us defeat MTG and save our democracy._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63066852/405492352/-1313339816?refcode=20230510.1_GADems_5S&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTMwZDhkOC0zMmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIo5Py-jh8I8u4oc2sYgKyVbqCgG78t6H2GXfPDM13Q=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, I wanted to make sure you heard about our Fight for the Commonwealth Tour that kicks off this afternoon! Come out and join Daniel and other great conservatives as we rally through Election Day this Tuesday. We hope you will join us at any of the following stops: | | With just under a week until Election Day we need each and every one of you to vote, recruit your friends, attend a Fight for the Commonwealth Tour stop, donate to the campaign, and share this message with your friends. This is crunch time and we need your help! Now is the time to stand up for our Kentucky Values and Take Back the Commonwealth! name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: My life as a Navy Special Operations Officer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
Land of the free, because of the brave.| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVKF807xdiMFmshbn5OzafHqAv_4TC5hcEVAtP0biM_bzGVlZAhFFBhpLnDKAOboG8FnQJ99WghdMCubCnmKdlk5nrKgZqBePV1TaG6MZNYKiDOPtEHEGo6CawLcvapB4FAQIIhJtqmyvdKlDmh_rD1U%3D)
---
I want to be clear about what I did for our country, because in this day and age, censorship and disinformation pollute our daily lives.

I served America in the war against terrorism. I was a Navy special operations officer that I disarmed terrorist Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs) in Afghanistan and Iraq before they could harm my brothers and sisters in arms.

Unfortunately, my life in the military seems simple compared to the minefield of political correctness that we’ve all been navigating in what is _supposed_ to be the land of the free. [**That’s why I’m reaching out to you, and asking for your help.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVG_bej3VGnBx76MYuIjzRYehs3oa0J70U1p_dOyQ_S89YHbNOp3ZMR11V15v6Gyq3B5JVCksoPDcWF6pZez-KpB5fk9jVvUbTtT4lhEv52R3DhKipD-N6tyPgtQoBj48icYRoaQobtyyTPfQMLsqzkc%3D)
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO >> **](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVDYuZvoYxWbEqNQh04AQvxzBZMZFAdXPaOj9TBHNz3htE2JC5fBJONtlwjlAfNLS8Qo5jh81hcQwK-ywWlZws4B2fhvm_iktKH31odqX-x1a8rQng8leZ1BrETSDJbxtQFAN0oddF1X68vrONKuvrg0%3D)
---
In this world we live in today, honesty and facts are being met with violence, censorship, or being “canceled” for simply stating things like “America is the greatest country in the world” or questioning the woke radical politics being pushed on us and our children.

**But you know what, I don’t mind being canceled if it means standing up to these unhinged radical politics, because my duty is to God, Country, and Family.

** If you feel the same way I do, then I need your help to dismantle the left-wing politics that they have planted everywhere in our society from schools to courtrooms.
**[Please chip in any support you can, even just $10 or $20 to help me kick the radical liberals out of Congress and elect REAL, so we can end the woke politics and get our nation back on track.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVABce0qTjsjapjk44Vh5xKOzul9q1Ow82q4Eo9Yyv6Biyzv4pt9CUMOZcT1OzSOPyLHzb9lNOH2W2c9g6MuBlND4p01Ud5OLzjcjrYcGfWmilfS8Q8Mh6prlcnqz5WaI08kGW_qGAVHWqFsCsBp1Dq4%3D)**
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO >> **](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVGgGYgfLDR-dtcNdv227F4cRqFMsyOOcdSCs_cfhTlXcloCGMG9qDEGmQ0jmfZoDkjczeISHKm36Ca44rBsVPcOTePRPh-tarRf62y6mWr3_3Zw7JW8rAn7lPGI-5tfRzk8mgthFwORUwQ2zzbkAH7c%3D)
---
We have so much riding on this, and I can’t win this battle without support from patriots like _you_.

**[Please stand with me today and help me restore the America we know and love.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7d163aef45184888ada07e1e2f371361&_e=17Z5lk-gxhr0pzioUjuHRqehqYj56XDNCWCLhaPVNkeRnQ4Jvxv-egIxX61rXWdlfCXGB40wzw6AJ6ibEB8p0v1CPn9pDIL-gb7mzIbqVQjvmt8e4WAB1n2e1_oFlMhevC-mYeGz11cjhxnIpY5A0KqYdON6unXJ1BtQ1Mj67_TNn-lzhbyJgWxgCRkCqPbOUx7MJgj657osFyeiZkQwVFNL9G91QnOKVO7k7FiftceXARoUCqN3AnoEBCIaOCQsh-jg9pNbjOQ5WlkSeJRft9aV_mMHJ5aufvqTuz0Vo-b6LY19q_tk_OxYAgsGevOe3rr33ytkOO5wis4pCDVKXaQhc5cAM7Au3rjK9cT_tSE%3D)** Thank you,
---

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

subject: Sign the petition: Expel George Santos from Congress (He was charged with 13 crimes!)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | BREAKING: Rep. George Santos arrested on federal criminal charges including wire fraud, money laundering -AP NEWS [Sign the petition: Tell Congress to EXPEL George Santos IMMEDIATELY >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T67fd3ab7-66ee-411a-a720-a96de0f611e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | There have already been more than enough reasons to expel George Santos from Congress – but this one takes the cake. He was just arrested and charged with 13 crimes relating to wire fraud, money laundering, and more. Santos may well be the biggest liar ever to be a member of Congress, and that's saying a lot. Up until this point, George Santos has refused to resign, so we need Congress to expel him. The House can do it with a 2/3 vote. And [a number of Republican members](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9c17057-0a7a-4bd1-ab84-08918e53da0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) are now calling for his ouster, so this can happen, if we keep up the pressure! [We don’t need another mini-Trump in Congress. Tell Congress to expel George Santos NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c5304b3-2350-424a-ad14-f1200a4db7da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
