name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he’s ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden’s Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden’s Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79277%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f2KLWOlTL5%2b54IvjO44Q9w&sysid=1)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79278%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WJ7OkOtGvpDI2dA6KrPS1w&sysid=1)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79279%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x7WpNZMddO0H4NS8ZCgmyQ&sysid=1 "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN’S AMNESTY PLAN](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79270%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OeYmSYHBtq%2bWG2dv4%2fxirg&sysid=1)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79271%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xoDluXnHMC5YdSC5tmWyhw&sysid=1)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots. | | Thank you for your time and patriotic support, | Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

subject: BREAKING: Tracy Creates IL GOP Endorsement Committee
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Illinois Republican Party during the 2022 Illinois Primary, using a fake photo with Democrat Gov
body:
Catching many GOP leaders by surprise, IL GOP Chair Don Tracy secretly creates Endorsement Committee in attempt to block grassroots candidates.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/fd85e8fa77aa/breaking-tracy-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Don Tracy Secretly Creates IL GOP Endorsement Committee in Attempt to Block Grassroots from Winning Future Primary Elections, Catching GOP Leaders by Surprise (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former State Rep. Tom Demmer, left; IL GOP chairman Don Tracy; Lynn O'Brien, a Tracy and Irvin ally and supporter; and former gubernatorial candidate and Aurora Mayor Richard Irvin, right, at the GOP luncheon on Feb. 14, 2013 in downtown Chicago.

Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy caught some of his fellow state central committee (SSC) members off guard this week when several of them received an email naming them to the new Endorsement Policy Committee, which Tracy will chair – paving the way for the chairman and the state party to officially endorse their preferred candidates in primary elections, in an apparent dig at the grassroots-base of the party.

In January, Tracy floated this idea during an interview with Bishop on Air, and blamed the top of the ticket for the midterm election losses this past November – saying that the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward.

“And a lot of these great candidates we had this past time put their heart and soul and their family treasure into these races only to be impacted by the top of the ticket, something they have no control over...So I think we almost have a fiduciary duty to look at our primary and determine whether neutrality is the best policy.”

https://youtu.be/O6DHuWDOgrI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP chair Don Tracy joins Bishop on Air to discuss why the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their neutrality policy in primary elections.

And while Tracy may think it’s good policy for the state party to meddle in primary races, multiple sources have confirmed to Illinois Review that not everyone on this new committee he’s chairing supports the idea.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review has obtained an email sent by the IL GOP that included the new Endorsement Policy Committee chaired by chair Don Tracy, in a move that caught the committee members by surprise.

And they have good reason to oppose it – after all, during the last primary election, IL GOP-favored candidate for governor Richard Irvin, the mayor of Aurora, lost by a shocking 43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , despite $50 million (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2022-election/illinois-gops-50-million-primary-debacle-rcna35534?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) coming in from billionaire Ken Griffin to prop up the mayor’s failed gubernatorial campaign.

Irvin also received the support and endorsements from many senior IL GOP officials, including nearly half of the then-SSC – whose members serve as the governing board of the IL GOP.

But none of that helped, or moved him any closer to a victory.

The real winners in the Irvin campaign? The paid
political consultants (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/why-a-grading-scale-for-political-campaign-consultants-to-include-online-reviews-and-star-ratings-can-help-candidates-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and vendors.

But make no mistake – Tracy despises the grassroots – and he views the conservative base of the party as “
steerage (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” or third-class citizens, to borrow an analogy from the blockbuster hit movie, Titanic.

And it’s why he’s created this new committee to officially prop up the candidates that he wants to support and who oppose grassroot candidates.

In Tracy’s mind – if you’re a
major donor (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to IL GOP efforts, then you deserve a seat next to him in his first-class cabin with views of the ocean – dining (https://www.history.com/news/last-meal-on-titanic?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on foie gras, raw oysters, Waldorf pudding and sipping on fine wine.

But if you’re a member of the grassroots – you can take your seat in the “steerage” below deck with views of the engine and boiler rooms, dining on vegetable stew and stale biscuits.

But while the grassroots cannot compete with Tracy and top IL GOP donors dollar for dollar, they vastly outnumber the establishment, and they are the hardest workers in politics. They’ll make thousands of phone calls, drop off signs and knock on doors – rain or shine – in the summertime and wintertime.

They cannot be stopped.

All the political connections and money in the world couldn’t save Richard Irvin’s campaign – and much to the frustration of Tracy, the grassroots proved to be unbeatable during the primary election cycle.

Just imagine for a moment, how negative races will become if Tracy and the state party are allowed to intervene and pick sides during primaries.

This last primary election cycle, we saw the state party
endorse (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) vicious mailers that unfairly attacked grassroots candidates – even mailing pieces with photoshopped pictures of grassroot candidates alongside Gov. JB Pritzker to deliberately deceive Republican primary voters into thinking that these “so-called” Republicans are personal friends with the Democratic governor.

“He’s not a Republican. He’s not one of us,” was a popular tagline in hit pieces that Tracy’s allies used to target grassroots candidates.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of a mailer attacking Republican conservative grassroots candidate Travis Weaver paid for by the Illinois Republican Party during the 2022 Illinois Primary, using a fake photo with Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

In another mailer, Tracy and the state party violated the Republican Party of Illinois Platform (https://illinois.gop/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/2020PlatformoftheIllinoisRepublicanParty.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by paying for, and mailing out a pro-choice mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in support of their preferred candidate for DuPage County board chair.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A copy of a pro-choice mailer mailed by the Illinois Republican Party in support of Republican DupPage County Chair candidate Greg Hart during the 2022 Illinois Midterm Election.

Without a platform – there isn’t a party.

And where was Tracy? He was silent.

During the December
SSC meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-rips-mic-away-from-minority-grassroots-leader-during-gop-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the grassroots were only given 90-seconds to speak during public comments – and many drove hours just for their voices (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-disrespects-grassroots-creating-outreach-committee-to-pretend-they-care.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to be heard. But if you were a friend and ally of Tracy, you could speak beyond the allotted time.

And the SSC meeting this Saturday is no different – and Tracy continues to try and silence the voices of the grassroots during the public comment section of the meeting.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review has obtained a copy of the agenda for Saturday’s SSC meeting where Tracy will formally present the new Endorsement Policy Committee, which he chairs.

In an email obtained by Illinois Review, Tracy’s executive director and top aide sent out an email to SSC members with the following message, copying Tracy:

“For public comments, it will be invitation only at the direction of SCC members. SCC members are allowed to invite one speaker. Public commentators must register with me by 6PM the day before the meeting – Friday, May 12, 2023.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review has obtained an email sent by the executive director of the IL GOP that limits public comment from the grassroots and others during the upcoming SCC meeting.

Since his election as chair of the IL GOP in 2021, Tracy has overseen humiliating defeats (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/power-vs-the-people-the-arrogance-of-the-il-gop-despite-massive-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that prompted both Republican House and Senate leaders to resign (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-resigning-says-trump-republicans-2nd-amendment-and-pro-life-issues-dragged-gop-down-in-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) after November’s election losses (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Democrats control every statewide office, and they grew their supermajority control in both the Illinois House and Senate chambers.

And in
April (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-silent-abandons-republican-school-board-candidates-while-il-democratic-party-funds-school-board-races-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , the Democrats’ winning streak (https://www.politico.com/news/2023/04/17/gop-school-board-races-midwest-00092232?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) continued – as they won an overwhelming majority of local races and school board elections as their domination of the state continues year after year, election after election – leaving Republicans voiceless and irrelevant on local and state matters.

Multiple Republican leaders have shared with Illinois Review privately that Tracy’s weak leadership and the continuation of GOP losses have had a serious impact on their ability to raise money for the state party.

And while Tracy brags about the measly
$2.2 million (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) they raised over the last two years, not one penny was spent in support of conservative grassroot candidates.

During that same time frame, the Indiana GOP raised $10 million – proving that competent leadership and a solid plan to incorporate the grassroots is critical to raising money and winning elections.

The last time the IL GOP tried to tell us which candidate to support during the primary, that campaign went down in flames.

Perhaps
Tracy (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-its-time-for-il-gop-chairman-don-tracy-to-resign-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) will never learn this lesson – and it’s one of many reasons why it’s time for him to go.

Tracy can learn from the grassroots. Third class citizens they are not – the future of the party, they are.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f9f2e7805-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_10_01_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f9f2e7805-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

subject: Protect Women's Sports!

body:
| | | [>> Biological Men In Women's Sports? << ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=672a566af5994b749a4db34e16de8851&_e=eOe71Dy61O2QeHnZLw0LnaO_s1GL3i3nprUIT_IcdeLdauVgBkLLlF6nMNXMmjeHlfGAVoFrChQa5Noz5-McZTqsnlLPO2-Px2mZ6FZSdU8D1z17yk1QXC9-X2uLGyoL28_i-IaI06EIS_y-0ornD-R0MCDzfBeu_anySOlxBK7WkQ0j8VWfxEdLj1fX_QG6IfX97CeE9KRBNDar7JxXJOJdb-u0afKZ3VpTk1tWLQ7ITLynWM6hWE6s_Djap2fh)
---
It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. _**As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.**__**⬇️**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=672a566af5994b749a4db34e16de8851&_e=eOe71Dy61O2QeHnZLw0LnaO_s1GL3i3nprUIT_IcdeLdauVgBkLLlF6nMNXMmjeHlfGAVoFrChQa5Noz5-McZTqsnlLPO2-Px2mZ6FZSdU-mo-j3PAca96XC12npdFvfUJW9DFvJn-8duclfdEUsrEhaQtstpgMxzJNHxobiWWLpBeB0_TTV4hI8s4-Zlrx5A1ALoFHFZiwijzvSGXswASnhLKw8F3a9VEKQbQpSUlWAiHtsP2iSJPh0mD9vB9k5)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chuck=20Rocha?=
subject: Support and Vote for Our Nominees in the 2nd Annual Powerful IDEA Awards
body:
Support and Vote for Our Nominees in the 2nd Annual Powerful IDEA Awards | | | |
---
| **Support and Vote for Our Nominees in the 2nd Annual Powerful IDEA Awards**
#
---
|
---
| | |
### Dear friends,
At Solidarity Strategies, we're excited to announce that our very own organization and clients have been nominated for the prestigious Powerful IDEA Awards by [GAIN POWER](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=2240288d03&e=b8f90417f9). As one of our valued friends and followers, we wanted to reach out and ask for your support in helping us secure this well-deserved recognition.

The Powerful IDEA (Impact on Democracy, Elections, Advocacy) Awards are GAIN POWER’s new progressive political communications & leadership awards. The Powerful IDEA Awards are designed to recognize the most impactful people, organizations, technology, communications, and other resources that power progressive politics, advocacy, and our democracy. To cast your vote for our nominees, simply click [HERE](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=859231d426&e=b8f90417f9) and follow the instructions to submit your vote. We would greatly appreciate your support in voting for the following nominees:
* Equis Lab for New Organization Making Impact
* Shelli Jackson for Campaign Manager of the Year
* Zohaib “Zo” Qadri for Municipal Candidate of the Year
* Rafa Collazo for Transformational Leader
* Solidarity Strategies for Leading Through A Racial Equity Lens
* The Latino Vote Podcast with Mike Madrid & Chuck Rocha for Creative Communications and Content- Podcast
* Solidarity Strategies for El Chavo Mailer for Creative Communications and Content- Mailer
* BOLD PAC for Rep. Maxwell Alejandro Frost for Congress for Creative Communications and Content- Video
* UnidosUS Action PAC - Adrian Fontes for Creative Communications and Content- Radio

Additionally, we invite you to join us at the award ceremony on June 6th at the Capital Turnaround in Washington DC. Please register to attend [HERE](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=fd6bb3491c&e=b8f90417f9) and celebrate with us as we recognize the amazing achievements of our fellow nominees. Thank you for your ongoing support and encouragement. We're grateful for your partnership and look forward to continuing to work together to make a positive impact in our community.
Best regards, Chuck Rocha Solidarity Strategies

---
| | | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=9b29b127a0&e=b8f90417f9)

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj3hs88tqnstuutn5rq7e3tvdp7lop9le5fevmlg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctgm8or2chh2bs)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvlh0crjuaaln6gg290rr9s8j683ho8n11up0d0o_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctgm8or2chh2bs)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6rtpvfqplm3u7s3m6upl6b4jhphe05nk8qaqasg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctgm8or2chh2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

name: Our Time To Run Team

# You know there is better. Be a part of it.
---
You see the need in every aspect of your community. We can do better for each other, but where do we start. Nonpartisan political offices may offer a comfortable way into political leadership for those who may be uncomfortable identifying with specific political parties. When we talk about nonpartisan political offices, we're referring to positions where political parties don't officially endorse or support candidates. These can include positions such as school board members, city council members, or mayors. Running for nonpartisan offices is important for a few reasons. Firstly, nonpartisan offices tend to focus more on local issues and problem-solving rather than on national political debates. This means that the work you do as a nonpartisan elected official can have a more direct impact on your community.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://nje015.keap-link016.com/v2/click/19afa52badfb57f3c5a9863ee65a5544/eJyNj0ELgkAQRv_LnCXNTMqbiMhieYg6h-hAazq7bGMg4n9vs-hU0Hne94Y3AiOVxKKGCKhBb7kGBwxWUkskThRxWc3XYOWHngOtpGtmVK8hGr9uP8A8Ch3gQaMFjoc4yUWRnXeiyC2nS2Mf_GXxt8tN8BGl-1jsYJp-mrGTnN6t_AYRmx6fPbW0TXwyreUvzPoWua7qDcsOWZmeFpXq3EZJsvtSa6T6nZ7j8LJMD9RKYcU=)

**Find Your Voice** **Assume Political Leadership Roles** **Move The Country Forward**
---
[ Learn More ]()
---
|

# **It all starts with your voice; your vision of better.**
---
|
---
Holding a nonpartisan elected position can provide you with valuable experience and name recognition that can make it easier for you to win a more competitive political race in the future. In a nonpartisan elected position, you will gain valuable experience working in government and collaborating with other elected officials. This experience can help you build a strong record of accomplishments and develop important skills such as negotiation, policy development, and community outreach. By working hard and delivering results for your constituents, you can earn the trust and support of the community, which can be invaluable in a more competitive race. Running for a nonpartisan position can help you develop a strong network of supporters and volunteers who can help you in future campaigns. By building relationships with community members, activists, and other elected officials, you can create a powerful network of allies who can help you get out the vote and build momentum for your future campaigns.

At Our Time To Run, we believe that every political race is an opportunity to make a positive difference in your community. Whether you're running for a nonpartisan position or a more competitive race, we are here to help you develop the skills and strategies you need to succeed.
---
So if you're thinking about running for office, don't be afraid to start small. Running for a nonpartisan position can be a great way to build experience, develop skills, and lay the foundation for a successful political career.

| | Friend, A short time ago, I challenged George Soros to meet with me and victims of violent crime. _Not surprisingly, he hasn 't taken me up on the offer._ He hasn't had the chance to hear their testimonies or the utter pain and anguish they feel. He hasn't had a chance to hear the horrific cries of a mother who lost a child because of the most senseless reason: _her child 's killer was released from prison when he should have been behind bars._ **Friend , there's not an anguish quite like that - and it's why being a voice for victims is a very personal issue for me. ** **[Will you chip in now to stand with victims of violent crime and against the Soros-funded criminal-first, victim-last policies taking hold across the nation?](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=71cf6e21ae061ae6b3387ed3b028d49dea0633844711952b62fe7789ae88aa1a3eeba60bce3b5c772fdbe5d30237bf356a463203d382aafb "Will you chip in now to stand with victims of violent crime and against the Soros-funded criminal-first, victim-last policies taking hold across the nation?")** I know we can be a voice for the voiceless. **[I hope you'll join me.](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=71cf6e21ae061ae63aa3540837bb7e2d60f2081339d6d66471f63d8f2494e7d6e91a301ddf8d290a89843b5ad104ae9c9df2f6b6ca6529ff "I hope you'll join me.")** Thanks,
Jason Sent from my iPhone

name: Bill Spadea
subject: The Dems fail again
body:
Peter, When politicians fail, leave it to a U.S. Marine to solve the problem. New York City and many cities across our coun
|
---
| Peter, When politicians fail, leave it to a U.S. Marine to solve the problem. **New York City and many cities across our country are becoming increasingly dangerous for innocent families and commuters.** Recently, a homeless man with mental illness and a long history of criminal activity, Jordan Neely, started threatening strap-hangers on the New York City subway. Thankfully a U.S. Marine on the train ended the dangerous situation by restraining Neely, who later died. Instead of recognizing the quick action that potentially averted a disaster on the train, the woke-mob and complicit media want to turn the criminal into the victim. Instead of recognizing that the failed justice and mental health system allowed Neely was to slip through the cracks for more than a decade, the woke mob disparages the Marine. Instead of recognizing that Neely had more than 40 prior arrests (including 4 for violent assault), the woke mob wants to stir up racial tensions and further divide us. They want to blame innocent people for defending themselves instead of addressing and punishing the criminals.
It’s clear Adams, Murphy and the Democrats have failed their citizens again and again, then distort reality when problems arise. In fact, don't let the far left media's distortedly angelic portrayal of Neely fool you—just 2 years ago he socked a 67-year-old woman hard enough to break her nose and fracture her skull as she exited a subway station.
These situations could have been prevented if Jordan Neely, a troubled man with a history of mental illness and violent assault on subway riders, was behind bars or in a mental institution. **The bottom line is that when public safety isn't taken seriously, it forces citizens (like the hero Marine on the subway) to step up and take matters into their own hands.** It's just common sense, right? If the politicians continue to shackle law enforcement and politicize public safety, citizens will surely rise up and take matters into their own hands. If all of this is ringing true for you, then **[we invite you to join the Common Sense Club](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/681d281148bb84f371d2ca4973642eb9/eJyNkMEKgkAQht9lzpa6FoW3iAjRPESdY9Ept3Rd1jEr8d1bKzwVdP3nm2_4pwVCySUFKfhwowdjHligMRFKoKRlKYknrymbTlzPtSAX8rLWZa3Ab78uD0Afu44ztYDuCg2y2y6WYRCvD1EQh4ZUXJsbf3nm7mzQrDaLIIKu--nFQtDqatQV-KRr7AulwpSivc4NnxGpyrftpmnG51JIyvAoThkxh3njpCzsPhxhwUVubFwplOnnEyHe387uCcucZr0=)** —an organization of like-minded Americans fighting to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond. Needless to say, it's common sense that violent criminals should be behind bars, not free to roam the streets after 42 arrests and repeated violent crimes.

clean_body: Peter, When politicians fail, leave it to a U.S. Marine to solve the problem. New York City and many cities across our coun | | Peter, When politicians fail, leave it to a U.S. Marine to solve the problem. New York City and many cities across our country are becoming increasingly dangerous for innocent families and commuters. Recently, a homeless man with mental illness and a long history of criminal activity, Jordan Neely, started threatening strap-hangers on the New York City subway. Thankfully a U.S. Marine on the train ended the dangerous situation by restraining Neely, who later died. Instead of recognizing the quick action that potentially averted a disaster on the train, the woke-mob and complicit media want to turn the criminal into the victim. Instead of recognizing that the failed justice and mental health system allowed Neely was to slip through the cracks for more than a decade, the woke mob disparages the Marine. Instead of recognizing that Neely had more than 40 prior arrests (including 4 for violent assault), the woke mob wants to stir up racial tensions and further divide us. They want to blame innocent people for defending themselves instead of addressing and punishing the criminals. It’s clear Adams, Murphy and the Democrats have failed their citizens again and again, then distort reality when problems arise. In fact, don't let the far left media's distortedly angelic portrayal of Neely fool you—just 2 years ago he socked a 67-year-old woman hard enough to break her nose and fracture her skull as she exited a subway station. These situations could have been prevented if Jordan Neely, a troubled man with a history of mental illness and violent assault on subway riders, was behind bars or in a mental institution. The bottom line is that when public safety isn't taken seriously, it forces citizens (like the hero Marine on the subway) to step up and take matters into their own hands. It's just common sense, right? If the politicians continue to shackle law enforcement and politicize public safety, citizens will surely rise up and take matters into their own hands. If all of this is ringing true for you, then = —an organization of like-minded Americans fighting to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Breaking news: George Santos criminally charged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Will House Republican leadership still defend him? |
#
---
Breaking news, Peter, **Federal prosecutors have just filed criminal charges against GOP Rep. George Santos.** After bombshell reports detailed dozens of Santos’ lies, including glaringly suspicious omissions and contradictions in his campaign finance disclosures, I have been working hard to hold him accountable. I filed a complaint with the House Ethics Committee, which soon after launched an official investigation into his misconduct, and I introduced the _SANTOS Act_ to ensure no political candidate could ever lie so egregiously to voters as he did. Santos was charged with seven counts of wire fraud, three counts of money laundering, one count of theft of public funds, and two counts of making materially false statements to the House of Representatives. As a former prosecutor, there were glaring red lights in Santos’s financial disclosures, and I applaud the DOJ for working diligently to investigate them. **But will House Republican leadership ever answer why they colluded with George Santos to defraud voters in NY-3 in the first place? And will they immediately eliminate the stain of Santos on this hallowed institution by removing him from Congress?** **[That this is even a question speaks volumes about how critical it is that we flip Santos’ seat, take back New York for Democrats, and win the House majority in 2024. They also join a powerful network of alumni who are pushing for progress in their communities, from the local school board all the way to U.S. Congress. But time is running out! The deadline to apply for the Boot Camp is fast approaching, and you don't want to miss this opportunity to apply or share this with someone who should run for office in 2023 or 2024. Applications are due on Monday, May 15th, so Best regards, Ryanne Olsen Emerge Training and Curriculum Director P.S. The ultimate compliment is telling an inspiring woman in your life she should run for office. Forward this message to someone who should run in 2023 or 2024! Empowering Democratic women to run - and win! Paid for by Emerge 818 Connecticut Ave NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:

| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=067fe39c24ae48c1a432de50a5b92c55&_e=XQ5l9IsdVkbc3jWCTwE-bUhL7gAdUJwKr3tqSfFzK36XnmuVEgaJZEQv3hT1k_chdzzhO7M3Cd_Nup5aA1Upam0pnfIrApQfGmw7VAJjPPa23PaaZzfl16IXotsF7CssMVR0yHOgToxGiOHsXxqqXufBMj-X2xyYQQTJLnTUo9P0CZctempo4z5Mnu-r5GshOsqrjYLyRnBbcMjP4Utr-WkNDage7teBt_J3icGfBbE0hqg4XhENk9JSbIT71-51Uj7ZUIeWzxMF3tY7XBPYbY3S04AL0ZwR0RS4riD6bwm2MAK3Z6ZF8vvq3-uDQCZVLRY56MKmzqb20h8MrTdNNKw_n6riBxEtfAFdUgV9oC2rSlmoc29w25cbwpdqX702iOdee85oxvN0vxtZpnsjm3JNtxkAYQo6byiBZsOa5S704Pe8wqNnDOZAPlt7jL1AzrKKJpTUdiBnmZfao7v0GeIzFdCL3Tt8fTZYUc4vb0w%3D)
---
Friend,
---
The Biden administration is planning to send 1,500 armed troops to the U.S.-Mexico border in expectation of mass border crossings once Title 42 expires on May 11th, 2023.
---
This move is clearly out of desperation as migrant convoys in the tens of thousands have accumulated at major crossing points in Mexico. **A border rush of more than 1,000 Venezuelans already shuttered a major El Paso crossing point last month.**
---
This chaos has made it easier to smuggle fentanyl into our communities, wreaking havoc on Wisconsin families. I set up a flash poll to get your most up-to-date opinions on this important issue.
---
**[Will you take my Flash Poll and help me clear the air about what America really thinks about Joe Biden and his Democrats’ performance so far regarding our border >>📈](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=067fe39c24ae48c1a432de50a5b92c55&_e=XQ5l9IsdVkbc3jWCTwE-bUhL7gAdUJwKr3tqSfFzK36XnmuVEgaJZEQv3hT1k_chdzzhO7M3Cd_Nup5aA1Upam0pnfIrApQfGmw7VAJjPPa23PaaZzfl16IXotsF7CssMVR0yHOgToxGiOHsXxqqXufBMj-X2xyYQQTJLnTUo9P0CZctempo4z5Mnu-r5GshOsqrjYLyRnBbcMjP4Utr-WkNDage7teBt_J3icGfBbE0hqg4XhENk9JSbIT71-51Uj7ZUIeWzxMF3tY7XBPYbY3S04AL0ZwR0RS4riD6bwm2MAK3Z6ZF8vvq3-uDQCZVxAIvwN7g38QNx5jEBMpZ-y8tWQZQQQK4Bxcb0v0xpVH7hz46OiNPTXlyUqJA5mcS41TycUCAkaH3EnQO62BAn5U1PLjqH5h8PQ8DRMhS1AF6cYZd-8vewbIxpexRqXxha0ndSAAy4U9_30j-yVkVfWrq_6vjAsHRmWDzeqJXkcQ%3D)**
---

**Official Border Poll**
**Participant:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Status:** Pending **Deadline: 5/09 @ 11:15 P.M. ** **[TAKE THE POLL](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=067fe39c24ae48c1a432de50a5b92c55&_e=XQ5l9IsdVkbc3jWCTwE-bUhL7gAdUJwKr3tqSfFzK36XnmuVEgaJZEQv3hT1k_chdzzhO7M3Cd_Nup5aA1Upam0pnfIrApQfGmw7VAJjPPa23PaaZzfl16IXotsF7CssMVR0yHOgToxGiOHsXxqqXufBMj-X2xyYQQTJLnTUo9P0CZctempo4z5Mnu-r5GshOsqrjYLyRnBbcMjP4Utr-WkNDage7teBt_J3icGfBbE0hqg4XhENk9JSbIT71-51Uj7ZUIeWzxMF3tY7XBPYbY3S04AL0ZwR0RS4riD6bwm2MAK3Z6ZF8vvq3-uDQCZV6kpBShqxXtMSHJzXiX7woUMhW1qtRLIycsWINf0-aVxy5Uzmbdhhm2MfcwGeH_vjn_BR-2L5sMa4h2maD2npegWMII46h-7rytOQsh14lvyRu-y-uG4xI1S89EX6QFjrCrAfMpD8eHJfmOhon2vR-3CuFA5w05kLhMAQOH410c0%3D)**
---

_With Republicans back in the majority, one of our top priorities is to strengthen Americans’ trust in border security and _stop the chaos that allows fentanyl to be smuggled into our communities.__
---
Last year, I held a roundtable focused on fighting fentanyl with the Rock County Sheriff, local police departments, the High-Intensity Drug Trafficking Areas Program (HIDTA), and local medical experts in Janesville.
---
The issues at our border are impacting us all, not just the communities in the southwest. That is why I want to hear directly from you.
---
**[Please take my official Border Poll to tell me how you feel about the efforts to protect our Borders and stop the chaos down there from affecting the communities up here >>](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=067fe39c24ae48c1a432de50a5b92c55&_e=XQ5l9IsdVkbc3jWCTwE-bUhL7gAdUJwKr3tqSfFzK36XnmuVEgaJZEQv3hT1k_chdzzhO7M3Cd_Nup5aA1Upam0pnfIrApQfGmw7VAJjPPa23PaaZzfl16IXotsF7CssMVR0yHOgToxGiOHsXxqqXufBMj-X2xyYQQTJLnTUo9P0CZctempo4z5Mnu-r5GshOsqrjYLyRnBbcMjP4Utr-WkNDage7teBt_J3icGfBbE0hqg4XhENk9JSbIT71-51Uj7ZUIeWzxMF3tY7XBPYbY3S04AL0ZwR0RS4riD6bwm2MAK3Z6ZF8vvq3-uDQCZVcuzuV65NbNHonGH276lFsKkw-TOPlV4dmqDR2kxOOpkeGOZ_4g4dfnYPiwtRlRivEudEc8knhitfLh-QaWEI5K7EcLKy4MoxNzA5Y8TH6tEBqFRsjimrJyEiUnGrWziAgoQ6yNcg9g0AuZXbPLenHK3eZ-CF7wIw-KNuP9-H5cU%3D)**
---
Thank you,
---

subject: Would you like to join my mailing list?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133040?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Each Saturday morning, I send you an email update about the liberty movement in our state. **I hope you find it informative?

**Last month, I’m delighted to say that our weekly email was opened and read 209,774 times around the state. **

In addition, I also send out regular mailings to folks from Corinth to the Coast to keep them informed about our efforts to advance the cause of liberty.

If you are not yet on my mailing list, but would like to receive these too, please reply to this email with your mailing address. I will then add you to my list.....

Here is an example of our most recent mailing. Click on the link below to read it.

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fd4882a2c1&e=5703353baa)
---
| **Being on our mailing list is a great way to keep in touch with what we are doing, as Mississippi’s free market think tank, to campaign for lower taxes, less government and American exceptionalism.**

I think you might really like to get our regular mailings!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4ed2a4721e&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| | |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. If you have friends that might like to get my Saturday email, why not forward this to them too – and suggest they sign up?**
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=13e3c5a9c1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=13e3c5a9c1).

name: Giffords.org
subject: Texans deserve better than Governor Greg Abbott
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
More than 31,000 Texans have died from gun violence since Greg Abbott took office.
#

Friends -
Texans deserve better than Governor Greg Abbott. More than 31,000 Texans have died from gun violence since Greg Abbott took office in 2015. It’s a massive failure of leadership.
And if that isn’t alarming enough, here’s what Governor Abbott was doing just hours after the most recent tragedy in Allen, TX on Saturday.
On Monday morning he went to talk about border security, criticize President Joe Biden and appear live on Fox News. A few hours later he was breaking ground on a new Tesla facility with Elon Musk.
Never once did he mention the tragedy in Allen.
It’s shameful that elected leaders like Greg Abbott are turning a blind eye and pretending these tragedies aren’t happening.
We can’t just keep looking away and pretending like this isn’t happening in our neighborhoods, in our churches, in our grocery stores, or in our schools. We need leaders who will tackle this issue head on and fight for commonsense solutions that will save lives. But instead, politicians like Greg Abbott are checking off the gun lobby’s wish list and making it EASIER for violent criminals to access firearms. It’s no wonder Texas’s gun death rate rose 7% just last year.
We can save lives from gun violence in Texas and nationwide, but only if we elect leaders who care more about public safety than gun lobby profits. At GIFFORDS, we support leaders with the courage to act. We are working every day to elect leaders at every level—state, local, and federal—that will help make our communities safer.
But this is an ongoing struggle and we need your help to keep up the momentum. So what do you say, friend?
[**Will you make a $10 donation to GIFFORDS today? Chip in today to help us elect leaders across the country who will address this issue head on, not bury their heads in the sand like Greg Abbott.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230510-1-15&t=1&akid=5607%2E3935704%2Eci_H-E)

A tie-breaking draw for control

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63084677/405541403/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRkN2E4Zi00NWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vX4FvCu4ynR3jN1mIDcE-tkpY8ee3obUJLMBKKXIEMU=&emci=588d539e-e8ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a74d7a8f-45ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, In 2017, the race for control of the Virginia House of Delegates came down to a tie – both candidates had 11,607 votes and the chamber picked the winner by **putting their names on pieces of paper and pulling one from a bowl.** Democrats were unlucky that day. The Republican candidate’s name was pulled and the GOP took control of the House of Delegates. clean_body: A tie-breaking draw for control | | | Derek, In 2017, the race for control of the Virginia House of Delegates came down to a tie – both candidates had 11,607 votes and the chamber picked the winner by putting their names on pieces of paper and pulling one from a bowl. Democrats were unlucky that day. The Republican candidate’s name was pulled and the GOP took control of the House of Delegates. We can’t let the election this November come down to luck. = = Just one vote could have made the difference in 2017 – the difference to protect access to abortion, enact commonsense gun safety legislation, and safeguard marriage equality for all. Let’s make sure this close of a call never happens again. = Thank you, Team Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. clean_body: Can’t politrick his way out of this one.| | | | | Listen up! A NEW YORK JURY has found DONALD J. TRUMP GUILTY of sexual abuse and defamation. The evidence speaks for itself - he's UNFIT to run for ANY political office. But this is just the tip of the iceberg. Trump's been hit with MULTIPLE LAWSUITS lately, and rightly so. Remember the whole Stormy Daniels hush money thing? Yeah, he GOT INDICTED for that. And let's not forget the sickening and inhumane practice of putting KIDS IN CAGES. That he proudly bragged about grabbing women’s private parts. Or that he INCITED A BLOODY INSURRECTION. Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. body:

Ryan Job was born in Washington state in March 1981. He was raised in Issaquah, Washington, and attended Issaquah High School. After graduation, he enrolled in the University of Washington, where he studied for three years before joining the Navy in 2002. He began boot camp in December of that year in Great Lakes, Illinois, and graduated in February 2003.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Huge Victories For Abortion Rights, Voting Rights And Clean Energy! Wins like this feel so good, we should have them more often …
body:
Winning feels good
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T552803c1-ccc6-4eb5-9cfa-9587c5fb32a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Huge Victories For Abortion Rights, Voting Rights And Clean Energy!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T870c1122-2002-4860-a35e-883de7af66a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** _We're forced to write often with bad news. So how about some truly amazing results of our working hard, fighting like hell and winning: **The Minnesota State Legislature**_ _In 2022, we had a historic midterm, taking over five state legislative chambers while the President was from our party. It hadn't been done in a single state legislative chamber since FDR!_ **_In MN, add a Democratic Governor, and we're seeing the kinda change we get when we elect Democrats and remove Republicans from office:_**
* **_Codified Reproductive Rights into state law_**
* **_A Conversion Therapy Ban_**
* **_Created quick Voter Registration_**
* **_Cracked down on intentionally dishonest campaign rhetoric_**
* **_Paid Family Leave_**
* **_Universal Free School breakfast and lunch_**
* **_Emergency rental assistance_**
* **_100% Clean Energy by 2040_**

_This was the scene as Democrats just passed Family & Medical Leave:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bdf4581-98db-4dbb-8a80-c1845e281214/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_You'll notice it was completely along party lines, because Republicans don't support policies that help regular people anymore._** **_They don't care. _** [**_If we want the DFL (Democratic Party in Minnesota) to keep progressing, we must support them, as a model for Minnesota voters AND voters across the country. As my friend radio host Matt McNeil (AM950 in Minneapolis) said to me when sharing all this, "Don't. be afraid of winning Democrats, it feels REALLY good._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46289d76-78d5-43c4-9392-b5544d8e44a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Will you join us in giving the DFL $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to WIN?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e801b61-dcc0-4d2a-a953-274e9d89e01c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21595cd3-5c2f-4d1b-be42-7efa4ffcd6f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | |

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/mndfl-familyandmedicalleave-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68b1fecc-f502-44aa-8996-a27775bccaab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=4ee3c5dd-c696-447d-a379-ef092a15c234&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=4ee3c5dd-c696-447d-a379-ef092a15c234&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: 🚨Biden's days are numbered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
The House Oversight Committee recently obtained bank documents revealing that the Biden family business received over $10 million from foreign nations | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8125177?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=01d1edc2d8&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

I am calling on Republicans in the House to draft up articles of impeachment and take immediate action to protect American interests.

The House Oversight Committee recently obtained bank documents revealing that the Biden family business received _**over $10 million from foreign nationals**_ , particularly from Romania and China, in exchange for what appears to be advancing the America-Last agenda.

We have a criminal in the White House, and we cannot let him continue to use the federal government as a resource to fill his pockets. It is time for us to take a stand and demand accountability from our elected officials.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=8b96695795&e=0426928d91)
| [SIGN THE OFFICIAL PETITION TODAY >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=4169aeea8d&e=0426928d91)
---
**If you have already signed the official petition to IMPEACH Joe Biden and would still like to help send a real America-First conservative fighter to Congress, select an option below to make an URGENT donation today.

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=242baf2ef7&e=0426928d91)
Joe Biden has used his position of power to line his pockets for more than 50 years, and his days of selling out the American people for personal gain must come to an end.
We will not allow our nation’s interests to be sold out any longer.
You have my word.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=ae61e52a5a&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski

Ohio CD-09

name: Stop Republican Gerrymandering
subject: If you thought redistricting was over, think again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
we have two options, team
|
---

We wanted to make sure you saw this, team: According to _POLITICO_ , Republican plans for **“ambitious gerrymandering”** in key states could have a huge impact on the next election: **“Republicans could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone. That would give Speaker Kevin McCarthy a much-needed cushion in 2024.”
_– POLITICO_** Last November, our movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Now, with more redistricting on the horizon, we have two options: | **OPTION ONE:
We can do nothing and let the GOP roll back our progress.

Years from now, we’ll look back on the 2022 election as the high watermark for fair maps, after which the GOP returned to unchecked gerrymandering.

OPTION TWO:
We can continue fighting for _even fairer maps_ in 2024 and beyond!

Years from now, we can look back and know we did everything we could to strengthen our democracy.**
---
**Conservative lawmakers are hell-bent on tearing down our fair maps progress, so we simply cannot afford to grow complacent.

Please, team: Will you help the NDRC keep fighting with a donation of any amount today?**

clean_body: we have two options, team | We wanted to make sure you saw this, team: According to POLITICO , Republican plans for “ambitious gerrymandering” in key states could have a huge impact on the next election: “Republicans could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone. That would give Speaker Kevin McCarthy a much-needed cushion in 2024.” – POLITICO Last November, our movement helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Now, with more redistricting on the horizon, we have two options: | OPTION ONE: We can do nothing and let the GOP roll back our progress. Years from now, we’ll look back on the 2022 election as the high watermark for fair maps, after which the GOP returned to unchecked gerrymandering. OPTION TWO: We can continue fighting for even fairer maps in 2024 and beyond! Years from now, we can look back and know we did everything we could to strengthen our democracy. Conservative lawmakers are hell-bent on tearing down our fair maps progress, so we simply cannot afford to grow complacent. name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: We Cannot Afford Bob Ferguson as Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Support our efforts to elect a REPUBLICAN as Governor in our great state

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

body:

Derek

The 2023 National Convention of the Young Democrats of America will occur from June 18th through June 21st in Las Vegas, Nevada, at the MGM Grand Hotel. The Convention Management Committee, the Programming Collective, and the Nevada Host Committee have been hard at work putting together what we hope will be an exciting, educational, and impactful Convention.

Below is key information if you want to attend the 2023 YDA Convention:

**CONVENTION INFORMATION, INCLUDING REGISTRATION AND HOTEL BOOKING
**
The convention website is [www.yda.vegas](www.yda.vegas?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-fwd-convention-is-approaching-fast-2&email_referrer=email_1911457&email_subject=ydavegas-update-early-bird-rate-ends-517). Attendees can register and book hotel rooms on the official YDA Convention website. This site will continue to be updated with other relevant convention information, including information from the convention standing committees on the platform, rules, and credentials. So, be sure to check back occasionally.

**HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS**
Lodging for the Young Democrats of America National Convention is available at the MGM Grand Hotel until **May 19th** at an average nightly rate of **$109** before taxes and fees. After May 19th, _we can't guarantee room rates will not be over $100 a night more than what they are right now with our room block_ — **_[book your room today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWr1jYF6kdEXBYBNqgnPeCI6aJnYj-D222IGSe74ZZIW3ihpjoHqvOjqc1qrjxjMsZGxMnacGmMCj1WF9UvlJ8iOZJca8pR8zupwh7yeEI6j0_ADQSIJlroG4bQVesoI-t6j3kbLCmhqwk8nm6ioxI2YSErQfaUSgqb46tzGpTz506Lhl75YmdRQOUJKLiXZNr8aMuPwzykbuXcBjYgXaWv_d4dDdP6R3r8KBEhtOvSlwG4BlAgh5XDaCWZ2HbcYs5uvXTXg5vUhV1vwhXm_kfDYOQSJM6e6ZjIsr8y76r5XZ_-vv08fa9BiuEmeBx5MrcNbxF-tlVfHARIaIh0ATsTW4-pSZo7zaNWmKsajUkJ5rwIts_eSKa3r7OG_-mYxLVAdorVBAFxaEKtd1t-n9G8Y/3w2/Jgkym-4sR3O7IEklsOj2WA/h1/ax7c_jqjXyF3wMnZJCYiJ9fF3aIlwZR6J_M8hGsyrII)_**.

**REGISTRATION AND RATES**
The early bird registration rate for the convention is just **$50**. This discounted rate will end at **11:59****PM EST on May****17th**. The rate will then increase to **$60** on **May 18th**. ** _[Register today so you do not miss out on our Early Bird Rate.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKwk8_6SuZZQmYLPHuT1187xfOAmTDl254R0Aegs_gsaNgqoFoAU5khYeTeqvV2wACGEKB3T0zS0KlNVUx6CVcuEbA7lMfdStb-8oJzaPlmRbFAkktLRt_X_uhE_hEFKbNefeT8JhV4MkiPzzPCDUqrOXI0NdpkQWr6hXC3V2AWp_5XcPu9ZLPt6UA8-Bivjvr2qtvhGRcyr_rviPcWQXiGLgZYlDO6JZHtIUND_X43AbfjCjI0lMd5JKvG1-UDqCz_iTierDHrHoWjFz9OdKI6pC6niImCEJ1rCRLLF-o_5/3w2/Jgkym-4sR3O7IEklsOj2WA/h2/whbKsG5Bj3IRhA_qySNOvgJt4v_a1lpDBtCSMJfiGbo)_**

The Convention Management Committee, the Programming Collective, and the Nevada Host Committee have been hard at work putting together what we hope will be an exciting, educational, and impactful Convention. Below is key information if you want to attend the 2023 YDA Convention: CONVENTION INFORMATION, INCLUDING REGISTRATION AND HOTEL BOOKING The convention website is www.yda.vegas?linkid=1&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-fwd-convention-is-approaching-fast-2&emailreferrer=email1911457&emailsubject=ydavegas-update-early-bird-rate-ends-517. Attendees can register and book hotel rooms on the official YDA Convention website. This site will continue to be updated with other relevant convention information, including information from the convention standing committees on the platform, rules, and credentials. So, be sure to check back occasionally. HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS Lodging for the Young Democrats of America National Convention is available at the MGM Grand Hotel until May 19th at an average nightly rate of $109 before taxes and fees. After May 19th, we can't guarantee room rates will not be over $100 a night more than what they are right now with our room block — . REGISTRATION AND RATES The early bird registration rate for the convention is just $50. This discounted rate will end at 11:59PM EST on May17th. The rate will then increase to $60 on May 18th. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: If you're with me, Joe, and Kamala, become a Biden-Harris Founding Donor by making a $25 donation today →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Republicans are out of step with the American people. | | |
---
I’m one of 12 children in my family, and I was raised in the Kayton Homes housing projects of Savannah, Georgia. We were short on money but long on love and faith. From there, I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college and earn a Ph.D. Then, I was called to Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church and to the U.S. Senate where I proudly represent Georgia to this day. **Listen, Peter: The opportunities that made my journey possible -- from Kayton Homes to the U.S Senate -- are still out of reach for far too many across this country.** Joe and Kamala are working each and every day to change that, and they’ve made incredible progress since taking office. _They’ll also be the first to tell you that they need the support of grassroots folks like you to finish the job._ **Can I count on you to donate $25 to become a Founding Donor to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign?** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Republicans are out of step with the American people. | | | I’m one of 12 children in my family, and I was raised in the Kayton Homes housing projects of Savannah, Georgia. We were short on money but long on love and faith. From there, I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college and earn a Ph.D. Then, I was called to Martin Luther King Jr.'s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church and to the U.S. Senate where I proudly represent Georgia to this day. Listen, Peter: The opportunities that made my journey possible -- from Kayton Homes to the U.S Senate -- are still out of reach for far too many across this country. Joe and Kamala are working each and every day to change that, and they’ve made incredible progress since taking office. They’ll also be the first to tell you that they need the support of grassroots folks like you to finish the job. Can I count on you to donate $25 to become a Founding Donor to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Joe and I are no strangers to close elections -- especially in the Peach State. We know from experience that early investments pay dividends. Things like registering voters to expand the Biden-Harris coalition and building organizing programs in communities across the country will make all the difference. Thank you for all that you do, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: the growing extremism we’re facing in DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
The Boebert-Greene agenda is now the agenda of the House Republican majority.

**** Team, when extremists like Colorado’s Lauren Boebert and Georgia’s Marjorie Taylor Greene first took office, they were often described as on the fringes of the Republican Party. But fast forward to 2023, and what we’re seeing is that _the Boebert-Greene agenda is now the agenda of the House Republican majority._ Instead of serious bipartisan policy-making, Kevin McCarthy is focused on holding the economy hostage, gutting Medicaid and food stamps, and taking away abortion rights. These outrageous “policies” are ripped straight out of the Lauren Boebert playbook. **I am going to keep doing my very best to fight against this kind of extremism and make positive change in a bipartisan way. But if we really want to protect American families from right-wing extremist policies, we need to flip the House next year — and I need your help to do that.** **[Friend, will you pitch in today to help me hold down this seat, flip the House blue, and stop extremists like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Kevin McCarthy from setting Congress’s agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63088683/405558066/-1627345757?refcode=email_051023_extremism&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkZTgzMC01MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV-0nwnKijT-HCbfu1TYxmH0_Q0UZHj44iBafVKnXm0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63088684/405558067/-966987088?refcode=email_051023_extremism&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkZTgzMC01MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV-0nwnKijT-HCbfu1TYxmH0_Q0UZHj44iBafVKnXm0=)

I’m in this fight to protect the needs of regular people whose wellbeing too often goes overlooked in Washington, D.C.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare.
It means ensuring families are able to put food on their tables and taking action to fight climate change.
It means standing up for our democracy.
**[I know we can make progress if we work together, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you could pitch in $25 — or any amount that works for you — to help fuel this grassroots movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63088690/405558073/-1627345757?refcode=email_051023_extremism&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTdkZTgzMC01MGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV-0nwnKijT-HCbfu1TYxmH0_Q0UZHj44iBafVKnXm0=)**

body:
In less than one week, state Democrats are facing a must-win special election in the New Hampshire House. Here’s what you need to know: | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bBBIAwE5LmqjTXDqZTATBZGo60t4Gm45BjKrtCtYeQmRsrF9wgOoHQA6pCLhmqpxgZ8C0MjbvCjNRJS7ZGvLcwg-c3lDgIEy2IP_oJRZIpH9N-HtC6qaehA7aGoQsNEWn1lOsxDGq3UC-myPVxV0Lvl2kaCc81z0Ms4xQQ-NsmuzSlp5qlyXKcbn4-2dJDyATNRU6vdC9EWGeuHzK2kMU1izaFHSokbSUHMklKq9Y0tvReWjpkSo5uDXjVByv9M-_erZEtD-teeFOBVyd09FzPyvqMNzmFkAgJVzlBRfOOb5aZUChGpQrW1PnjOVYKto7eoYqHsMODe_XfWReuDosHleCuuSnj4jiT3JsZ9sGGj6RgNdaRGfg6yRzKlmAypY2ell7AIk1qFSIWt3blt8x6YAV6yzaHoinvHUp_eqC5RFQl7TrydIaJ0P6PqZLUWjBtmsjyJ6D7xCFK-RH4hHXKtuVa-wC8Dqkis2r6Dz27mjMaqAjii-T2qUYgdDcYYJhuvpffPgHl6dDyPIXkzSKvhMFwUqSJZroXpTiUuc3ubYjP85TwkHZdJV8PaTxdUC0xZ7UsX3ObTKe5zEPaNwwNKYIknGzghjbIEPNz2KO4t5/3w2/_x4kt3YcTZOzb2YyTR15BA/h0/A1c8tVbCj8WBThwYrUuCTDMQT9PbLPtTbmsVh0uPAkw) In less than one week, Democrats in New Hampshire are up against a right-wing conspiracy theorist in a special election in the state House. **This race could make or break our chances of winning the chamber in November, so we need you to step up before it’s too late** – [can you rush an urgent $7?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bBBIAwE5LmqjTXDqZTATBZGo60t4Gm45BjKrtCtYeQmRsrF9wgOoHQA6pCLhmqpxgZ8C0MjbvCjNRJS7ZGvLcwg-c3lDgIEy2IP_oJRZIpH9SAu4yUhHLXgv0mtsSZP5iu8MSmRxiTdLriRNg1xmrQyIiQDCOmmHZCgG-WisRvOzVYrJmncCi9CCyKNawbRj1_jUQofHKStJHhMZ248eN6o904KUphdnQL86i5RlX-CUJ2Sa7c9eeTA8BvhpUSLRKTCPlHv3AXQtoRJvIOSjDhvNXj4kU17LWOJU9WvluvdWs3RBSP8FH1EsuNE5_xxJCXIU86rr40rtQ24IKZ5ShxgdNhkxBNnIuG23W6lr6nVCg0vvb-bNQMibpkUQ1HGJqEAYHqSeOqBam7i2irvfeSL32kG-luwmbFsGIlShobdt1aGVsYsBjAk919n393KUpUKw9YJg8bUGio7U8SEvE8ohmwuTNtmscHTfsPq5zCBe97PuhDNCcY6a8RaRamaeqJWiqw-KiWoWtvj0Hl_Ar9Jrqx-Z5PC9vOnwizr1PGYV7fdX_Y8pSSSpqr77d-gwMtSjKJGEZqBWQgMT-PAWzAv9_L_K9rHJITcEuG63cCFSJ_R90gUMdHEB-z_wz45ztQ/3w2/_x4kt3YcTZOzb2YyTR15BA/h1/hZxwgv9nZhSUcxQzN07eljA0G3fP6aOr7i0guZhtQAg) **Here’s what you need to know about New Hampshire’s far-right Republican candidate David Narkunas:** → He has claimed that pedophiles are masquerading as educators and that our teachers must be punished.
→ He is a proud member of the John Birch Society – a right-wing political group that is associated with preaching radical, extreme ideologies.
→ He has even claimed there is a conspiracy to not educate Americans to make them dependent on the government. **If we lose,** Republicans will gain ground and push their extreme agenda in the legislature – _and the people of the Granite State could be in danger._ **If we win,** Democrats will have a better chance at flipping the New Hampshire House and breaking another Republican trifecta. Here’s what you need to know: | | | | | In less than one week, Democrats in New Hampshire are up against a right-wing conspiracy theorist in a special election in the state House. If we lose, Republicans will gain ground and push their extreme agenda in the legislature – and the people of the Granite State could be in danger.
