subject: Born-alive babies need our help
body:
Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8i93eqpmjsm9k3cak425837324r26avr22uk2hg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
Friend, A baby is born – alive – after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, Friend, that precious baby’s life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zelrlj29v28vlmbmdd10tm005vpdhhrnpnhl135o_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziei0a7a0o9k80gpl1fk607g2vft94ch6o3e8lj8_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb – but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** Friend, I’m sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zns90io9a7qv71t15hme7g5lfo4d58vng9l7pvn8_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z700a4o59ljgm8ems9rp1844i2ff0uoq86fi7udo_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life’s efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqj5anvgkebr1tkj0p9cbh0il7po72f4dt9vg6jo_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs) As America’s first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America’s legislatures, courts, and public life. _We’re in pursuit of real change and tangible impact._ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We’re representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuh570po4pmrsu2cjkjn73va6f3i0q7cah5c6828_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can’t do this work alone. This is a fight we will win — culturally and legally, locally and nationally — if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0pn0t4hedp5tvtitoimn6hsao2hb3mmrg0ghm0g_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z44l7d58r6d0fe16pgv2kr1cp932lkd2cuoli9ao_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu3khfj2f00u0akmedma7q6fgk9fp3b061a256r0_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)
---
Americans United for Life
1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500
Washington, DC 20036
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuotob7tn0lotj0ltra1e15uier47kedagre1u2o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68o34cdj6coh1k8gn48n24hhm1pj7clg69p70s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfnebsbruagi783osc6htbvbnn3a6qhc7b5bl4v8_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zisn12e5e34sf0l8e3o3d2b3f5noafvo8rn2p2gg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0p74s3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

_**George Santos must resign.**_ Moments ago, he surrendered to federal authorities after being indicted with 13 counts of wire fraud, money laundering, embezzlement, lying to Congress, and more. He won his seat by lying to voters, so it’s no surprise that he’s been shady behind the scenes as well. It’s clear that he is unfit to serve in the U.S. House, and now it’s time to force him out. But Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans simply refuse to hold their own members accountable, all to protect their own power. That’s why it’s our job to apply so much pressure they have no other choice. [_**We’re asking everyone reading this email right now (that means you!) to add their name to this petition DEMANDING George Santos resign immediately:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63089004/405559215/1284986081?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5NmQ5NjctNTFlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3bfwwXR4YciNsdiTrVwGLpsz3VIDmCQ1SPoL_ROunfI=&emci=e796d967-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea96d967-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63089005/405559216/1284986081?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5NmQ5NjctNTFlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3bfwwXR4YciNsdiTrVwGLpsz3VIDmCQ1SPoL_ROunfI=&emci=e796d967-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea96d967-51ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema’s BS ‘both-sideism’
body:
Sinema’s bogus attempt at courting the GOP | | | Peter – did you catch our message last week? As talks of lifting the debt ceiling continue, Sinema is citing both-sideism as the reason Republicans and Democrats have been unable to come to a compromise. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACfeU3PmCbsWe42ufSWhq_i4y-NvhPlK6NX6afukyWrfqwxbmlspDB7-YPKd7dUDt2qW6F9CoLkY1oBjXAWmnrEpoNNaKhmTOStM-bn2XeN40rL__R2BLuiNR0uAv_EV9W94G5Y44vwgDe8p5P1z63RdXD-g0atAPVwyTFPD5CBzvZpEH3CtjcxPzPnaiDaj34adpT8wHsk3CEUqryJqnXz4UPZ7xy4nKIbPIohOqxsIZE9hnnf2iNQMUAHJKOuGjHHP-udfxEqHEvRBxb_M1I17OnyYwfaRozT9yPZ63goXEviueqhl5MDSAEQlEejxj2hyXH0pJ6iCYW7Onj08G/3w2/1Vi5sXEqSk2OxwCxZSSLvQ/h0/8Lm2jJB2ux8bmMANSmRd7uxUdEDqAedpFhckj7ACCvw)**Need we remind Sinema that Democrats are working to protect the very basic needs of hardworking, everyday Americans, and the Republicans are working to protect tax cuts for the rich?** Of course, Sinema _also_ blamed “both sides” for the rampant onslaught of election conspiracy theories pushed by hardcore MAGA allies like Kari Lake. Sinema already knows how badly she could lose this race, so she’s making bogus claims to court GOP voters and salvage her frankly pathetic polling numbers. Watch the ad . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 10th, 2023 | ---|--- Donald J. Trump May 9th, 2023 “The Democratic Party’s never-ending witch-hunt of President Trump hit a new low today. In jurisdictions wholly controlled by the Democratic Party our nation’s justice system is now compromised by extremist left-wing politics. We have allowed false and totally made-up claims from troubled individuals to interfere with our elections, doing great damage. Make no mistake, this entire bogus case is a political endeavor targeting President Trump because he is now an overwhelming front-runner to be once again elected President of the United States. The continued abuse of our great Constitution for political ends is disgusting and cannot be tolerated. Our nation is in serious trouble when claims lacking any evidence or proof or eyewitnesses can invade our courts to score political points. Sadly, for the enemies of American freedom and democracy, President Trump will never stop fighting for the American people, no matter what the radical Democrats dream up next. This case will be appealed, and we will ultimately win.” ** The Democrats Weaponization Of The American Judicial System Against President Trump Reaches A New Low The E. Jean Carroll Case Is Part Of The Democrats’ Vast Campaign Against President Trump. \- President Trump Is Dominating Polling Against Joe Biden And All Republican Primary Challengers, We Are Winning And The Trump-Haters Are Panicking. \- The Carroll Case Was Orchestrated And Funded By The Biggest Trump-Hating Democrats In The Country. \- President Trump Has Never Had Any Kind Of Relationship With E. Jean Carroll. Voter Registration Of The Jury Pool For This Case Favors Democrats By An Seven To One Ratio Over Republicans. (NYC Voter Registration Data, ) E. Jean Carroll Hired The Disgraced Hypocrite, Roberta Kaplan To Lead Her Frivolous Lawsuit At The Urging Of Trump-Hater George Conway. \- Ms. Kaplan Resigned In Disgrace From “Time’s Up,” For Helping Gov. Andrew Cuomo Smear A Sexual Harassment Accuser. Roberta Kaplan, Carroll’s attorney, was forced out of her role leading activist group Time’s Up, after it was revealed that she advised the public smearing of a woman who accused former NY governor Andrew Cuomo of sexual harassment. Kaplan’s motives for taking this case are purely political. , 8/26/21) \- Carroll Testified That Only After Speaking WithNotorious Trump-Hater, George Conway Did She Consider Suing The President. “Tacopina played a part of Carroll's taped deposition from October in which she recalled her response of ‘no, no, no’ when people asked her in 2019 if she planned to sue Trump. It wasn't until she spoke to Conway, ‘who knew the ins and outs,’ that she decided to consider suing Trump, Carroll testified.‘Before that, you had no intention of suing Donald Trump, as we just heard,’ Tacopina said. Carroll contended that was correct, saying after speaking with Conway, she met with a lawyer he recommended and that she was aware at the time of Conway's anti-Trump disposition.” ( , 5/1/23) This Case Was Funded By Democrat MEGA-Donor And LinkedIn Founder, Reid Hoffman. \- Hoffman Said He’ll “Do Whatever It Takes” To Defeat President Trump. ( , 3/21/23) \- Hoffman Made The Largest Contribution To The Biden-Supporting Unite The Country Super PAC When It Launched In Late 2019. “The Unite the Country PAC, which launched in late October as Biden was posting low fundraising totals, hauled in $4.2 million in February, its newest records show. Its largest donation was $1 million from LinkedIn founder and Democratic megadonor Reid Hoffman, who previously apologized for ‘helping to repair’ Epstein's reputation and for funding a pro-Democrat disinformation campaign in Alabama.” ( , 3/26/20) \- Hoffman Admitted To Staying Overnight At Epstein’s Island, Little St. James In 2015. “Mr. Hoffman told the Journal he only once visited Epstein’s island residence, Little St. James, for an MIT fundraising trip with Mr. Ito. He said he regrets ever meeting with Epstein and his last interaction with Epstein was in 2015. ‘It gnaws at me that, by lending my association, I helped his reputation, and thus delayed justice for his survivors,’ Mr. Hoffman said in an email. He said he met with Epstein to discuss science projects at universities. ‘While I relied on MIT’s endorsement, ultimately I made the mistake,’ he said, ‘and I am sorry for my personal misjudgment.’” ( , 5/3/23) Neither Carroll Nor Anyone Else Offered As A Witness In The Trial Could Remember The Year The Event Allegedly Occurred. \- In Testimony Carroll Said She Cannot Recall The Date Of The Alleged Event. “’When do you believe Donald Trump assaulted you?’ her attorney, Mike Ferrara, asked Carroll during her testimony Wednesday. ‘This question, the when, the when, the date, has been something I’ve constantly trying to pin down,’ Carroll said.” , 4/26/23) Clinton-Appointed Judge Lewis Kaplan (Who Officiated The Wedding Of Carroll’s Co-Counsel) Excluded Key Evidence From The Trial—Namely The Funding Of The Case By Reid Hoffman And The Supposed DNA Evidence Carroll Claimed She Has. \- Judge Kaplan Officiated The Wedding Of Ms. Carroll’s Attorney, Ms. Crowley. (Case 1:22-cv-10016-LAK Document 13, Filed 12/09/22). Ms. Carroll’s Story Is Suspiciously Similar To A 2012 Episode Of “Law And Order SVU.” \- In Evidence, It Was Revealed That A 2012 “Law & Order SVU” Episode Featured A Storyline Centering On An Alleged Rape In A Dressing Room At Bergdorf-Goodman. This Episode Aired Several Years After Carroll’s Allegations, And 7 Years Prior To Her Making Coming Forward With Them.** “On Monday, Trump’s attorney also mentioned another stunning coincidence. Carroll’s description of the alleged incident is very similar to a 2012 episode of Law & Order: Special Victims Unit. In that episode, titled ‘Theatre and Tricks,’ an individual talks about a rape fantasy in Bergdorf Goodman — the same store Carroll claims the incident took place. ‘Role-play took place in the dressing room of Bergdorf’s. While she was trying on lingerie I would burst in,’ the character in the episode said. According to Carroll, the two were in the lingerie section, and Trump allegedly assaulted her in the dressing room.Carroll claimed to be ‘aware’ of the episode but denied watching it.” ( , 5/2/23) | ---|--- Donald J. body:
The witch hunts truly will never end... and that is why we MUST win.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf213ljdkk4ch16jqphrvdhm9anru1ktel7pq7b0_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0pr5c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
The radical Left will never stop...
**In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.
The Deep State will continue this assault on _my_ freedom solely because I fight for _YOUR_ freedom...
_... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way._
When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government _of_ , _by_ , and _for_ the PEOPLE.
For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly even just $1_ - to help continue to DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts - for 1,500% impact.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a7hgcubdpt9g19v7dnftlciecrfuadsr97eofo_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim0pr5c9h2bs)**
Thank you and God bless you,

A woman’s right to choose is on the line | | |

| | Hey Peter, I am reaching out personally with a request because we are once again faced with an important test for our democracy. The special election to decide who represents the 163rd house district is less than two weeks away and the stakes could not be higher.**If Republican Katie Ford wins, she would hand MAGA republicans the majority in the state house, and be the deciding vote to outlaw abortion in Pennsylvania.** The best way to stop this abortion ban is to make sure the voters of Delaware County know how dangerous and radical Katie Ford is. This is where we need your help. clean_body: A woman’s right to choose is on the line | | | | | Hey Peter, I am reaching out personally with a request because we are once again faced with an important test for our democracy. The special election to decide who represents the 163rd house district is less than two weeks away and the stakes could not be higher.If Republican Katie Ford wins, she would hand MAGA republicans the majority in the state house, and be the deciding vote to outlaw abortion in Pennsylvania. The best way to stop this abortion ban is to make sure the voters of Delaware County know how dangerous and radical Katie Ford is. This is where we need your help. We need to do everything we can to elect Heather Boyd, a candidate who has always championed a woman’s right to choose, and who will stand up to the extremist Republicans in Harrisburg who threaten our freedoms. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = The state house majority is once again on the line, and I know we are up to the task. | Democrat or Republican, Congress has worked together dozens of times to raise the debt ceiling. We can’t default on our nation’s obligations now, for the first time, because of extremist voices in Congress who would rather see the U.S. economy fall off a cliff than compromise with the opposing party.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090208/405563591/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230510_SV_1.3_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjgzY2QxNy01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-BNKtsK3m50O7qpfkgKgeTV7wqSSKQO62U1bdatbj9g=&emci=d987acf4-8beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6b83cd17-54ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)
House Republicans want to enact major cuts to the entire federal budget. Their plan cuts veterans’ benefits, early childhood education and health care for those on federal programs like Medicaid. Independent economists have said their plan could result in the loss of 800,000 jobs.

Both parties must come together and find a responsible solution and enact a national budget that reduces the deficit while supporting working families, not the wealthy and well-connected. **_[To do that, Dan needs to get your opinion by midnight. Will you answer our debt ceiling survey here?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090209/405563592/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230510_SV_1.3_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjgzY2QxNy01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-BNKtsK3m50O7qpfkgKgeTV7wqSSKQO62U1bdatbj9g=&emci=d987acf4-8beb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6b83cd17-54ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

body:
That's the average online recurring donation that my campaign for progress receives from grassroots donors like you.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090891/405566004/1395318921?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&recurring=0&refcode=jtk1067-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI2NGNjYi01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJqWH9ETvtrBf4V9boK2cBvaFTFcqh3zKtfv91kZKoc=)
---
**$16.35.**
That's the average online recurring donation that my campaign for progress receives from grassroots donors like you – [**and that's the amount I'm going to ask you to commit to today. Here's why:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090893/405566007/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1067-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI2NGNjYi01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJqWH9ETvtrBf4V9boK2cBvaFTFcqh3zKtfv91kZKoc=)
Ever since I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker _ever_ to be elected as New York's attorney general, I have fought tirelessly to bring a voice to the voiceless and put agency back in the hands of the people. And I'll be honest, Peter, my work has made me a _lot _of enemies.
After generations of politicians catering almost exclusively to the powerful and corrupt, my fight for progress, justice, and accountability was a cold shock to the most powerful forces in our nation – **and now, they're attempting to undermine me at _every _turn.**
Peter, the powerful and corrupt failed to kick me out of office and replace me with my far-right opponent last November, but that doesn't mean their attacks have stopped. Thanks to grassroots donors like you, I have been able to withstand every attack so far – but as the political climate continues to evolve and the attacks grow more pointed, I'm counting on _you_ to provide me with the resources I need to fight back.
**That's why I'm asking for you to invest in our fight for progress by signing up to give a recurring donation of $16.35.** I know it may not seem like it'll make a difference, but at a moment when reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ rights and more remain at stake, your recurring donation will give me a solid ground to stand on and finish what I set out to do.
**[So I'm humbly asking: Will you commit to making a monthly donation of $16.35 to help power my fight for progress through the tough months ahead? Keeping our momentum moving forward has _never_ been more important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090894/405566009/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=16.35&refcode=jtk1067-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI2NGNjYi01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJqWH9ETvtrBf4V9boK2cBvaFTFcqh3zKtfv91kZKoc=)**
| | [Donate Monthly ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63090895/405566016/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1067-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI2NGNjYi01NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJqWH9ETvtrBf4V9boK2cBvaFTFcqh3zKtfv91kZKoc=)
---
Thank you, Peter. None of this work would be possible without your help.

Letitia
_P.S. body:
Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e8dbe95cdb04f8ca949476e654fbb8b&_e=mRM4RMv28t5oko9ubCgt5kO6kHAs7i_3iXLdTubHiZAdAoeuicnyY46yJCr3DP0LoWim5I7IQ1FSSjX5jTlWXLODKrswER6qrCZeTnSdZyCt6vooShoo_TV-XAFt_6ka8FGir4-W_23eyLbohwvd4Gyxc4FJCIx-qEXNXtp08PO6Lj4Rkkk4aMkQPFEX-zqHfV1eM69rady6se1t77JvX5BvycEQGUkfbciFLCf5Yv-ofNKWkVScxYEunO6CpY61wwFAThTAMNX_IcFCYjDKW3rWknWBPTke4faD3_oUuRTjBNSb9e8JaC18JYgpg9fa) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e8dbe95cdb04f8ca949476e654fbb8b&_e=mRM4RMv28t5oko9ubCgt5kO6kHAs7i_3iXLdTubHiZAdAoeuicnyY46yJCr3DP0LoWim5I7IQ1FSSjX5jTlWXLODKrswER6qrCZeTnSdZyCt6vooShoo_TV-XAFt_6ka8FGir4-W_23eyLbohwvd4GkAsqWD_Kp5J7USWYHjgXBFCH7osFVYqOwBk_gcGGtEi2kjI_QawEA4VHCN9LTGpUBbhZzJuLilo-YyNiJz-TBBFxMuUAykUnEstBY5kvZdA7Z7JUJv4KSPdPs6mtJ2Kf91NF8YMAaMOFBNZm_FgRlvXr7W06cA8_ALarAx2lMt) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e8dbe95cdb04f8ca949476e654fbb8b&_e=mRM4RMv28t5oko9ubCgt5kO6kHAs7i_3iXLdTubHiZAdAoeuicnyY46yJCr3DP0LoWim5I7IQ1FSSjX5jTlWXLODKrswER6qrCZeTnSdZyCt6vooShoo_TV-XAFt_6ka8FGir4-W_23eyLbohwvd4K4zZgiBRmivqXfMCcgwbHBpeTrr0Y_tBd3YuU7DJk9Av1F19LPRJRhKjoVru2h0ZOFE0U5Qs0DKINUp9-pGAqzfwwC7h3hNCZ31EzDmu2hvOCQQMUr0uKpI8-6x1DB3TOrIUU3GWdzlMwBESaVAoLrVyaTTn7ekReKRXqE-KQSO). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e8dbe95cdb04f8ca949476e654fbb8b&_e=mRM4RMv28t5oko9ubCgt5kO6kHAs7i_3iXLdTubHiZAdAoeuicnyY46yJCr3DP0LoWim5I7IQ1FSSjX5jTlWXLODKrswER6qrCZeTnSdZyCt6vooShoo_TV-XAFt_6ka8FGir4-W_23eyLbohwvd4Kx_hocsNc4JgxekU6q9IRtqu0ieALJApr4CUJBNmgzb_274ghG85zHBPZdd-0Jiak1Rc1lw2VkPvcHlHtbwaiOKgXx-NpAXrz6M4vnXhmgndaEzd19mIuqsppCGACdCGMXG8b5gWAFj7Yg5TiL2yRjt2UuMKaKplowYLmgywawM)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsHT2U7DNJ

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osHT2U7DNJ

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Kim Bernice Nguyen
subject: Tell me what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Hi, it’s Kim.

We’ve reached the point in the year when it feels like there’s a LOT going on – from multiple mass shootings that highlight our desperate need for an assault weapons ban to the chaos in Congress caused by Kevin McCarthy and his allies holding our economy hostage.

Hearing from you about your concerns makes me a better leader, and I promise to carry your stories with me to Congress and fight to make your voice heard.

[I want to hear from 1,000 of my supporters in the next 48 hours! Will you take one minute to share your thoughts with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63092280/405571354/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230510_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlMTA1ZjgtNThlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJeE0m-t_0XZHgSDOj1ZL9lgwGdOgh6QHEGp8jtQvDw=&emci=a09bf1d1-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bee105f8-58ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63092283/405571357/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230510_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlMTA1ZjgtNThlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJeE0m-t_0XZHgSDOj1ZL9lgwGdOgh6QHEGp8jtQvDw=&emci=a09bf1d1-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bee105f8-58ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

While Michelle Steel votes with the right-wing of her party to cut veteran benefits and food assistance programs, I’m traveling the 45th district talking with voters about the issues that matter most to them.

I want to make sure I hear from each one of my grassroots supporters, so my team and I put together a brief issues survey to get your input and hear your concerns.

[Please take a moment to fill out our issues survey and let me know what you care about most:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63092286/405571360/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230510_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlMTA1ZjgtNThlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJeE0m-t_0XZHgSDOj1ZL9lgwGdOgh6QHEGp8jtQvDw=&emci=a09bf1d1-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bee105f8-58ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971) | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63092290/405571364/-368512245?refcode=KBN_EM_SV_WL_230510_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlMTA1ZjgtNThlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJeE0m-t_0XZHgSDOj1ZL9lgwGdOgh6QHEGp8jtQvDw=&emci=a09bf1d1-22bd-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bee105f8-58ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)**

name: American Action News
subject: A free video series about Lewis and Tolkien
body:
C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century’s most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3etpfb4utn7kuhfusn09fgm2meq60cvc5mt1njo_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien wrote some of the twentieth century's most beloved works of literature, including robust defenses of the Christian faith.

Today, I want to share an exclusive and free video series with you that considers Lewis and Tolkien in the context of their membership in the Inklings--an informal professor-student literary group at Oxford in the 1930s and 40s.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsv6rgkg36ld522vc6hnfet607fhmo2i2ekfk1a0_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)
**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings by using this secure link now:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jbdi4asonnr09ht6vdn2t2ngpvvt3j1g32edv8_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)**

C.S. Lewis is best known for his Narnia books--such as _The Lion, the Witch, and the Wardrobe_ --and his apologetics, including _Mere Christianity_. Indeed, Lewis is one of the greatest Christian apologists of all time.

J.R.R. Tolkien's most renowned works are _The Hobbit_ and _The Lord of the Rings _trilogy.

That both were men of genius is indisputable. Both men also devoted countless hours to honing their craft. This included subjecting their writing to the scrutiny of their fellow Inklings, who met regularly for conversation and to read aloud from and discuss their current work.

**The Inklings are a fascinating topic of study, which is why we 've created a free online video series for you to enjoy. **

The video series, titled "The Inklings," was filmed on the Hillsdale College campus. It examines the ideas that bound the Inklings, what they accomplished, and the continuing importance of their works today--with a special focus on Lewis and Tolkien.

**You can use the secure link below to receive instant access to "The Inklings" free video series:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1gd9f7q01pu7qb412laahqla2l0kvg0soba4po_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)**

Lewis and Tolkien thought the Inklings' meetings contributed significantly to their literary success. As models of civil discussion and intelligent debate, they stand in stark contrast to today's "cancel culture."

The Inklings, are therefore, worth studying not only for their great literary achievements but also because they exemplify the free speech that is essential to the pursuit of truth.

That's why Hillsdale College created a free online video series on the Inklings. I hope you'll use the secure link above and start watching it today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. C.S. Lewis and J.R.R. Tolkien met regularly with an informal literary group named the Inklings.

Now, you can examine the philosophical, theological, and literary ideas that bound the Inklings together with a free video series from Hillsdale College.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series about the Inklings using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-inklings-cca/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zam9pqbhif2iiut9p1j4isib04t2tv8cfq5u6lf8_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)**

---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq5vlhqmvbc0b5j0vve2tlrfvbn9i9e0ds60igfg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34c1i6ep36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurvhb9iihlggkj7dukpaecs6uqgn1p4iqskdudg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgc0vpuhu4gnd0krn6e1spt5h8ivdbg6i4gs4ccg_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctim2or7c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O44VnA5tz49LQLQMZ2xJROz7A5Na-QNkdW3oYl_G_232n_OfIie7c_XA2e59mRvACxNwUitSbut5S25LBYMX5jTx1jx6vVo-ukq6OjGRstW4ZgVDJT6J1gngXWvgsYdU27Hx3JrDWZGhFvT73LAUfHZp)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O44H8yk25PGNmRN6VxWF7IX3lIzFq3aBnjiJ_VW1CL2MxDWQOjYFPsNjI61DdDndrzLWufbGuTTtmn4vim9jlfy2dEDDYtFsDmzezOlf0Iie56m5LsrVr-rriaVJv_in6-pFE5-tQ3_Ew9AHg8tfhCql)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O47GRNswH0fQ5pLV-R1ens7lVEulEJMe1MOpS1U2VV89fp4zrqTdH683ffH1vnnXPCzPLt9qvVt5qdq8ZbxyBzJ3O2snJY00FiPBSLDUfy5Via8ULTY3THQxwFsqO-cJRyT7ea3yJkGGG3XIL8GDt5Dj) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O47xndc5o7BY09GI_Xs_rTdi704EGcb1IvXvbuy1k_aDFyUlJedM7B2rzIcEGJPGbrmz9FG8X_znl3oVoi33G-DXinz0zsBEPZuR8REfilld6XS4eZlMJbOhGy88C8fAYgzm6uDvu08J-tP5-NlRjJ-O) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O44ZLyL0r9F1NkyMa0gBhOsZ0BmaVJliJGiefJTxGMcsRFcrfa6I7eRtUD_WVp7-78fRBrmxm_4j5JJyQcXWArR0npQLuekWj-lR8UQ_7_W7LJIeRuhlF7Q4mg7NRjlRad0ZsjuoV_ApOLrYcWUBptCv)

| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5aba4a67b1d43c7ade0a7359243861a&_e=JFB29t-VMtdo7Wk3Ab8vOWugtDuxM1voMRKEo2TFrNJadPbYAdKrJUwJUXj3uGy-1Kqf6bQvdyUZJjZgIQ4JzGv3u308-fEssETQCbJnIK1y51qRdjNj5S-0yPCkOT2iwJRn2B_dKTO4jPa6FjdTw1sGGyEKvk1FtUXZxQSfNcgf9KBWX_C_k1_qKf9J5gNQ2gJTpiznjwfbBDziq316r1y79NlC05liS1S_gwl-O45imXRHbNtsmvp5CroIOvP42tnCvLUrs_UUsL4M4DzK4nIYanrqcFAeY6jLVU3Ir80ILQztRxBm9xmh4P1Km7CIcGEpfgLwRhkIgJjAAuSweY38FO1EJbF9NI4PJU3dC-Ebj5YCARRAFiYh8s3bf5RG) Sincerely,

| |

|

| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. clean_body: I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Arrested for standing up to the left
body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecb574a94c654b6490f8e6e9d774b61e&_e=Xk7_BXgRZs35-htVSLBuaIkVnqM4d2bJ2qdp2FFHu1HPb7zZUkf_Kj-iV0lzazEm64gVPFUOQX-ujxga4OhhgKj7aIcKDCsTrwZPluZrp6doBYHi4D20VHNtfoBpxWkjCOxImy2GUtlRC8Z6qj7TTCyCowjv9k2bZnLuP1iqfeYoMFnDgN8WMJV-xuUmABlnth4h-gAguTzAfJb62Aq9Htw5zkTID_nW5DSmRGiwiynqMcnHAoUX74UzVSAE0kH0R8FFqf-LTHYNhubCHEhpk_r9mtLHKlcWgXThggOGQ4G0rerdQBpIPRPeO5HwIMmr0Ndcu7OuqScX9AdE7aNfcH5ceCau19wq5573Qu0xk-8DtQxFxlHxkGj-bx8nHvg5aYvSh_aOAydHX-C-lZRFQfK50IJNiPIgV71qdlCrCso%3D) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecb574a94c654b6490f8e6e9d774b61e&_e=Xk7_BXgRZs35-htVSLBuaIkVnqM4d2bJ2qdp2FFHu1HPb7zZUkf_Kj-iV0lzazEm64gVPFUOQX-ujxga4OhhgKj7aIcKDCsTrwZPluZrp6doBYHi4D20VHNtfoBpxWkjCOxImy2GUtlRC8Z6qj7TTCyCowjv9k2bZnLuP1iqfeYoMFnDgN8WMJV-xuUmABlnth4h-gAguTzAfJb62Aq9Htw5zkTID_nW5DSmRGiwiynqMcnHAoUX74UzVSAE0kH0fbD-69E4Ag0Ooq-Wgd7tM7VdsVKiLj2SZAlV6WUle5YjaOW2f58lTQ9N7VfcwvNhMRRxyjnGVFL7VkH91x6BFgrWX6zrn-qpYMlNpM3Zn_44r4sVlBc18b5g28de6jXRg07bli7euaDMLEviYkS0VFIjozPJfPcbNaWGFHVouDo%3D) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecb574a94c654b6490f8e6e9d774b61e&_e=Xk7_BXgRZs35-htVSLBuaIkVnqM4d2bJ2qdp2FFHu1HPb7zZUkf_Kj-iV0lzazEm64gVPFUOQX-ujxga4OhhgKj7aIcKDCsTrwZPluZrp6doBYHi4D20VHNtfoBpxWkjCOxImy2GUtlRC8Z6qj7TTCyCowjv9k2bZnLuP1iqfeYoMFnDgN8WMJV-xuUmABlnth4h-gAguTzAfJb62Aq9Htw5zkTID_nW5DSmRGiwiynqMcnHAoUX74UzVSAE0kH0crFBvevQqGStU1MtFAa2AeOA35f7sE8u5O8MA9d3sbuv1dAZIJDicfu9CWo7ID8MRniO_wqdnx9FZcdjKSemuXKFa5ciHr-_EHemqZgMOGGopo9AxPLuN2Z6ohU6_pZGN6DvcY8UbP2qs4AlRDqSMjTG_hqtwaF10yj26DIQ0qw%3D) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? | | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea. One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao. Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress. But we can't win without you. Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead. Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. But winning took everything I had and more. My campaign took on some debt, and it is time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, [**but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9tukrg5al52drb7v4tkrhm3ju30q5b0gs4r6d0_rp22sh2s8i66o76ctimap32c3h2bs "but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?")

Ron Johnson

name: MI-03 Updates
subject: What Hillary is working on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Here’s a quick overview of just a few of the things she’s been up to lately.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63093449/405575154/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230510-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2U0ZDU1NS01Y2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujIFp_VH-3PWnDfMsGx1vgVMY5fltaQAl6pyyIbQtRU=)
---
| Hi there,

We know we’ve been sending a lot of emails lately, but today we want to keep you up to date with what Hillary is working on in Congress. Here’s a quick overview of just a few of the things she’s been up to lately: _**Connecting with West Michiganders**_ At last week’s town hall in Grand Rapids, Hillary spoke about the issues she’s tackled in her first 100 days in office, including strengthening child labor laws, preventing gun violence, and bringing home federal funds for infrastructure improvements.

Since becoming a member of Congress, Hillary has met with hundreds of students from across West Michigan to hear about the issues that matter most to them, from protecting endangered species to advocating for the Census to recognize union apprenticeships and trade schools. _**Legislative Work**_ Hillary is fighting to make sure members of the Coast Guard are paid fairly when the government shuts down – they are currently the only branch of the armed services that are not guaranteed pay.

She also continues to advocate for safe, accessible reproductive healthcare access – including fighting for the FDA, not activist judges, to make decisions on what prescription drugs are safe for Americans. _**Celebrating West Michigan**_ This summer, Grand Haven will host its first-ever pride festival! We are so excited to celebrate with our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors.

Team Scholten will be participating in Congressman Jamie Raskin’s Democracy Summer program! We are so excited to welcome campaign fellows who will get state-of-the-art training in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, fundraising and voter registration – not to mention special seminars hosted by top organizers and political leaders from all across the country!

We know Hillary’s work in Congress would not be possible without supporters like you. Thank you for everything that you do.

Gratefully,
Scholten HQ
---
| | _Hillary Scholten is a mom, attorney, and fourth-generation West Michigander representing MI-03 in the House of Representatives. In 2022, Hillary flipped this seat BLUE for the first time in 50 years, and we need serious resources to keep her in office advocating for the issues that matter to us. Will you show you have her back with a contribution of any amount today?_

subject: Biden’s latest lying attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress

He will do anything to get his way...
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=289e4549f850407f819e39d095c0b0f3&_e=TfoZJyDmfg3QptduvVFdlJ-LNgmi6JCzuD86gzHzgysPsEYu4AKgw9-CVUHWhV2s6m-7lO8YgUvwlQ91qPKfqpd6I7pogGITPKaUDeY1gETUdCXBWb-j4kLB9vWs7ZvYaY_tBb-IrlRvs65e8W5edLy0QmOgtEYjHRuRUVmKa7Hg11gZwixb-j2Bxl7gSgbtP2GXrtlytCgCbkvSMTufukXXK4m2tQItLJMBJvG11Ow-9P2P49YKzq2g9FFEvbQnOQ1XmfEzb3WBbkZm_55KJWPLEx1gh5UBTuF8nxmNHd-D8oMCXGySCZTTTytLMVmC0GZKVF_wmbXUvA0QWyswsehp7_vvvnHKDljJu-HaVz1oYb9l3bwfP1t-8U5yXHgz-KmETjcImUV4CcjCRkxHMhd8vvQDEolJ7ea6ZIn1V_d5p6AIDZd_VQO7JprUkCyOrDePxmd7Bb4KuLmDgIJDig%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
I grew up in a military family and after attending West Point, my sister, brother and I all went on to serve our country for years.
---
_In just my immediate family, we have a combined 60 years of military service._
---
I’m a veteran, with a family full of veterans, and yet Joe Biden wants YOU to believe that I have just voted in favor of a bill that would “cut veteran benefits.”
---
**This blatant lie is sickening and proves that this administration will go to any length to ensure they get their way.**
---
They are using veterans as pawns in their political game by shamelessly lying and politicizing the VA.
---
_Not a single line in the bill points to cutting veteran benefits and these accusations are just a way for Biden to try and intimidate us into backing down from this fight._
---
**But all of Biden’s lies and attacks won’t stop me from continuing to fight for a better economy and better future for America and I’m counting on you to help.**
---
**[Please make a contribution to help defend against Biden’s shameless lies and attacks as we continue to fight to Save America.](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=289e4549f850407f819e39d095c0b0f3&_e=TfoZJyDmfg3QptduvVFdlJ-LNgmi6JCzuD86gzHzgysPsEYu4AKgw9-CVUHWhV2s6m-7lO8YgUvwlQ91qPKfqpd6I7pogGITPKaUDeY1gETUdCXBWb-j4kLB9vWs7ZvYaY_tBb-IrlRvs65e8W5edLy0QmOgtEYjHRuRUVmKa7Hg11gZwixb-j2Bxl7gSgbtP2GXrtlytCgCbkvSMTufukXXK4m2tQItLJMBJvG11Ow-9P2P49YKzq2g9FFEvbQnOQ1XmfEzb3WBbkZm_55KJWPLEx1gh5UBTuF8nxmNHd-D8oMCXGySCZTTTytLMVmCh6qtpPczkkmtIkqQti9zZNyX6QnmzO7N4O5jvY4KbUIPQ2iwjCXWEvqE5XVHfz2FNTfzKIkDYCCayDDWVrFR1O4GV-4_zyNprBOK7SVOnWbnH2D6Mpf2bWG5FmYQyujWAR0j62lB2CffCEO2eV30Lg%3D%3D)**

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Did you catch my new op-ed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi,
Let me start by saying this: I promise that as the representative of AZ-06, I will NEVER put a political agenda over the good of folks in our district.
The same can't be said for my opponent.
With the deadline to raise the debt ceiling approaching, my opponent is voting in a way that would hurt our seniors, veterans, and working families.
I called him out for his partisanship and explained what I would do differently in an op-ed published in the Arizona Daily Star. I hope you'll take a minute to read it here >> [https://tucson.com/opinion/local/local-opinion-wanted-a-representative-that-puts-arizonans-over-partisan-politics/article_4163b5b0-eab1-11ed-9ce6-738276980cb9.html]
https://tucson.com/opinion/local/local-opinion-wanted-a-representative-that-puts-arizonans-over-partisan-politics/article_4163b5b0-eab1-11ed-9ce6-738276980cb9.html [https://tucson.com/opinion/local/local-opinion-wanted-a-representative-that-puts-arizonans-over-partisan-politics/article_4163b5b0-eab1-11ed-9ce6-738276980cb9.html]
Thank you so much for your support,
— Kirsten
Donate now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_OpEd]
Donate monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_OpEd&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_OpEd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_OpEd] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_OpEd]

subject: A Donald Trump yes-man running against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | I needed to share this update with you directly, friend: **A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – just announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat.** With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. [**So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now and split $25 or more between me and Serve America so we can win and keep the Senate blue?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63093309/405574644/-2003341165?refcode=230510_SAP_Sherrod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmUwNGNhMy01YmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXBkli97ce3nCiIMD5MUykv9_k5XADfGS-RBVZ5a02Y=) Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. **This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat.** **Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time.[ So please, will you split $25 or more now between me and Serve America to help us hit our $50,000 rapid-response goal, win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63093310/405574645/-2003341165?refcode=230510_SAP_Sherrod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmUwNGNhMy01YmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXBkli97ce3nCiIMD5MUykv9_k5XADfGS-RBVZ5a02Y=) ** Thank you for rushing your support to show the strength of this grassroots movement, friend. name: Team Thompson
subject: Rock the Ride 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings.

While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63093657/405576176/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230510_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJhYzE3OS01Y2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAgngTbXkz5P9Zdb3UzTtcO8NyMUr2IbftrXR03Qfnc=&emci=9ce69ee0-3bef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=49bac179-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)
Rock the Ride USA was created to raise funds for local and national nonprofit organizations working to end gun violence. Every day in our country 30 people are killed with a gun, with hundreds more injured. Communities across our country are devastated all too often for us to stay silent.

**_[Will you take part in making a difference on June 24, 2023? Click here if you or anyone you know might be interested>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63093658/405576178/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230510_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJhYzE3OS01Y2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAgngTbXkz5P9Zdb3UzTtcO8NyMUr2IbftrXR03Qfnc=&emci=9ce69ee0-3bef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=49bac179-5cef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)_**

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Last Day! All hands on deck needed!
body:
| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOT:**
**Your Texas State Rep needs to be contacted _TODAY_!**
**The following is what I received from Gun Owners of America's Texas State Director, Wes Virdell:**

We need all hands on deck calling legislators today! Ask your friends to do the same. The following bills are in Calendars for a vote and must be voted on in the House by tomorrow at midnight or the bill is dead. Emails are great, but phone calls are significantly more effective.

Ask your legislator to do whatever it takes to get these bills passed out of Calendars and voted on. This is an achievable goal if we all pitch in.

* **HB2705** \- Removes short-barreled weapons (SBR/SBS) from the prohibited list. The ATFs aggressive overreach has prompted us to file a federal lawsuit against them and we need the Texas penal code to be in line with the 2nd Amendment.
* **HB3138** \- Recognizes all other states License To Carry.
* **HB2812** \- Expands School Guardian program to private schools. There have been zero mass shootings at schools that have armed teachers. The Uvalde Schoolboard had the opportunity to utilize the Guardian program and they didn't. 19 children could be alive today if they had allowed the Guardian program to be used on their campus. Our children deserve to have somebody near them to provide defense against tyranny.
* **HB4007** \- Allows school Marshalls to open carry if in uniform.
* **HB2960** \- Removes 46.03 sign. This bill will be read for a 3rd time for final passage on the House floor and it needs your legislator's support to make that happen.

We need legislators to also know that we oppose HB2090.
HB2090 has the potential to allow classes in school that may push a gun grabber narrative to our children.

Thank you in advance for your efforts and patriotism. It takes all of us to make a difference and as we know, two Republicans helped the Democrats with their agenda this week. If we sit by and do nothing, we will lose our rights.
[WHO REPRESENTS ME?](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3cm0uY2FwaXRvbC50ZXhhcy5nb3YlMkZob21l&sig=2NwLQycsHDEfZt8iatcTaZqswieHaqeQektS8ZzuRiuk&iat=1683742115&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN3wmAYvUauNNb%2BM61tN%2FfIuk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=184A207A1A1578)
_For Liberty,_
| | |

name: Sharice Davids
subject: there’s something off with House Republicans’ “leadership”...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The contrast between the work my colleagues and I are doing and the actions of the House Republicans is stark.

While we work to deliver manufacturing jobs, streamline supply chains to lower costs, improve the lives of farm workers, and more, they’re holding the economy hostage in order to push through an all-out attack on early childhood education, veterans care, the environment, and health care affordability.

**Folks in Kansas and nationwide have made it clear that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for _the people_ , not work to increase their own political power or get on TV.**

We have less than one month to solve the House GOP’s manufactured debt ceiling crisis. I need you with me to ensure we don’t end up in this position again, and a 2024 victory in key races like mine is the only way to do that. **[Will you help my team raise the $5,000 we need this week to ramp up our field organizing? **We’ve heard it loud and clear: People want their rights to be protected. But the attacks aren’t going away.**

We must remain vigilant to stop the worst from happening. It’s been exciting to see people across our state make their voices heard in every aspect of our society. We can’t let up now if we’re going to win in the swing districts that will make it possible for us to take back the majority in the House.

**Every dollar matters when we have so many voters to reach. Can I count on you?**

clean_body: | The contrast between the work my colleagues and I are doing and the actions of the House Republicans is stark. While we work to deliver manufacturing jobs, streamline supply chains to lower costs, improve the lives of farm workers, and more, they’re holding the economy hostage in order to push through an all-out attack on early childhood education, veterans care, the environment, and health care affordability. Folks in Kansas and nationwide have made it clear that they want their representatives to do their jobs and work for the people , not work to increase their own political power or get on TV. We have less than one month to solve the House GOP’s manufactured debt ceiling crisis. I need you with me to ensure we don’t end up in this position again, and a 2024 victory in key races like mine is the only way to do that. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We’ve heard it loud and clear: People want their rights to be protected. But the attacks aren’t going away. We must remain vigilant to stop the worst from happening. It’s been exciting to see people across our state make their voices heard in every aspect of our society. We can’t let up now if we’re going to win in the swing districts that will make it possible for us to take back the majority in the House. Every dollar matters when we have so many voters to reach. Can I count on you? = Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. body:
| | | Fellow conservative,[](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=018b4ac48b0646c48a55c00857fe396b&_e=ozkmjLWHq1oDscejha0gzIfx7pTcvandt9Fqy-YgRvMbUSSKW82czJC1LJ1pGCDJIP7a59d4h8DozTRQhLVeY-p3CEQN64NO-lleR2Zb1wSPAUQxTbTisVNALlXFhl01iXPkRRASYsboemBCJUd-1iZEMi2oxSyC9wJ5WmRVhK4QRE_afZJ2psc83quqB04BEtXYVp_4Yp-4zDD1jfR6QiaQlj_lH-QVr2cdh-5oT3XGwhYnhprRa254NujtS59kgyIuHsZhuY-QQcUQI1kFOUg7uvOlsLu8-2VkOHX1tXrpBWZjYJKsWjzd3vo9aVOLdcC8kkWNio7BaZFjoptXONK3GdxB97kUXH7ZpjAkNi05yr2X3W1Ntz-cOTeUL4YyYWC28q3wxbVMKYjgJE6uyG6sFKOTUQhDKR0xShVpU4VfbkoYpASSoR9u8U0TVk3vTIU9dnnQhUXEiuN6CDjSWLPaoBEYtQOjwlm6afq6qac%3D) When my family fled Cuba, they greatly valued the freedom of the press in America. American freedom of the press is one of the cornerstones of our democracy, but now, with censorship in big tech, new lines are being drawn about what Americans can and can’t freely say. Whoever you are, whatever you wrote, you were allowed to ask questions, speak out, and criticize your government. But, now, with radicalized social media platforms like TikTok and Facebook running rampant our voices are and will continue to be being silenced. I’m taking a stand against big tech censorship, but I need to make sure patriot conservatives like you can stand with me. [**Let us know today: do you think big tech censorship is an assault on our freedom?**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=018b4ac48b0646c48a55c00857fe396b&_e=ozkmjLWHq1oDscejha0gzIfx7pTcvandt9Fqy-YgRvPrqWJ_0KB9Q2uxz0827aE3m_jG4_Y0ukioypwIRv9kXGR_3qsbHQ3ygPxKSaoJQBbNCbRsPD3Y6rF9FRuqrkC276qKpaNRrG9H-UlhuyrQOiG-ZYdMkaJ1MS4ExwCxslJk8RF_wjQuuRHL5V91bMU5b1P2SLBZpJSFmhFVFZ_3tn5niGRJ9g8TULA98415oJTku4gQKLzwCOwClNIb2P_vKj6Z61Iho8Uh0AVTsA6oLwKAia-U2cHgrY3CygdH9SCd97ItdB71ABH2xLSqdFBDeHKDfCxb3l3r9VUFOuBxblxAUZQudgZiqgLi4tyv58M9PKmDkazfnGyne17A4as8)
---

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Jennifer Wexton's to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000?** [**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now
