[Chip in $50 immediately ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096038/405583929/2012950163?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230510CA_N_CA_FULL_9_G_N_EB50&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQwNmNjMy02MmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EeSBofwiieH9SvbZ2bV1q7hlqMkY_0DxdQ5fyqxw0l8=) I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Jennifer Wexton’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096039/405583930/2012950163?refcode=EM_FR_230510CA_N_CA_FULL_9_G_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQwNmNjMy02MmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EeSBofwiieH9SvbZ2bV1q7hlqMkY_0DxdQ5fyqxw0l8=)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096040/405583931/2012950163?refcode=EM_FR_230510CA_N_CA_FULL_9_G_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWQwNmNjMy02MmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EeSBofwiieH9SvbZ2bV1q7hlqMkY_0DxdQ5fyqxw0l8=)

It's Jim Jordan.

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: George Santos
body:
Santos is finally facing justice — but it didn’t have to get this far.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)
Peter, George Santos is in custody.
The freshman Congressman from New York has been indicted on a slew of federal charges, including money laundering and stealing public funds.
After telling countless, outrageous lies to get into Congress, Santos is finally facing justice — **but it didn’t have to get this far.**
Local newsrooms like ours are usually the first to uncover corruption and misconduct in politics. But with more and more local newsrooms being shuttered, there aren’t reliable sources to expose bad actors like George Santos **before** they make it to Congress.
[**At Courier Newsroom, we’ve launched local newsrooms in eight battleground states to fill in these gaps in coverage. Our dedicated, on-the-ground reporters are holding elected officials accountable and keeping their communities informed — but to power their work, we need your help. Will you chip in $5 now to fuel our news teams?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3697?refcode=em-20230510&t=2&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3697?refcode=em-20230510&t=3&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)**
Peter, the list of lies Santos told to get elected to Congress is long and despicable — including his claims that his mother survived the 9/11 terrorist attacks and that he had employees killed in the Pulse nightclub shooting.
**And the fact that Santos almost got away with it says a lot about the state of the news media in 2023.**
The disappearance of local newsrooms means stories like this of fraud and corruption can slip through the cracks. Courier Newsroom was founded because we understand that **local newsrooms are the eyes and ears of our communities.**
But to provide this critical local news coverage, we need the resources to hire and retain talented local reporters and keep the lights on in our existing newsrooms and open new ones.
[**Will you help us stop bad information in its tracks and hold our elected officials accountable by chipping in $5 to support our local news teams now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3697?refcode=em-20230510&t=4&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3697?refcode=em-20230510&t=5&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=969_120351_gItIvO&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=969%2E120351%2EgItIvO)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Marshall for Congress
subject: Sign on to tell Congress to pass a clean debt ceiling bill.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
[**SIGN ON: Congress must pass a clean debt ceiling bill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096674/405586362/826433324?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_05%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzc4MThmZS02NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cQmCM9ecT7vzjUdAT0HQXnD9oug61RnmEomOSO9V84=&emci=9f07c3b3-36ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437818fe-64ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Republicans are playing a dangerous game of chicken.

Legislation to raise the country’s debt ceiling and pay the nation's bills used to be nonpartisan and necessary, but now Republicans are demanding massive cuts to critical federal programs in exchange for lifting the debt ceiling and avoiding a global financial crisis.

Rep. Jay Obernolte voted for [a bill ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096675/405586363/-1270874993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzc4MThmZS02NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cQmCM9ecT7vzjUdAT0HQXnD9oug61RnmEomOSO9V84=&emci=9f07c3b3-36ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437818fe-64ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)stripping away Medicaid and food assistance from families, blocking student debt relief, taking back unspent COVID aid, and repealing parts of the Inflation Reduction Act that address climate change. If Senate Democrats won’t agree, Republicans threaten to crash the economy.

**Congress has a constitutional obligation to pay our nation’s bills, preserve the full faith and credit of America, and be a good steward of our economy.

[Join us and sign the petition to demand that Congress hold true to their oaths and pass clean debt ceiling legislation without conditions!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096676/405586364/826433324?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_05%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzc4MThmZS02NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cQmCM9ecT7vzjUdAT0HQXnD9oug61RnmEomOSO9V84=&emci=9f07c3b3-36ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437818fe-64ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

The federal government’s borrowing limit, or “debt ceiling,” has been lifted hundreds of times to avoid a default on our nation’s debts and a global economic crisis.

_A debt ceiling that prevents the federal government from honoring its existing financial commitments violates the Constitution._

Peter**,** let’s call this what it is... a hostage situation. Republicans in Congress would crash our economy if Democrats refuse to impose draconian cuts that would hurt hundreds of millions of Americans.

**Republicans’ proposed cuts would harm the public and only extend the default deadline to 2024, setting us up for another hostage crisis next year unless even more harmful cuts are made.

[Sign the petition and tell Congress NO cuts! No economic crash! We want a clean debt ceiling bill!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63096677/405586365/826433324?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230510_05%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzc4MThmZS02NGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9cQmCM9ecT7vzjUdAT0HQXnD9oug61RnmEomOSO9V84=&emci=9f07c3b3-36ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=437818fe-64ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

We can’t negotiate with terrorists.
**-** Derek Marshall for Congress

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb70596c-cdc0-4120-b2b5-75b1bbb8c515/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**Sign the petition: George Santos must resign.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe284cae-c982-4817-9191-9d5442d45a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) George Santos is a demonstrated liar who does not belong in the United States Congress. And now, his lies have gotten him into serious legal trouble–a [13 count indictment](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0c223a9-609d-4e1d-93f0-d2f3c126e04d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ranging from wire fraud to false statements to theft of public money. From lying about his work history and achievements to lying about being [related](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb87a4d3-25a1-48d8-b5c0-952aef2b723b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to Holocaust survivors and [employing PULSE nightclub victims](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb607935-3543-4ddd-a086-c1ae811a1e7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), it is clear that George Santos is a con artist whose mountain of lies carried him all of the way into a Congressional seat and **defrauded voters**. And the public has a right to be concerned. As a member of Congress, Santos could have access to classified information and was the final [vote](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a3788d0-e36e-433a-83cb-ccac16eaab9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to seal the GOP’s destructive debt limit ploy. House Leader McCarthy is already backing off [expulsion](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03f15e47-e7a1-4292-bb7b-b7f07d402e78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)–but that shouldn’t matter. Santos has betrayed his constituents–who have [called](https://default.salsalabs.org/T501164de-5225-4efa-8148-0e1f12faaf3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for his resignation–the American people, and is now facing serious criminal charges. He must resign immediately. [**Sign the petition: George Santos must resign.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta181c2f6-c78e-4dc7-b50b-ef6145149871/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73cb97d0-0bdc-4605-94ed-d9f5d3c37117/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=1&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
Friends, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Long Run to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000?[Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=2&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Colin Allred and The Long Run immediately_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.n68HRT&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=21&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.b8lq5e&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=22&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.L4odF1&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=23&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.t95SKi&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=24&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.1D4yMD&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=25&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=26&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and The Long Run to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=27&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
Let’s do this,
Colin Allred
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em230510-1-t3&t=28&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=4426_196590_fxOF63&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=4426%2E196590%2EfxOF63)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

Peter,

There is no question that America is better off thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ efforts these past few years. They got us through the worst of the pandemic and now, we are finally building things and making things in America again, all while lowering costs for working families.

**I’m excited about Joe and Kamala putting their name on the ballot in 2024 – but I know that this won’t be easy. That’s why we need to help make sure they start out their campaign strong.**

That’s why we need to help make sure they start out their campaign strong. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Patty Murray and the Biden-Harris campaign will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The Biden-Harris Administration has accomplished some historic things: whether it was setting up America for an infrastructure decade, delivering a historic investment in American manufacturing, or passing the most consequential climate action legislation in history—Joe and Kamala got it done. But there is so much more we desperately need to get done: we need affordable child care for every working family, a national paid leave program, a permanent expanded child tax credit—and legislation to protect every woman's right to an abortion and every American's right to vote. = | | = With your help, we can make sure Joe and Kamala can finish the job! Thank you, Patty | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Sen. Amy Klobuchar
subject: No one expected me to run for elected office, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. **[_My work is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you split a contribution of any amount between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me keep going._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63111425/405620708/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4127-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3ZTMzNC04N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yR7YN-bG0m-Dw8LOQUxz1vpXARF8UNOaP0xxIIbm77M=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63111428/405620709/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4127-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3ZTMzNC04N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yR7YN-bG0m-Dw8LOQUxz1vpXARF8UNOaP0xxIIbm77M=)
Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for elected office -- and not many people expected me to win either.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63111429/405620710/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4127-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3ZTMzNC04N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yR7YN-bG0m-Dw8LOQUxz1vpXARF8UNOaP0xxIIbm77M=)
**But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds, and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.___That’s the American dream in action._**

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to know:

**I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63111430/405620711/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4127-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3ZTMzNC04N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yR7YN-bG0m-Dw8LOQUxz1vpXARF8UNOaP0xxIIbm77M=)
**[_But I can’t do it alone, friend. That's why I'm so thankful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you to split a quick donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand today to help me continue this fight._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63111431/405620712/-1044259811?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4127-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2E3ZTMzNC04N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yR7YN-bG0m-Dw8LOQUxz1vpXARF8UNOaP0xxIIbm77M=)**

name: Kevin Tordoff, Americans United for Life
subject: Born-alive babies need our help
body:
Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUc_HlhIvoPMRu4vLhMRD4oonPKGrr0CzuY2gmHjZfE4A4OS8MYB1I_RJHzUqfPq8QuYbefHCkRGdyxroTkYu3Rk2iOudJDs2XkyuivqjFxncQe_cFgPttvUXh1qs5D91_le2i2DNYznUH1cYpnXlc9I)
---
%FIRST%, A baby is born - alive - after _surviving_ an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, %FIRST%, that precious baby's life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! [**Will you stand with Americans United for Life to help us ensure born-alive babies are given medical care in _all 50 states_? Please add your name to our urgent national petition right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUdGzjk-zQfFXRkaV85Bp9BeGkurzWsSQuBygNtBZlMYTlBoMmrgV9Q5brQKDbd7u3VT-7MWiozcNtyNiV13fKVyTJwqqivF4JLr9eWQnb1w_pVKlXZhM8Ev8tVaR4ec3tZkg84MXkw1bLUHuOzqiE6o)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUfCPOhWGOn75wukKQIG4sMzQi77JJwbJY67_dosduNF-l_PSpU0gdGaww-OFMyRHMpbP1Z4NDvQLsaX5rYUowCvxkg8JQqVVB6EYPioMJOn3vErns-HRDeE40NuPUBJHjFK3bXnUJn0VRa7xduF8CqI)
---
Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb - but only with the care of medical professionals. **But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion _are not given legal protection_.** %FIRST%, I'm sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! [**Please help Americans United for Life continue to fight to protect born-alive babies in all 50 states. Add your name to this urgent petition now to stand with us.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUcoz8zRAEB9r9autNXLay1Kojvj7ULHOOYQSaqeXS3-7vG2eJFPE293Xz1Lny_mraa-7zs5hcoWgFSOSK2EmjEUhmCzLpcsSyAaLD7_0qGC0kldHVN_1h6uY_zS0qtz3VpdDTdAWXkIJOb7CVNaGJP-)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUciE3PK237_09Z6lKy8fghQMxwp4Ib0O_UdKCWf347ZtC4lNqRRISrAzeaqbGU2XZmHacR-bZJR7TcZQ5WP26e4O6juiwUxpecLFE9e-gW-mOOBwt2Ykpo35ubtoYPYRGRBjActdbJ-qYQ50PKhCdEV)
---
Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. >From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants _survived_ the procedure! [**Please stand with Americans United for Life 's efforts to ensure abortion survivors receive care to increase their chances of survival and alleviate their pain. All 50 states need to treat these children with human dignity; if you agree, please sign our petition today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUfBepglTpfS3ibYRoj3DOlXaBl8EJTVvbj_APhDFgXPty293i1k51uUymzOuHCDrR2mb_6O9H-7rWshy4VaoKabRnUD8HypFT0QrXLSXN-9vamWRnJsp5XL9TxoUK8wOuwSL-I24AhQyI7V0YezJtGJ) As America's first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America's legislatures, courts, and public life. _We 're in pursuit of real change and tangible impact. _ Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We're representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to:
* Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion.
* Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care.
* Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions.

No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. [**The most vulnerable lives need our help, which is why I need your signature on the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUexZp0_xPg2eIWb_Z2rXv0SAxHZ2YCZKuIuvK3m4Q4uAx15mpOM2Bm9LtSq9dX_hSj_ii8azUzRDylbNBmyJ_HzJqgSj-9xgh64uEfWto6zdkJOx1p9YOcCoo0kgWToeoZVmzEN7uXsPYfCG_Ah8Z82) Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic _Roe v. Wade_ decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! _Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value._ Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can't do this work alone. This is a fight we will win -- culturally and legally, locally and nationally -- if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. [**Will you sign this petition to help us protect survivors of abortion in all 50 states?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUdJEgwOaD-XKZ25TrbrKCMnchSTlcLTO9xMNi0aBGMgZVkWfrtX5_723x_N1uJK3WDDJWrd_YK2aOxcjwNjy2PJZLglM4LQyD9orjfOGdXDT1yijTuL4ey9bPQkaES0JtYVnyPWVLibXrO_9Ph2Ofcz)
---
[Sign the National Petition to Protect Born-Alive Babies](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ec9da95df0f46a89dd8c7358dc7f7a4&_e=SYLyeplUM6swlneTguZnq5jjdNwj1UrG3Ats8zNqKIQo1p3vsPpZfDYyHJhABQgI7T5xu9w0hrwcOE7eKcWGZ6tOwRatJhwAIq97F31-zFMSpONH3uOzVP3cE96C-W5T8aRKCkNei9L5jg0EOR7KnWho_AvxNR9qDxmvIxrPsUfj2UNZj8z4BA-qiH7jd_VVX_zuDghvKgNTZZS9SVjE3ZoytEbpGCtc2McdqVNzVXg-52mKmCuy45AKXhv2e3KG8rkIDiWQsQgM0B5HC8fKTk2Bz0WuFID8uTyNDllzX5SW7EhcAJ2kgN6I7Z0mQMWV)
---
For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life

clean_body: Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation | | | %FIRST%, A baby is born - alive - after surviving an attempted abortion. But what happens next is not the same in all places ... because, %FIRST%, that precious baby's life is NOT YET protected in all 50 states! Thanks to advances in medical science, babies as young as just 21 or 22 weeks gestation can increasingly survive outside the womb - but only with the care of medical professionals. But in many states, babies of that age or later who survive abortion are not given legal protection. %FIRST%, I'm sure you would agree that infants surviving attempted abortions are in critical need of medical intervention to provide comfort care and increase their chances of survival... ...and born-alive infants who survive an abortion attempt deserve to be protected under the law, treated with human dignity, and given appropriate care! - Your support today can help protect precious babies in America this year. Currently, just eight states in the U.S. report abortion information on born-alive infants. >From those eight states, reports show that 35 infants in 2020 and 2021 were born alive and another 8 babies were born alive just in Florida in 2022. Nationally, there are no numbers available. But in a study that looked at 241 children aborted for having a suspected fetal anomaly between 20 and 24 weeks, 122 infants survived the procedure! As America's first national pro-life organization, AUL has saved thousands of precious lives through behind-the-scenes work in America's legislatures, courts, and public life. We 're in pursuit of real change and tangible impact. Americans United for Life is committed to exposing the truth about abortion and protecting the most vulnerable through policy and legislation. We're representing those without a voice, advancing the human right to life, and working on your behalf to: Ensure all 50 states and every territory have policies that require healthcare professionals to provide medically appropriate and reasonable care for survivors of abortion. Establish enforcement mechanisms to ensure that born-alive infants receive proper medical care. * Provide civil and criminal penalties for violation of laws that protect babies who survive attempted abortions. No one has a right to commit infanticide, nor justify the denial of basic protections for the born, living human infants. But, without legislative protections, born-alive babies In a majority of states will continue to suffer. Founded in 1971, two years before the tragic Roe v. Wade decision, Americans United for Life is still fighting for preborn and born-alive babies over 50 years later! Since our founding, those not yet born have been dehumanized, life itself has become politicized, and the most vulnerable have faced increasing marginalization due to their age, ability, or perceived value. Americans United for Life is working to ensure all survivors of abortion are welcomed throughout life and protected by law. But we can't do this work alone. This is a fight we will win -- culturally and legally, locally and nationally -- if we have the support of Americans who recognize the importance of protecting born-alive babies. For life, Kevin Tordoff Americans United for Life Americans United for Life 1150 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 500 Washington, DC 20036 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Helen Gym for Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I'm joining Senator Sanders to endorse Helen for Mayor.
#
Something remarkable is happening down in Philly. Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment — **and with only 6 days left, a new poll shows that she is tied for first place.**
[Can you chip in now to support Helen’s campaign in the final stretch?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230510-helen.OMfU0I&refcode=em20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)
Helen first made headlines in 2012, after Philly closed 23 public schools in a year. The Mayor at the time had slashed the city’s education budget and shuttered schools, libraries, rec centers, and fire departments, putting the safety and wellbeing of Philly’s most vulnerable communities at risk.
And do you know who was there at every turn fighting against school closures and winning back resources that community members needed to thrive? **Helen Gym.**
For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school. When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules. And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%.
**I'm proud to support Helen Gym for mayor, because she’s running to return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community.**
[Donate today to push Helen over the finish line on May 16!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230510-helen.OMfU0I&refcode=em20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230510-helen.OMfU0I&refcode=em20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)**
**Just this week a Super PAC funded by a rightwing billionaire who wants to destroy public education, and even funded the people responsible for the insurrection, started running false attack ads against her.** Like Helen, I've faced attacks from right-wing billionaires who want to close our schools, criminalize our youth, and deport our neighbors — all while lining their own pockets. I know what it’s like to be told that my ideas are 'too big' or 'too hard' and that 'it’s better to keep quiet.' And I also know that our power lies in our connections to each other, and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long.
It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant.
[It’s leaders like Helen who will help make that vision a reality.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230510-helen.OMfU0I&refcode=em20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)
Pa'lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230510-helen?refcode=em20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=4299_2526796_TJ52hq&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230510-4299-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=4299%2E2526796%2ETJ52hq)**

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: I'm joining Senator Sanders to endorse Helen for Mayor. Something remarkable is happening down in Philly. Helen Gym, a community organizer, teacher, and former City Councilmember, is running an insurgent mayoral campaign against self-funding millionaires and the entrenched political establishment — and with only 6 days left, a new poll shows that she is tied for first place. Helen first made headlines in 2012, after Philly closed 23 public schools in a year. The Mayor at the time had slashed the city’s education budget and shuttered schools, libraries, rec centers, and fire departments, putting the safety and wellbeing of Philly’s most vulnerable communities at risk. And do you know who was there at every turn fighting against school closures and winning back resources that community members needed to thrive? Helen Gym. For over 30 years, Helen has stood up to the status quo and delivered results. When schools were understaffed and water fountains had lead in them, she stepped up to guarantee safe drinking water, nurses, and counselors in every school. When low-wage workers were being exploited, she passed legislation to guarantee reliable schedules. And when Philly had one of the highest rates of eviction in the country, Helen passed legislation that cut evictions by 70%. I'm proud to support Helen Gym for mayor, because she’s running to return power where it belongs — in the hands of the community. Just this week a Super PAC funded by a rightwing billionaire who wants to destroy public education, and even funded the people responsible for the insurrection, started running false attack ads against her. Like Helen, I've faced attacks from right-wing billionaires who want to close our schools, criminalize our youth, and deport our neighbors — all while lining their own pockets. I know what it’s like to be told that my ideas are 'too big' or 'too hard' and that 'it’s better to keep quiet.' And I also know that our power lies in our connections to each other, and that a burgeoning people-powered movement from Philly to New York to Chicago and beyond is going to transform the status quo that has held this country back for too long. It will take all of us fighting together, in every city and in every corner of this country, to win the future we deserve — a future where housing is a human right, immigrant families are welcomed, workers are protected, and our communities are safe and vibrant. Pa'lante, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: Sending ya a personal link before 5/15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're just days away from our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, but still a few thousand dollars shy.
#
Derek, I promise I'll keep this *very* short:
We're just days away from our mid-quarter fundraising deadline, but still a few thousand dollars shy of our $17,000 fundraising goal. 😐
I’ve gotta ask since you haven’t donated to our campaign this month yet and we’re running out of time:
**Will you please make your very first $5 donation to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate before midnight so we can finally hit our mid-quarter fundraising goal + ensure we report strong numbers to the FEC in June?**
Here’s a personal donation link you can use, or just click the button below:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-midquarter?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-midquarter?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230510-1-8369&refcode2=8369_434096_5KXKPC&akid=8369%2E434096%2E5KXKPC)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-midquarter?amount=5&refcode=em20230510-8369&refcode2=8369_434096_5KXKPC&akid=8369%2E434096%2E5KXKPC)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-midquarter?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230510-1-8369&refcode2=8369_434096_5KXKPC&akid=8369%2E434096%2E5KXKPC)
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU for all your support so far. I *know* that our team has what it takes to close the gap before Monday’s deadline. 🙏🙏🙏
Let’s do this,
John
John Fetterman
U.S Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230510-8369-footer&t=1&refcode2=8369_434096_5KXKPC&akid=8369%2E434096%2E5KXKPC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Hi,

**I have to let you in on a massive secret.**

_You have to promise you won 't tell anyone. _

| | | Friend,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to send you this personal message.

Thanks to you and thousands of other committed patriots, I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had and more. My campaign took on some debt, and it is time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, [**but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c434ba4b809d4a0c8cca7c71da475601&_e=6ifb21BEstZk30uouF65eFJ6DjFPXPUGtMsvI2aHqKOHhAIAIfEXzPkmiKHmQu2OMSOhOnpC1PXhPUPXxzLGG_M1V35W6uvg4Lfu313HICxdtV_ctoIJN5y-yrAp4WV0Zy6qWv3755Pyb-ZOcOIEE4D9OuugJWUsL0ir3C_NU5fRXKmutThD5eEJyvReQfw5r3lyf5yf_DRSVfvw6i2NN2Mh8hBrkDp7N7G7sTnTqJfe9o9xMisVEATpXJthfWbEafpv4HVlktgOT-dkrYNlFL5waOGm3m5JGGxkjRKiclWVESBKUeSNY0hxJWHac8eMpWOuLqoUeyRWqaRTxuQNyuls7V8LkABU_jIg5SI6lmyouzNr5u-sguB4owZaIOdaJdOebaBu3C7bv2X13shlftKiL37MvjLL4j10ukSia-KhiroPnyYXFcJLBpnERRWD "but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?")

Ron Johnson

They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.

For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!

subject: Some news that I’m very happy to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m all in. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115792/405624442/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDYyYjE4MC04ZWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FwkQtptWHGLZKB91hxfWfk-Fdhel6Z677X3zvuxaDs=&emci=683af379-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4d62b180-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
**President Biden and Vice President Harris just rolled out the National Advisory Board for their re-election campaign, and I’m very happy to be part of it.** The way I see it, joining this group is another way of saying I’m all in. All in to re-elect this terrific team. All in to defeat the MAGA Republicans who want to yank us backwards. All in to keep working alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris as they protect our freedoms, defend our democracy, and put our government on the side of working people. They’re holding the line in this powerfully important election, but it’s going to take all of us rolling up our sleeves and fighting by their side to win this thing. [_**So I’m asking if you’ll join me in supporting the Biden-Harris campaign by signing up today. Click here and add your name to get important updates from the president, the vice president, and their team on how you can get involved.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115793/405624443/60308178?refcode=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&ms=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDYyYjE4MC04ZWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FwkQtptWHGLZKB91hxfWfk-Fdhel6Z677X3zvuxaDs=&emci=683af379-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4d62b180-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**SIGN UP**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115794/405624444/60308178?refcode=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&ms=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDYyYjE4MC04ZWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FwkQtptWHGLZKB91hxfWfk-Fdhel6Z677X3zvuxaDs=&emci=683af379-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4d62b180-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Now, I don’t have to tell you how badly we’ve got to hold onto the White House.
Not just so we can keep Republicans far, far, FAR away from 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue (although that’s certainly reason enough).
But also so we can keep making real change alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris. We can keep fighting for big, structural change together.
From moving forward with student debt cancellation to putting a new tax on greedy corporations, it’s been an honor to work with them — and they’ve shown what it looks like to have a government that works for working families, not the rich and powerful.
So let’s have their backs.
**By signing up to be a part of the Biden-Harris campaign, you’ll say that you’re staying in the fight for a country that works for everyone.**
**And you’ll say that you’re ready to defeat the GOP extremists who want to ban abortion nationwide, put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, and give away the store to the wealthy and well-connected.**
[_**Add your name here to get important updates on how you can get involved with the Biden-Harris campaign, and let’s support them side by side. I’m going to do everything I can to help between now and next November, and I look forward to continuing to work with them in their second term.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115795/405624445/60308178?refcode=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&ms=EMZ13Q_ANN_E_20230510_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDYyYjE4MC04ZWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FwkQtptWHGLZKB91hxfWfk-Fdhel6Z677X3zvuxaDs=&emci=683af379-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4d62b180-8eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: I’m all in. | | | President Biden and Vice President Harris just rolled out the National Advisory Board for their re-election campaign, and I’m very happy to be part of it. The way I see it, joining this group is another way of saying I’m all in. All in to re-elect this terrific team. All in to defeat the MAGA Republicans who want to yank us backwards. All in to keep working alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris as they protect our freedoms, defend our democracy, and put our government on the side of working people. They’re holding the line in this powerfully important election, but it’s going to take all of us rolling up our sleeves and fighting by their side to win this thing. | Now, I don’t have to tell you how badly we’ve got to hold onto the White House. Not just so we can keep Republicans far, far, FAR away from 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue (although that’s certainly reason enough). But also so we can keep making real change alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris. We can keep fighting for big, structural change together. From moving forward with student debt cancellation to putting a new tax on greedy corporations, it’s been an honor to work with them — and they’ve shown what it looks like to have a government that works for working families, not the rich and powerful. So let’s have their backs. By signing up to be a part of the Biden-Harris campaign, you’ll say that you’re staying in the fight for a country that works for everyone. And you’ll say that you’re ready to defeat the GOP extremists who want to ban abortion nationwide, put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, and give away the store to the wealthy and well-connected. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Friend,
The radical Left will never stop...
**In Trump Probe, Special Counsel Zooms In on Possible Criminal Charges** [Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
They will continue to viciously attack me, smear me, and even **ARREST** me despite not having committed a single crime.
The Deep State will continue this assault on _my_ freedom solely because I fight for _YOUR_ freedom...
_... Because it's not really me they're after, it's YOU - I'm just standing in the way._
When I first came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower, I denounced the Washington Swamp and put you FIRST. And together, for the first time in decades, WE created a government _of_ , _by_ , and _for_ the PEOPLE.
For that, the globalist special interests, the entrenched bureaucrats, and the Deep State have all made me their public enemy #1.
But despite the endless despicable witch hunts, not a day goes by where my resolve wavers.
**_Time and time again, I am reminded of the more than 74 MILLION American patriots who make up our incredible MAGA movement. _**
YOU are my courage, my strength, and my hope.
And with every new witch hunt they throw our way, I only grow that much more confident that we WILL win back the White House and SAVE our country in 2024!
**[Please make a contribution of ANY amount- _truly even just $1_ - to help continue to DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts - for 1,500% impact. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=943e60ad73404a8791c882564c81b44a&_e=bqyTYfxYKOowC7C6dcnbTG2ZQOeXqnW_zo8aCNdOkLoqtzD551bX9Gxz--uDel-zShBjj-t4onItanN8UytUFfAw8zwhuIE-FdkhLhSSLJt3ae47A44i8FHXAn_F7oJzCol2bjjNrZ7Z7ghlIlvEBO1iOBElR_L9qAYAM2JqyqR09-VndAkdJ-BqwGNdutOVKwfH0pCIOj4mZH6TxyD24yX5wNe9Stn9KVPKWtW8PjM-xXCd3kiTTRtXWnML-56pxoqg0SvaYC1kzmzebwvSLWANYFtPRIuAC3vS6sJ3WJY96Ck_QrQh6mWM7yxFgE50whMRZ1sQ26mGh4m9aZJ4haQml78Y_noSnrqL4J1kSaXVTNV4YkbG4g1oLKlqYd--ZUOtI1iG3Ho0mZEAdmSVNw%3D%3D)**
Thank you and God bless you,

name: Adam Frisch
subject: just $10 to defeat Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63099586/405600050/-1392034954?refcode=x_051023_frisch_react2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzQzZGU1Mi02ZmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TTd1mvv9kweVcvpp_ggjS9q3hFUmEEbNm_Ud3kgueUo=) Hey there, $10.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $10.

$10 because last year, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.

$10 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.

$10 because the first poll of the campaign shows I am tied with Boebert, 45% to 45%.

And $10 because Lauren Boebert and her super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I am asking you directly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
Friends -
I am reaching out to respectfully ask if you can contribute $3 to my campaign today.
Here's why:
Last election cycle, we faced a challenger who came within 2 points of winning the primary in Minnesota's 5th congressional district. And right now, I am counting on this grassroots movement to ensure we can overcome any challenger who might come our way this cycle.
I simply cannot do it alone.
When I first ran for Congress in 2018, I made the decision to reject corporate PAC money. Because the truth is that the strength of our movement comes from the people – not large corporations or special interest groups. And it requires a lot of grassroots donations to give our campaign the resources to defend this seat.
So that means from time to time I need to ask people like you to chip in.
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress? I rely on people like you to help fund this campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=2&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-may23.WumOwJ&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=21&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
[Express Donate: $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-may23.QmVUL3&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=22&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
[Express Donate: $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-may23.wfrcZD&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=23&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-may23.ZdvrGw&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=24&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-may23.LgMmv-&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=25&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=26&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)
As always, thank you for everything. Not just for your financial support, but for your passion, your encouragement, and for all that you bring to our movement's fight for justice.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230510-1-t2&t=27&akid=153%2E791427%2E4Sa62z)**

Peter, I’m so passionate about the American Dream because I’m proof that it’s alive and real.

My family came to America with little besides the clothes on our backs fleeing communist Vietnam.

But with hard work, faith, and patriotism, we were able to make it in America, and I repaid our country for all of its opportunity with 25 years of service as a Navy Special Operations Officer.

**I’m so proud to have lived the American Dream, but now, I want to hear YOUR story.**

[**What’s your American Dream story? Let us know now and help us CELEBRATE the greatest nation on earth!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=95d9bb4975cb4292b20f80c15e2fc588&_e=L6c1IG2YqiRVoUMuUqRY7YFesiATNvdbw2y7k6ppq0HVFK_0qgnPhXDh_pSHa0PyIe87EBtdUrGRUpjlKzN9HN4Wtoig02s8fe69sp8xD7PLod0jnTDx1MXJ8zl0bcDxxGZINfNSjSx-o08kigDcGRmGrPpSG__GhRivyeyUtUvZs0y0K0Ci8h3G7kyyme9ZaXIJM4Q_4MKV7mLhTQL7TdwETjxS0VfSugz61E9bH0TfZoFgvUIdnSEBcCVqachgo1Gv7k7o6NEIO3i4LwcQtv27aJjplSkmasgmpgybEVUUGGtNTu5cViVP97CKj8pVTYK_uVsSqWSY5nl5VjvsobgxrpcRsDnjm7-NLvoV111n2jTM1DXKKg72pALxT7vy)

Dear Friend,

I need your urgent support to help us secure our borders and take back America from the disastrous leadership of Joe Biden.

**The Biden administration 's open border policies have created chaos and crime, empowering Mexican cartels to profit from human trafficking and push deadly fentanyl into communities across America. More than 70,000 Americans died from overdose deaths last year.

And Title 42 ends at midnight TONIGHT!

Tens of thousands of migrants are waiting to surge across our border. **

The consequences of President Biden's open border policies are devastating. On Joe Biden's watch, an unprecedented number of migrants has crossed our borders without our permission, overwhelming already strained resources, and posing a serious threat to our national security.

Joe Biden's failure to faithfully execute the laws of the land and lead on this critical issue is dangerous to U.S. sovereignty. We cannot sit back and let this crisis continue to spiral out of control. We need to take immediate action to secure our borders and restore order to our immigration system.

**[ But we can't do it alone. body:

| Dear friends, Please join me and some special guest speakers for our monthly Caffeinate and Conversate with Canepa series 10 a.m., Saturday, May 20, Madhouse Coffee, 402 Visitacion Ave. in Brisbane! Think Global, Act Local. Let's discuss the _**Environment**_.

Special guests will be announced soon! RSVP with Bo Unga [tunga@smcgov.org](mailto:tunga@smcgov.org) or via [EVENTBRITE](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a0d86e29c3&e=c0babbc643) or call: 650-363-4572

Peter,
It’s hard to believe that the 2022 election, _an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote_ , was just 6 short months ago.

In those 6 months, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians.

But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack.

I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – **I work for you, the American People.
**
_So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay.
_
That’s why I’m inviting you to join my team as a _**2023 Sustaining Member.**_
_With you on my side, I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and ensure I’m reelected in 2024 to continue my work for the people of Oregon. _
[_**Please make your best contribution to join my team as a 2023 Sustaining Member. >>

Standing up for you, standing up for Oregon, and standing up for what’s right is in my blood.

It’s what I was raised on and it’s something I’ve worked hard every day to teach my daughters.

_That’s why when I see all the fighting and all the drama happening all around me in Congress, I just can’t understand it.
_
It seems so simple to me – let’s just use some common sense and do what’s right!

_Like fully funding Medicare and Social Security...

Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our borders...

Like fighting for parental rights in Oregon Schools..._

If you agree with me, and you’re ready to fight on the side of commonsense solutions, I hope you’ll accept my invitation to become a 2023 Sustaining Member.

It would mean a lot to me, and go a long way in helping us prepare for 2024.

clean_body: | | | | You’re invited, | Peter, It’s hard to believe that the 2022 election, an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote , was just 6 short months ago. In those 6 months, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians. But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack. I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – I work for you, the American People. So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay. That’s why I’m inviting you to join my team as a 2023 Sustaining Member. With you on my side, I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and ensure I’m reelected in 2024 to continue my work for the people of Oregon. | | | | | Standing up for you, standing up for Oregon, and standing up for what’s right is in my blood. It’s what I was raised on and it’s something I’ve worked hard every day to teach my daughters. That’s why when I see all the fighting and all the drama happening all around me in Congress, I just can’t understand it. It seems so simple to me – let’s just use some common sense and do what’s right! Like fully funding Medicare and Social Security... Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our borders... Like fighting for parental rights in Oregon Schools... If you agree with me, and you’re ready to fight on the side of commonsense solutions, I hope you’ll accept my invitation to become a 2023 Sustaining Member. It would mean a lot to me, and go a long way in helping us prepare for 2024. Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086

| Peter,

In Congress, I always center our community’s needs. Whether it’s by lowering the cost of prescription drugs, expanding rural broadband internet, or looking out for our farmers, I put VA-07 and your priorities first.

_**Take a look at what I’ve been up to recently:**_
---
| | _**Virginia Rep. Spanberger holds a Farm Bill Summit to hear from producers**_

_“Congress may be in recess, but that does not mean work on the Farm Bill has stopped. Representative Abigail Spanberger of Virginia held a summit to listen to local farmers and producers about their priorities for the legislation.”_

_\- RFD-TV_

_**For Spanberger, work on new farm bill no chore, but an opportunity**_

_“Spanberger, who had just been elected and not yet seated when Congress passed the last Farm Bill in 2018, sees an opportunity for bipartisan progress in the push to reauthorize a farm bill that sets funding and priorities in a dozen broad initiatives for agriculture and forestry.”_

_\- Richmond Times-Dispatch_

_**Rep. Spanberger looking to hear from Virginians who have benefitted from Meals on Wheels**_

_“Representative Abigail Spanberger (D) is opening a new survey to get feedback on the program from Virginians. She says Meals on Wheels plays a vital role in keeping many Virginians fed and connected.”_

_\- NBC29_

name: Team Swalwell
subject: BREAKING: The career of George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
George Santos has been arrested and indicted on 13 crimes |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63101623/405607203/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjhlNjM0ZC03N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LFyfMVJ7Heo2hO84xQa1js5cULW6UV9kLaLnZ6K0UYg=)
We wanted you to hear this from us, team: Just as fast as he told his lies, the career of George Santos may be coming to an end. **FIRST** , George Santos _lied about everything under the sun, committing fraud in the process_.
**THEN** _he assumed office, his con artist ways came to light_ , and Kevin McCarthy didn’t lift a finger to hold him accountable.
**NOW** , _he is being arrested and indicted on 13 crimes_. **Talk about facing the consequences of your own actions.** **NY-03 deserves better, and we hope that today’s news brings New Yorkers one step closer to having real representation they can count on. [Eric’s ready to help elect Democrats in flippable districts like NY-03. Join his fight by donating $5 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63101624/405607204/925737026?refcode=E21431-20230510-SantosArrest-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-Corruption-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjhlNjM0ZC03N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LFyfMVJ7Heo2hO84xQa1js5cULW6UV9kLaLnZ6K0UYg=)** | [FIRE SANTOS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63101625/405607205/925737026?refcode=E21431-20230510-SantosArrest-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-Corruption-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjhlNjM0ZC03N2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LFyfMVJ7Heo2hO84xQa1js5cULW6UV9kLaLnZ6K0UYg=)
---
In a not-so-stunning turn of events, federal prosecutors say Santos allegedly _“devised and executed a scheme”_ aimed at defrauding the donors of his 2022 campaign, including:
🚨 _7 counts of wire fraud_
🚨 _3 counts of money laundering_
🚨 _2 counts of making materially false statements to the House of Representatives_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: | | | We cannot let these candidates win | | | | Team, We are reaching out today with an urgent message on critical upcoming races. The GOP is running candidates up and down the ballot who will stop at nothing to win. They are spreading lies, conspiracy theories, and outrageous falsehoods that serve no one but themselves. We cannot allow these candidates and the party backing them to take control of any seat in Arizona. We need to be prepared for anything they throw our way, and the best way to do that is by having the resources to fight back. That's where you come in. We need your help to raise the funds needed to stay competitive in these races. Every donation you give will go directly to our efforts to turn Arizona blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Democrats of Arizona Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: re: My way of saying THANK YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Will you join me for dinner?
| | Friend,
---
As I’ve always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters’ contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks.
_Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me!_
And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like **YOU** are my only special interest.
**Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors – _no matter the amount of your gift_ – to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event!**
You don’t have to worry about a thing, Friend. I’ll take care of it all:
* Flights
* Accommodations
* Tickets to the event

_And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this amazing evening!_
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to be automatically entered to win.**](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2q2zAQhZ9G3tlYox_LCy96r8gmUGgXbekmyNLEmSDJxpYbbp--OOR2-53DcD7GpSXS9WNg3RsDuFHYGAATXxjAWb79-qrPP8-2drz7Vlut5ONI4Z0BlI8F_1dfVxpMjuJBO1uFAbwB7yscuDaiU7LlqroNwKXyiMZLGHvo-lG5TiJXnvcSUPYVDdCCaBVvgYNWbROc77Uz0CsfzMg9k-2DchPm7GK4l3VPS-PnVMXhVsqyPSedGJw29PuKzYPyiuFoHMz9wdolXMm7-j5TLvV1z2F1tFGeaj-nRKUgMjhlH53m2o1jkON4NVwIJk57SZeEgfbEhH356gNu8756ZMJ6urgX8y4tjqbMhP10-kzmXDAXJqzpdc9AX3KkwIS9o9Hm7zp9n57w-RFhJ_sjvmv321brEJYHxUib7phsp2PB4fYvAAD__91DjVw)

clean_body: Will you join me for dinner? | | Friend, As I’ve always said, the strength of our campaign will NEVER be determined by the size of our supporters’ contributions, but by the sheer number of grassroots patriots in our ranks. Simply put, no big-money special interest will ever own me! And unlike Crooked Joe Biden, who only cares about the donors who will make him rich, hardworking Americans like YOU are my only special interest. Which is why I decided to extend a special invitation to our incredible grassroots donors – no matter the amount of your gift – to enter a contest to join me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13 (the eve of my birthday) for a dinner event! You don’t have to worry about a thing, Friend. I’ll take care of it all: Flights Accommodations Tickets to the event And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this amazing evening! | Thank you, | Donald J. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63102105/405609059/267372871?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230510_FR_4646_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWIxOGVjZi03OWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ixEqQYSaTEwBHLcNhm0--RYumBos2E1cBChKZ0HNGQ=) Just 4,646 more people cast their vote for me than my opponent in the last election. On one hand, such a narrow margin means defending this seat in 2024 is going to be a real challenge. **But...I’m a glass-half-full kind of gal.** That number also tells me that every single action – the small-dollar contributions, thoughtful conversations with voters, knocking on doors – those often-overlooked little moments made all the difference. That makes me happy, because those little moments make all of the worry and stress that come with a tough campaign worth it. A meaningful conversation can still change minds, even in this time of division. It also means that in NV-03, early contributions will have big implications down the line. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
outrageous.

It was just announced that the Biden Administration is preparing to
militarize the border with Title 42 coming to an end:

Democrats should be the party of welcoming immigrants and asylum seekers.
Instead, the Biden Administration is giving into the far-right’s
xenophobia.

We need an immigration system that is rooted in humanity and empathy. We
cannot return to Trump-era policies of family separation, detention, and
militarization.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134424?refcode=em20230510-28891&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28891%2E1203867%2EtHRUcO ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help us hold
the Biden Administration accountable for their actions?

We need to elect more progressives who will challenge the establishment
when it gives into Republican extremism and fight for a humane immigration
system.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134424?refcode=em20230510-28891&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28891%2E1203867%2EtHRUcO ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your solidarity,

Team JD

clean_body: North Carolina’s new GOP supermajority has undoubtedly emboldened the Republican Party. | = | Peter, North Carolina’s new GOP supermajority has undoubtedly emboldened the Republican Party. Nothing is stopping them from going after abortion access and our voting rights. = | = FIRST: North Carolina House Republicans gained a supermajority and the ability to override the Governor’s veto. THEN: Republicans moved quickly to propose and pass legislation banning abortion at 12 weeks. NOW: The legislation is headed to the Governor’s desk. But with the Republican party’s new ability to override his veto, they could be successful in banning abortion statewide. Peter, the Republican party has made their priorities clear – and they don’t involve the people of North Carolina. We need your help to protect abortion access and get Republicans out of office. [Our team needs [25] contributions before the end of the day. Will you contribute $5 to Valerie Foushee so she has the resources to fight back against extremist Republicans?](=) | | | = | = | = | = | = Our fight doesn’t end here.
