subject: The next step of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
Let's continue this progressive movement we've built together. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=7f481e5d2f&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter,

Last month, our team collected thousands of signatures to secure my spot on the ballot. Now, our re-election campaign is fast approaching its next critical deadline, and your support as a community member will go a long way.

That's why I'm reaching out to share our next step forward: [**This month, we're throwing a community fundraiser, and you're invited!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=f8f326f3c5&e=2de202398d)

When: Monday, May 22nd from 6-8 pm
Where: Lower East Side

---
| [RSVP TODAY](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=057fd6cf31&e=2de202398d "RSVP TODAY")
---
| To my neighbors in the East Village, the West Village, Flatiron, Gramercy Park, Rose Hill, Kips Bay, and on the Lower East Side, we've been working side by side for years to deliver for our communities. I'm asking you to show up for our shared home once again and continue this progressive movement we've built together.

See you there!
Carlina

---
| P.S. [**Don't forget, with New York City's 8-1 matching program, a $25 donation from an Advocate is worth $225, a $100 donation from a Supporter is worth $900, and a $1,000 donation from a Champion is worth an incredible $2,400!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=1591acc430&e=2de202398d)

That's why we've **extended the deadline to activate your membership with The Heritage Foundation.**

**You can use this secure link to activate your membership right now:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=235cf678a249427fae736798feb56fbd&_e=MhyvpDtv7vSujWFzyIsQX-ZIOfCb7CYglL5Xxw5GUQO8PTZPUHvRo_bQw-XvwNeSUOYpDhwucDwF84a-CM6_3w-0akM1uclW5OVLFxeX1Ejw1zPqYCcoU2o8yXI6_4IdXEDLJ83aHjLebSPkpBRWIhEO688Hjz2yVPqgTXsRGTTL6VkN3xFS91q3ilZw8X2qh4HIjQGBo-IUigy1rqowUrE_es62qNVZ06KeGvLBS7RMRswcKBtvLOKO-u7BQHRuhLmK6iwEuW-dUwX8cPAOqxilVjOYMAqFKUr5L7QfQNI0qZSqb6Jfs2AWyxk5tuZPz-Ygk1uNXPyWjrWbcmhLdg%3D%3D) **

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Don’t let Big Oil push endangered polar bears to extinction
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1765038?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Imagine if the land around you began to vanish, getting smaller and less inhabitable every moment. Areas where you once roamed freely are now sinking in, breaking off into fragments and disappearing into a mass of nothing but open ocean. You’re a fantastic swimmer, but you’re not meant to live your entire life in the water. So with your habitat rapidly disappearing, you’re running out of places to rest, reproduce, and feed, making it much harder for you to survive. If you haven’t guessed it yet, Friend, you’re a polar bear in this scenario. This is the reality that vulnerable polar bears in the Arctic are facing. The fragile Arctic region is melting _**TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world, and experts predict it could be totally **ice-free within the next 31 years!** This is BAD NEWS for the endangered Southern Beaufort Sea polar bear population, the**most imperiled polar bears in the world,** with __only 900 remaining.__ And to make matters worse, the Biden administration has just given Big Oil a massive dirty energy handout by **permitting increased oil and gas drilling** in the Arctic, disrupting sensitive polar bear habitats with _**toxic noise, air, and water pollution.**_ We still have a chance to STOP the fossil fuel industry from pushing these vulnerable animals to **_EXTINCTION_ \-- _but only if we apply enough public pressure on the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service to reject this rule. _[We’re urgently counting on activists like you to step up and help save Arctic polar bears from Big Oil and Gas. Will you take action now before it’s too late? ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1765039?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1765040?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Friend, how long will we let the FWS appease the fossil fuel industry and put Big Oil profits above our polar bears and our planet? _
Big Oil’s corporate greed is already responsible for the worsening climate crisis, and now the government is allowing it to harm and potentially**kill innocent polar bear cubs** while further industrializing the bears’ sensitive habitat for oil and gas profits.
_**Moreover, this rule is a violation of the Marine Mammals Protection Act, the National Environmental Policy Act, and the Endangered Species Act! **_
In fact, the FWS itself _has already confirmed_ that there’s a **95%** probability that this new oil and gas activity will cause **serious injury or death to polar bears.** And yet, the agency has **FAILED** to hold Big Oil accountable for putting these vulnerable animals at risk. [**But environmentalists like you won’t stand for any more dirty energy handouts, will you, Friend? Protect our polar bears and demand that the FWS reject oil and gas activity in the Arctic NOW! >> **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1765041?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1765040?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
****Your voice is critical in this fight,
Friends of the Earth****
|

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Trump Ordered to Pay
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-allqn-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday! Great news! [_Tucker Carlson announced his show_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-y/) will air exclusively on Twitter.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-t/) **Hearing All the Voices** Former President Trump will on CNN tonight for a town hall. MSNBC isn't happy about it. **[Will you watch Trump's town hall?](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-i/)** **No Agreement** House Speaker Kevin McCarthy and Joe Biden were **[unable to come to an agreement on the debt ceiling](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-d/),** but talks will continue with the government set to run out of case by June 1st. **Real War Unleashed** Putin told his country's Victory Day parade on Moscow's Red Square that**["a real war" has been unleashed against Russia by the West's "untamed ambitions,"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-h/) **shortly after the Kremlin's forces rained cruise missiles on Ukrainian targets.

**Headed Our Way** Some**[80,000 South American migrants are amassed in Guatemala](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-k/) **and planning to head for the US-Mexico border. **Trump Ordered to Pay** A federal **[jury in New York has made a decision](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-u/)** on the case between former President Trump and E. Jean Carroll. **The Big Catch-Up** Chelsea Clinton **[wants parents to get with the program](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-o/)** and catch up on their kids' vaccinations. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* Does **[anyone else](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-m/)** do this?
* **[My fault](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* Don't**[forget](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-q/).**
* That's**[one way](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-allqn-trhiujldw-a/) **to do it.

name: America First War Room
subject: Sean Hannity: Biden's Plans for Retirement Accounts
body:
| | | **Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden’s Tax Plans...**
---
**Urgent: Only Weeks Remain To Shield Your Retirement Savings From Biden’s Tax Plans...**
---
With Biden in the White House, you need to act fast.

His **tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement** investments.

And if you DON’T want to see _**your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit**_ ...

You’ve got to move your money.

Now.

BEFORE he changes the laws.

I want to talk to you about my friend, Marilyn Strickland
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63103496/405613391/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc4MmM5NjUtN2ZlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJtG9Mw4SW1fbwOpBPDUp1p179cKpkv-VwiWqrXsDR8=&emci=0438cb68-46ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c782c965-7fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Happy Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander Heritage Month, Peter.

**[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a donation of $5, or whatever you can, between my campaign and Representative Marilyn Strickland's.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63103497/405613392/73821294?refcode=em23_230510_strick_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230510_strick_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c782c965-7fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc4MmM5NjUtN2ZlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJtG9Mw4SW1fbwOpBPDUp1p179cKpkv-VwiWqrXsDR8=)** But first, I want to tell you a bit about why having Marilyn's voice in Congress is so crucial:

This month is an opportunity to celebrate America's diversity while recognizing – _and working to overcome_ – our nation's history of anti-AAPI legislation and anti-AAPI discrimination. In 2020, Marilyn made history as the FIRST Korean American woman and first African American to represent Washington in Congress. And already, she has been a powerful voice for our region.

Last Congress, I was honored to join Marilyn in introducing the PUGET SOS Act to enhance the federal government’s investment in the Sound's protection and restoration. And last December, _I was proud to see President Biden sign our bill into law!_

Together, Marilyn and I have worked to champion environmental justice, support tribal communities, diversify and improve our economy, and support our veterans. But we're not done fighting for our region yet. We both need your help.

**[Will you split a contribution between our two campaigns so we can continue our shared fight in Congress? I know with a strong grassroots team by our side, Marilyn and I will be in a strong position to win and help take back our Democratic majority in the House in 2024 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63103498/405613393/73821294?refcode=em23_230510_strick_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230510_strick_fndt_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c782c965-7fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc4MmM5NjUtN2ZlZi1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jJtG9Mw4SW1fbwOpBPDUp1p179cKpkv-VwiWqrXsDR8=)**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td86dda0c-6559-4eb5-a923-cf02db12387e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Team Cori
subject: George Santos: A serial liar, a grifter, an opportunist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
George Santos continues to disgrace the House every single day he remains in office.
#
[](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=1&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)
Peter,
After being exposed as a conman and a grifter, George Santos' lies finally caught up with him in a far-reaching 13-count indictment. Santos was placed in custody earlier today and is expected to be formally arraigned in the near future.
This comes after months of investigations probing Santos' campaign and financial affairs. Since being elected last year, Santos was found to have fabricated most of his life story, work history, education, and much more.
More recently, it has been alleged that Santos took unemployment benefits during the pandemic while still working at an investment firm making $120,000 annually — while co-sponsoring a bill that would help states recover fraudulent COVID unemployment benefits. This revelation comes as Santos is currently trying to demand stricter work requirements for Medicare beneficiaries.
While Speaker McCarthy is trying to block raising the debt ceiling and hold our economy hostage, a member of his caucus has been charged with wire fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and making materially false statements to the House. **The GOP needs to look inward.**
[](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=2&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)
The people of New York's 3rd District deserve better. Congress deserves better. That's why today we're formally calling for George Santos' resignation from the House. His continued presence disgraces the People's House every single day he is allowed to remain in office. [**Peter, will you take action today by adding your name to our petition calling on Santos to resign?**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=3&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=4&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)**
Rather than expel him or reprimand him for his many lies, Republicans have decided that protecting their _**razor thin**_ House majority is more important than holding one of their own accountable. Unfortunately, we can't say this is surprising.
If Republicans aren't going to hold their own members accountable then it's up to us to call for action and accountability. [**Can you take a moment today to add your name to call on Santos to resign?**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=5&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.coribush.org/sign/tell-george-santos-to-resign?source=em20230510-2668&t=6&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM)**
More to come,
— Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230510-2668-footer&t=7&refcode2=2668_1082990_NLQRXM&akid=2668%2E1082990%2ENLQRXM) **

clean_body: David Schweikert spent his time committing ethics violations and becoming a corrupt career politician. | = | Peter, David Schweikert’s entire career has been all about helping himself, but mine has been about helping others. Now, I’m running for Congress because our district deserves a leader that will fight for them, not special interests. = | = My life has been completely dedicated to leadership and service. I’ve held senior positions at nonprofits like the Make-A-Wish Foundation, where I served as the COO, and the American Red Cross, where I was the regional CEO here in Arizona. name: Sen. Sherrod Brown
subject: I have breaking news out of Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
This could not be more urgent, friend: **corrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio _just passed_ a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy.** **I’m furious.**
This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution.
We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place.
**I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now?**

clean_body: | | | This could not be more urgent, friend: corrupt GOP lawmakers in Ohio just passed a bill through the state legislature that’ll make it harder for folks to have a voice in our democracy. I’m furious. This is a GOP power grab, plain and simple, designed to stop the organizers across Ohio who are fighting to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution. We’ve seen pro-choice majorities succeed in other states when abortion access is on the ballot. Now it’s time for Ohioans to get that same chance to make their voices heard – without any new barriers in place. I’m working as hard as I can to fight back against this latest attack on reproductive rights, but I need to know you’re with me. Will you respond to my live poll now? | | With gratitude, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | What do you know about asbestos? I'm sure you know it's dangerous. Or you may know that it causes cancer. Like many folks, you probably assume it's been banned. But it hasn't... **Asbestos is still imported into the United States for commercial use.** We are one of a few developed countries in the world where asbestos is not banned. Because asbestos is not banned, **people in certain industries wake up, go to work, and find themselves producing products with asbestos in the production process every day.** This is wholly unsafe, wholly unfair, wholly preventable. Industries that utilize asbestos almost always have alternatives, but they keep using asbestos because it's cheaper and easier. They'll only stop when we make them stop. **That is why Congresswoman Suzanne Bonamici and I have proposed a bill to ban the use of asbestos in the United States.** This is about protecting workers, consumers, and everyone in the country. **Every day that we go without an asbestos ban is another day that Americans' health and lives are being put in grave danger.** Experts have said for years that no level of asbestos exposure is safe, and now it is time for our laws to reflect that. The time to pass a ban and save lives is today. name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_t=bBjZG6efy7pnrcPAPAZJoKC-6aJeaI66LeC6vxoH_PCS7MbvlVk9Psiy-cZiTlGgg8Q3Q5kiz9XdiSJ9rhXRkJyWXzwhIOtYOKNKaMkogcY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_t=bBjZG6efy7pnrcPAPAZJoKC-6aJeaI66LeC6vxoH_PCS7MbvlVk9Psiy-cZiTlGgg8Q3Q5kiz9XdiSJ9rhXRkJyWXzwhIOtYOKNKaMkogcY%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7Stt4PvHGoMIzynSS-9YaGq9aUiAMzOFZZQiTMMdITMU_Bfu4MQIsxwWrGwxCef06VANi6c4loY_UavQY8BzTnxgx3iKhEnRyGkSOOs_zQHnpNxo1ZyGkz4YtdUi4kszKSVY1o_WW0OJVGgVBe3yT5eKv)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7StvseP_en0w--OO_x7XeW7HBB4XVB58G3ntHBVX8G8Z-oYow_LTzqflOOkKvsGwQr_F4ZjwqZbGJt6MOrLEa5ij7t7oMuymHPaG8MYJm6K2sJOLPD4vbelK3g0AqbQliaCUJAPCOL748RNIv9b7_UhRa)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7Stu9GY6GOpCiT9JwPulh6pnE9_uHHQoSv00rqjIroqYhT2yV43LcqVwsCSsjG8nzmycjrq-dN_EGIFQfOf8Rgf7BLbwm7BJmdGxhxs8VkJP2PDtPmDORo-JQBPT-MDx-z0o4_2IOaHYebI-cGuszzSSM)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7StsnKM8egIrQ59Jv3IfxfV2uKEcnSJ19UBoO_Zi2fGvJQTBCO12ASM2Y254rMm3rb5rc53VM_DJKvCeQYCkdqUX_O19b5MWZ3H-hxkQjNvgkKPJJ5PPGwkX-O5a_KuInfKaNc3svMKmRYQsCRnuobqv0)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7SttDQzDhpENOYK4HiehUbOeLYrj25yGsgPPbeeeq-eSADY58i_g73pMwtf0oGLX4KUbuPq45WIjfI4r5mHu-lKJaKkKffkdc_nKLbr1CuN7KqnBSa_u7xSHtyKKxvonhaoeXrJE7UkqW-Vnc4t9bdoWj)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7Stt1S36fC_wUTDSCAB7tkOj5kSIYCPE6z7suAQcLRDJjGeLrAQ_irSAO0SWwdPQ3iBmUIYvOUlcOtcZsD3aQeJp-tVBhQO4_gT_sU1x6nGGTCJVkl3G9Sd26muI9iEenwyGwyw5PHLzNDlqSyrNjVqTs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7Stvj5WnagsrEQlVuY3TuLA6rwS8-hLNhHvOfQxRTv7a3NiqLGQ8IZAyHJ777G7mI8QYEy6dzNK_2ajIfil700hjoLXKRVv8sQBQ137ehhTaea8l43LpZlMr_fm2mu8qgAJA7oe6Cy_RW2gGS-O_Atn5f) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7SttQWDJIyctn4ZwFrUJ59C2l0CMaobuvyNr-IVvkTrtbjj1ISRGahJHVvKy_mPguQjt7ygXLOPMikRGOvD8dxlEfBw8rO2QfVvYM832u6z-zeTcnGRkperICnW8m-qGwCES9-vYBa2GUfdvUwbyYi_nJ)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7Stu0h7M3WSNrsJcJqOs1aAa_JjVExGJtt8q93k-FSfIEXbBUydR9785iE99Rxnu3UFYa1Tnh2u6o1U0MaYz7Neu19puuvPD7i9ZfCPB1SHOSz_eFxSR0Ts-Dw1mgYjUaJ1-8_28flF5JBXMXNrNqvQ7Z)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=79cd7003cef249278e6afbfac10fb535&_e=maESuWKE6iWoGK4_6JVe6qkbe8_YhWIK1SRPaFi9N30Y3OcvPbAUu2adxVKRTBSL3iqxmKOeWLTxShA4TajCI26fArmde3D4SGZ5MCRqLUi3cJnsukiniYtJqec-zk_-B7F2CCKqHcG_s57UNAAn38ncHWh1fEq4uku48_J7SttL4_KjSRpHOPMqnO_QcKGlF4pkISM6m18SZbGibtC3KbYtZ4otcvg7eVJZYg1ninEppYY-Qww_vj0LwCD8jT7iXTitqHYaZ3SlTiyGLguQTCjxOJEJ30bOJn1CLRwfqIF8Xp2VpjgIDROWUq-yqQZE)
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center

name: Team Helen
subject: two quick things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
A few days ago, a new poll was released in our race for Mayor of Philadelphia:

Helen Gym: 21%
Rebecca Rhynhart: 21%

Here are the two things you most need to know:

1. This race really is a dead heat. The newest poll shows Helen in a two-way deadlock with her moderate opponent, and the poll before that showed a five-way statistical tie. This race will be decided by the slimmest of margins.

2. We have what it takes to break the tie and win, but only if we sprint through the finish line in six days. Helen can bring our movement for a stronger and safer Philadelphia to City Hall, but she needs you!

We have what it takes to break the tie and win, but only if we sprint through the finish line in six days. Helen can bring our movement for a stronger and safer Philadelphia to City Hall, but she needs you!

Add a grassroots contribution of $10 or more to Helen Gym’s campaign for mayor. She’s surging in the polls, and, with your help we can build a movement that is powerful enough to win.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.23 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=20.23]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-may23-em]

Since Helen is the most grassroots-funded candidate in this race, our team relies on small contributions from folks like you to give us the strongest chance.

Counting on you.

Peter, this week is Teacher Appreciation Week and we couldn’t pass up the chance to **appreciate a former teacher who is very close to our hearts: Mark Takano!**

Mark was a public school English teacher for over 20 years before he ran for public office.

He witnessed firsthand the challenges that public school systems face on a daily basis – _and those experiences inform his work as a Member of Congress today._

[**Peter, this Teacher Appreciation Week, consider chipping in $7 to support former teacher Mark Takano as he fights for progress in Congress. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63109106/405618377/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230510_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjBkMTQ4OC04NWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jt6WH-fFXjg5cnWeSPXwPKkcIhVjgSwzElwTDZUPlig=) | [$1,000 GOAL: DONATE TO RE-ELECT MARK TAKANO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63109109/405618378/656015310?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230510_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjBkMTQ4OC04NWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jt6WH-fFXjg5cnWeSPXwPKkcIhVjgSwzElwTDZUPlig=)

**Sadly, Peter, our education system is in more danger than ever before.**

Extremist Republicans are targeting young trans students, banning racial justice curriculums and books, and cutting teacher salaries.

**Thankfully, Mark has been hard at work in Congress fighting back:**
* He stood up for trans students who were being targeted in schools.
* He’s fought for teacher unions and higher pay.
* And as a former teacher, he will always continue to fight for public schools, students, and teachers.

clean_body: This week is Teacher Appreciation Week | = Peter, this week is Teacher Appreciation Week and we couldn’t pass up the chance to appreciate a former teacher who is very close to our hearts: Mark Takano! Mark was a public school English teacher for over 20 years before he ran for public office. He witnessed firsthand the challenges that public school systems face on a daily basis – and those experiences inform his work as a Member of Congress today. = | = Sadly, Peter, our education system is in more danger than ever before. Extremist Republicans are targeting young trans students, banning racial justice curriculums and books, and cutting teacher salaries. Thankfully, Mark has been hard at work in Congress fighting back: He stood up for trans students who were being targeted in schools. He’s fought for teacher unions and higher pay. And as a former teacher, he will always continue to fight for public schools, students, and teachers. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much, Team Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. body:
| | | Did you see the news, Peter? **Serial fraudster Rep. George Santos was arrested this morning and indicted on thirteen federal counts, including wire fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and lying to the House of Representatives. 1** These indictments are no surprise — this is a man who also stole money he promised to a disabled veteran’s dying dog and lied about his own mother being killed on 9/11.2 But still, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy refuses to call on him to resign.3 And we know why. McCarthy needed Santos’s vote to win the Speakership on the 15th ballot in January, and Republicans need his vote to pass their extremist MAGA agenda in the House, including proposed cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and veterans’ benefits. Our job is to make sure they can’t — and to hold them all accountable at the polls. **[Will you pitch in to help us defeat George Santos and other extremist MAGA frauds like him next year? clean_body: | | | Did you see the news, Peter? Serial fraudster Rep. George Santos was arrested this morning and indicted on thirteen federal counts, including wire fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and lying to the House of Representatives. 1 These indictments are no surprise — this is a man who also stole money he promised to a disabled veteran’s dying dog and lied about his own mother being killed on 9/11.2 But still, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy refuses to call on him to resign.3 And we know why. McCarthy needed Santos’s vote to win the Speakership on the 15th ballot in January, and Republicans need his vote to pass their extremist MAGA agenda in the House, including proposed cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and veterans’ benefits. Our job is to make sure they can’t — and to hold them all accountable at the polls. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , USA Today, May 10, 2023 2\. , New York Magazine, May 10, 2023 3\. , Business Insider, May 10, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Here’s what we know about the debt ceiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I want to give you an update on the debt ceiling situation happening now in the House. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63109992/405619447/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWJhZjE4MS04NmVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n1Uvt1Q8-_zIicx7ouTvFIALlurNPbUkCm9PnzbPrag=&emci=e95e09cc-6def-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=85baf181-86ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Hi everyone, I want to give you an update on the debt ceiling situation happening now in the House. Yesterday, President Biden, Speaker McCarthy, and other members of congressional leadership sat down at the White House to discuss the debt limit, otherwise known as the debt ceiling, to negotiate a path forward so our government can continue to operate. The group has agreed to meet again on Friday; however, both sides admit that no real movement has happened since Tuesday's meeting. If we end up not coming to a solution, experts agree that it could create a cascading catastrophe in our economy. So what does raising the debt limit mean? Raising the so-called "debt ceiling" simply allows our government to pay the bills it has already accrued and continue to provide the essential services we all need. Since 1960, the debt ceiling has been raised, temporarily extended, or revised 78 times, including 49 times under Republican presidents and 29 times under Democratic presidents, according to the Treasury Department. Most recently, the ceiling was raised three times under President Trump without conditions. So why is Congress talking about this now? In January, Treasury Secretary Yellen took some measures to keep our government operational, but those measures were only temporary. In order to continue operating, paying our bills, and providing the services we need, Congress will have to act as soon as June 1, Yellen says. Otherwise, the government would be forced to stop providing its essential services. If no compromise is found, the U.S. government would no longer be able to take pay its bills and would essentially have to shut down services like Social Security payments and food stamps. Tens of thousands of folks would be sent home without paychecks, which would be disastrous for our working families. So what do we do now? Well, right now Democrats are working with Republicans to raise the ceiling. However, Republicans say they will not vote on this unless certain conditions are met, many of which Democrats feel would harm working families, like cutting funding to services for those with food insecurities. I hope this has been a helpful explanation of what’s happening in Washington this week! – Jahana

clean_body: I want to give you an update on the debt ceiling situation happening now in the House. | | Hi everyone, I want to give you an update on the debt ceiling situation happening now in the House. Yesterday, President Biden, Speaker McCarthy, and other members of congressional leadership sat down at the White House to discuss the debt limit, otherwise known as the debt ceiling, to negotiate a path forward so our government can continue to operate. The group has agreed to meet again on Friday; however, both sides admit that no real movement has happened since Tuesday's meeting. If we end up not coming to a solution, experts agree that it could create a cascading catastrophe in our economy. So what does raising the debt limit mean? Raising the so-called "debt ceiling" simply allows our government to pay the bills it has already accrued and continue to provide the essential services we all need. Since 1960, the debt ceiling has been raised, temporarily extended, or revised 78 times, including 49 times under Republican presidents and 29 times under Democratic presidents, according to the Treasury Department. Most recently, the ceiling was raised three times under President Trump without conditions. So why is Congress talking about this now? In January, Treasury Secretary Yellen took some measures to keep our government operational, but those measures were only temporary. In order to continue operating, paying our bills, and providing the services we need, Congress will have to act as soon as June 1, Yellen says. Otherwise, the government would be forced to stop providing its essential services. If no compromise is found, the U.S. government would no longer be able to take pay its bills and would essentially have to shut down services like Social Security payments and food stamps. Tens of thousands of folks would be sent home without paychecks, which would be disastrous for our working families. So what do we do now? Well, right now Democrats are working with Republicans to raise the ceiling. However, Republicans say they will not vote on this unless certain conditions are met, many of which Democrats feel would harm working families, like cutting funding to services for those with food insecurities. I hope this has been a helpful explanation of what’s happening in Washington this week! – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
Becca’s work to hold him accountable is paying off.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63112728/405621285/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDBlMDM3Yi04OGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w64ZcuICOCPj6RkQhE7ATmtTrDsAiaePnb5poGqio5M=&emci=309bfe12-6eef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e00e037b-88ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | **GOP Rep. George Santos has been arrested and indicted on 13 federal charges of theft, fraud, lying to Congress, and money laundering.** Peter: Back in November, George Santos lied about his education, career, businesses, and even his religion in order to get elected to Congress. body:
I want to take these 10 minutes to share a bit about why I came to the U.S. Senate to represent New Mexico. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63113123/405621483/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWNiMmViZC04OGVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tnxJG6v7M2Zshtv_2KawcoyOJXsy-tp9qqYxDqyrGcs=&emci=c443f1af-83ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4acb2ebd-88ef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
I’ll be honest, folks — I only have about 10 minutes of free time today. In addition to recently launching my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate, I just called for federal rules to help close the loophole in gun seller background checks, introduced legislation to target the fentanyl crisis, and co-sponsored bills to strengthen federal response to wildfires and other natural disasters in New Mexico. So today, I want to take these 10 minutes to share a bit about why I came to the U.S. Senate to represent New Mexico and fight for change like this in the first place. Growing up, my parents taught me the value of hard work. My dad was a union lineman with the local utility company. My mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. I worked my way through college to earn a mechanical engineering degree and started my career at what’s now known as the Air Force Research Laboratory at Kirtland Air Force Base in Albuquerque. Then I learned firsthand about the importance of conservation work in rural communities as an AmeriCorps fellow. Before running for public office, I also worked for and with nonprofits, including leading an organization that helped kids get outdoors, and to help elect Democrats to the state legislature. From there, I served in the Albuquerque City Council, as a Natural Resources Trustee for New Mexico, in the U.S. House, and now in the U.S. Senate — always focusing on delivering for the people of New Mexico and tackling the climate crisis. Right now, my number one priority is to continue my work in the Senate, addressing the challenges we face head-on. That means improving lives for you and your family, acting on climate change, and propelling New Mexico and our country into the clean energy future. **Now that you’ve taken some time to learn more about how I got here, I hope you’ll help me stay in the Senate by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign. clean_body: I want to take these 10 minutes to share a bit about why I came to the U.S. Senate to represent New Mexico. I’ll be honest, folks — I only have about 10 minutes of free time today. In addition to recently launching my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate, I just called for federal rules to help close the loophole in gun seller background checks, introduced legislation to target the fentanyl crisis, and co-sponsored bills to strengthen federal response to wildfires and other natural disasters in New Mexico. So today, I want to take these 10 minutes to share a bit about why I came to the U.S. Senate to represent New Mexico and fight for change like this in the first place. Growing up, my parents taught me the value of hard work. My dad was a union lineman with the local utility company. My mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. I worked my way through college to earn a mechanical engineering degree and started my career at what’s now known as the Air Force Research Laboratory at Kirtland Air Force Base in Albuquerque. Then I learned firsthand about the importance of conservation work in rural communities as an AmeriCorps fellow. Before running for public office, I also worked for and with nonprofits, including leading an organization that helped kids get outdoors, and to help elect Democrats to the state legislature. From there, I served in the Albuquerque City Council, as a Natural Resources Trustee for New Mexico, in the U.S. House, and now in the U.S. Senate — always focusing on delivering for the people of New Mexico and tackling the climate crisis. Right now, my number one priority is to continue my work in the Senate, addressing the challenges we face head-on. That means improving lives for you and your family, acting on climate change, and propelling New Mexico and our country into the clean energy future. Now that you’ve taken some time to learn more about how I got here, I hope you’ll help me stay in the Senate by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign. Can you rush in a donation right now? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support during Week One. Early contributions make all the difference. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is a slap in the face to Ohio voters
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63114392/405621862/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjE2YmFhYS04OWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-F3naqC2WvQ_Kob9PoMAVcTgqY05SRxgpvHlgZ9TaHk=) | Team, we're furious.

Ohio Republican politicians just passed their self-serving measure through the House that will effectively END citizen-led ballot initiatives in Ohio. **Now, they're forcing Ohio taxpayers to foot the bill for a $20 million special election in August to vote on their shameless proposal.**

This attack on voters is the GOP's latest attempt to further their own extremist agendas. And they're blatantly using the legislature to sabotage the reproductive rights amendment Democrats are working to introduce this fall.

Attacking citizen-led ballot initiatives is bad for voters. It's bad for taxpayers. It's bad for our democracy. _And it's bad for Ohio._

**[Ohio Democrats are united in opposition against these political efforts to rip fundamental rights away from voters — and we need you with us. name: Bob Casey
subject: Special request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I have a few minutes to sit down, catch my breath, and reach out to you with a special request. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115066/405622247/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MDYzNi04YWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43JDTMEgo83Ci7cdt0NPlbJsk_Jp63zGSQmyHA8xK4c=&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0e790636-8aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Hi Peter, Bob Casey here. 👋🏻 We’ve been working nonstop since we launched our re-election campaign, but I finally have a few minutes to sit down, catch my breath, and reach out to you with **a special request:** **[Will you personally endorse my campaign for the US Senate? To win this important race, we have to build a strong grassroots movement that reaches every corner of Pennsylvania. Your personal endorsement is the first step towards doing just that.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115068/405622248/-1171330733?source=em20230510-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MDYzNi04YWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43JDTMEgo83Ci7cdt0NPlbJsk_Jp63zGSQmyHA8xK4c=&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0e790636-8aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115070/405622249/-1171330733?source=em20230510-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MDYzNi04YWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43JDTMEgo83Ci7cdt0NPlbJsk_Jp63zGSQmyHA8xK4c=&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0e790636-8aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **Let me explain what your endorsement means to me.** In the Senate, I’m not there to fight for the ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. I’m fighting for hardworking Pennsylvanians — just like you, Peter. I know that if I have your support, I’m doing something right. **Still, I know that your support isn’t guaranteed.** I have to earn it. So, let me tell you a bit about me and what we’ve accomplished together. In Washington, we’ve:
* Lowered costs for working families.
* Expanded access to veterans’ health care.
* Supported small businesses.
* Driven critical federal investment to local communities across the Commonwealth.

**And we’re just getting started.** I’m running for re-election because we still have a lot of work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results that make hardworking Pennsylvanians' lives a little bit easier. **[With your endorsement, I know I can win this important race and keep fighting for you in the Senate. Please, take a moment to add your name now and join our grassroots team:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115071/405622250/-1171330733?source=em20230510-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MDYzNi04YWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43JDTMEgo83Ci7cdt0NPlbJsk_Jp63zGSQmyHA8xK4c=&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0e790636-8aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115072/405622251/-1171330733?source=em20230510-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTc5MDYzNi04YWVmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=43JDTMEgo83Ci7cdt0NPlbJsk_Jp63zGSQmyHA8xK4c=&emci=7a18fb37-6fef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0e790636-8aef-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** Thank you, Bob Casey

To start, I wanted to tell you about my career and how we got to this point. At West Point, I was top of my class and honored to serve in the U.S. Army. From there, I started a small business and eventually ran for Congress to defend America First, Conservative values. Following President Trump's 2016 election victory, I served as CIA Director working to keep Americans safe. My last stop was at the White House, where I served as President Trump's Secretary of State.

Today, I am fighting to get America back on the right track by continuing my fight for America. I love my country and want to preserve the foundation of our nation for generations to come.

Tulsa, OK, 74137

clean_body: > Please read immediately | To start, I wanted to tell you about my career and how we got to this point. At West Point, I was top of my class and honored to serve in the U.S. Army. From there, I started a small business and eventually ran for Congress to defend America First, Conservative values. Following President Trump's 2016 election victory, I served as CIA Director working to keep Americans safe. My last stop was at the White House, where I served as President Trump's Secretary of State. Today, I am fighting to get America back on the right track by continuing my fight for America. I love my country and want to preserve the foundation of our nation for generations to come. | Republicans face attacks from the Radical Left daily and continue to face an uphill battle regarding fundraising. If we want to WIN in 2024, we need to make up ground now. To Save America, we MUST hold the House Majority and FLIP the US Senate and the White House RED. I am fighting to make sure no campaign is left behind. We must fight for Republicans to fix the problems at hand. True Patriots, like Kevin Hern, are on the verge of losing their seats in Congress if we don't rush emergency support! - Sincerely, Mike Pompeo Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund Copyright (C) 2023 House Conservative Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

| | Buckle up! **We’re excited to officially launch our Voting Rights Road Trip** — a virtual tour of key states where voting rights, reproductive freedoms, and other fundamental rights are being challenged right now, giving you insight into how Fair Fight Action is fighting back. Today we’re stopping in North Carolina, the Tar Heel State. North Carolina’s voting population is rapidly growing, and anti-voter politicians are willing to do anything to retain their power — in this case, by suppressing the freedom to vote. [_**Before we tell you more about what’s at stake, will you pitch in to help stop anti-voter extremism in North Carolina? To get a sense of what we’re up against right now, here’s a recent headline to fill you in:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63115409/405623068/13463077?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230510_f_roadtrip1_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjdkODAzYS04Y2VmLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9UEH1huxdB01K_PNIc-8LaWYS3DhXRn0pP8fZZK3dIY=)
Just recently, the North Carolina Supreme Court allowed a restrictive voter ID law to move forward, upheld partisan gerrymandering, and maintained outdated and unjust felony disenfranchisement laws — decisions that will disproportionately target Black voters.
This is just the tip of the iceberg: In 2023 so far, anti-voter extremists in North Carolina have introduced or passed over 26 voter suppression bills. State lawmakers are also moving forward with an extreme abortion ban — in hopes of reversing decades of progress for North Carolinians and their families.
Alongside Current NC, we’re fighting back against extremism and defending the freedom to vote. With our Voter Empowerment Task Force in North Carolina, we’re working hand-in-hand with on-the-ground partners and officials to prevent, mitigate, and bring to light every anticipated hurdle for voters, before they materialize.
Our mission of protecting the freedom to vote for all eligible voters goes beyond a single county, city, or state. By partnering with community leaders and elected officials on the ground nationwide, we provide them resources to build long-term power.
[_**To fight for the freedom to vote in North Carolina and beyond, will you split a donation between Fair Fight Action and Current NC right now? clean_body: We’re launching a virtual tour of key states where voting rights are being challenged. | | | Buckle up! We’re excited to officially launch our Voting Rights Road Trip — a virtual tour of key states where voting rights, reproductive freedoms, and other fundamental rights are being challenged right now, giving you insight into how Fair Fight Action is fighting back. Today we’re stopping in North Carolina, the Tar Heel State. North Carolina’s voting population is rapidly growing, and anti-voter politicians are willing to do anything to retain their power — in this case, by suppressing the freedom to vote. = | = To get a sense of what we’re up against right now, here’s a recent headline to fill you in: = Just recently, the North Carolina Supreme Court allowed a restrictive voter ID law to move forward, upheld partisan gerrymandering, and maintained outdated and unjust felony disenfranchisement laws — decisions that will disproportionately target Black voters. This is just the tip of the iceberg: In 2023 so far, anti-voter extremists in North Carolina have introduced or passed over 26 voter suppression bills. State lawmakers are also moving forward with an extreme abortion ban — in hopes of reversing decades of progress for North Carolinians and their families. Alongside Current NC, we’re fighting back against extremism and defending the freedom to vote. With our Voter Empowerment Task Force in North Carolina, we’re working hand-in-hand with on-the-ground partners and officials to prevent, mitigate, and bring to light every anticipated hurdle for voters, before they materialize. Our mission of protecting the freedom to vote for all eligible voters goes beyond a single county, city, or state. By partnering with community leaders and elected officials on the ground nationwide, we provide them resources to build long-term power. = = Thanks and see you on the road, The Fair Fight Action Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved.
